descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences

location.name: сырой подвал мрачного особняка
location.description: узкая металлическая кровать в углу, дверь с громким скрипом

descriptions.intent: девушка пытается выжить, скрывается в углу, осознает, что это день 9 мая за три месяца до конца света
descriptions.conflict: её запястье сковано цепью, не позволяя шевелиться, она слышит диалог убийц о планах убить её
descriptions.state: ослабленная, бледная, волосы спутаны, но внутри горит жажда мщения
descriptions.relation: одиночество, изоляция
descriptions.outcome: она вспоминает прошлую смерть и решает изменить судьбу, активируя систему способностей

descriptions.title: Сунде Деймин, Джанкай
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Сунде Деймин хочет вынудить Дзян Янь отказаться от наследства, Джанкай сомневается в эффективности запирания
descriptions.conflict: Джанкай предлагает убить её сразу, если она не согласится на условия, Сунде Деймин откладывает на три месяца
descriptions.state: Сунде Деймин презрительно усмехается, Джанкай с безумным блеском в глазах
props: нефритовый браслет на руке Дзян Янь
descriptions.relation: Сунде Деймин и Джанкай обсуждают судьбу Дзян Янь и браслет
descriptions.outcome: они решают отрезать руку с браслетом и убить её, Сунде Деймин уходит в туалет, Джанкай за кухонным топором

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences

location.name: подвал мрачного особняка
location.description: угол, где она свернулась в комок

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь пытается понять, что происходит, слушает диалог убийц
descriptions.conflict: она осознает, что это тот самый день, когда она погибла в прошлой жизни
descriptions.state: вздрагивает от диалога, затем отцепеняет от осознания, но внутри горит решимость
descriptions.relation: воспоминания о прошлой жизни
descriptions.outcome: она решает изменить всё, жаждет мщения за смерть матери и боль

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь активирует систему способностей, проверяет новую силу
descriptions.conflict: время мало, убийцы скоро вернутся, нужно успеть проверить способность
descriptions.state: удивлена, не может поверить своим глазам, но быстро принимает решение
descriptions.relation: взаимодействие с системой
descriptions.outcome: она получает способность «Лианы, плотоядные цветы», уровень ноль, один цветок

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь испытывает способность, проверяет дальность и силу лианы
descriptions.conflict: нужно определить, как использовать лиану против убийц
descriptions.state: сосредоточена, быстро действует, не теряет времени
descriptions.relation: взаимодействие с лианой
descriptions.outcome: лиана материализуется, цветок напоминает хищное растение, Дзян Янь обвивает кровать боковой ветвью

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь планирует убить обоих убийц, используя лиану
descriptions.conflict: проблема с утилизацией тел, цивилизованное общество, апокалипсис ещё не начался
descriptions.state: решительная, планирует потратить месяц на подготовку
descriptions.relation: взаимодействие с лианой
descriptions.outcome: она решает скрыть тела, запастись ресурсами и спланировать выживание

descriptions.title: DзянЯнь
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences

location.name: A hidden
location.description: secure basement room with a bed and a phone

descriptions.intent: DзянЯнь decides not to risk immediate danger but to spend the month preparing for survival, gathering resources, and planning against the approaching apocalypse
descriptions.conflict: The risk of the body being discovered in a civilized society and the fear that instant death would be too easy a punishment for the criminals
descriptions.state: She is calm and calculating, quickly formulating a revenge plan while pretending to sleep
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She lies on the bed pretending to sleep, waiting for the arrival of the criminals Сон Демина and Джан Кая

descriptions.title: Сон Демина, Джан Кай
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences

location.name: The basement room where DзянЯнь is pretending to sleep

descriptions.intent: Сон Демина and Джан Кай enter the room to steal the jade bracelet and DзянЯнь's assets, with Сон Демина offering to hold the bracelet while Джан Кай cuts it off
descriptions.conflict: An invisible vine suddenly appears from the void, striking the men and binding their limbs instantly
descriptions.state: Сон Демина is terrified and loses control of his bladder, while Джан Кай is shocked by the real-life carnivorous plant
descriptions.relation: They are accomplices who turn into victims of the trap
descriptions.outcome: Both men are immobilized by the vines, fall to the floor, and are subsequently killed by Сон Демина using the pliers

descriptions.title: Сон Демина
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences

location.name: The basement floor
location.description: amidst the bodies of the criminals

descriptions.intent: Сон Демина, realizing the danger of the plant, grabs the pliers to kill Джан Кай in self-defense
descriptions.conflict: The sheer horror of the giant carnivorous flower with a bloody tongue and the immediate threat of being eaten
descriptions.state: He transitions from terror to aggression, driven by survival instinct
descriptions.relation: He attacks his partner Джан Кай
descriptions.outcome: Сон Демина kills Джан Кай, leaving two mutilated corpses on the floor, while DзянЯнь remains on the bed suppressing her disgust

descriptions.title: DзянЯнь
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: After the drug wears off, she stands up, wraps her hand in a sheet, takes the phone, and calls the police to report the crime
descriptions.conflict: The physical toll of the ordeal and the need to hide the truth about the apocalypse from the authorities
descriptions.state: She appears exhausted after five hours of police interrogation and processing
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The police return her stolen items, revealing that Сон Демина and Джан Кай had burned the backpack in the past life, but this time it was saved

descriptions.title: DзянЯнь
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She leaves the police station to return home and prepare for the apocalypse, knowing she has only three months left
descriptions.conflict: The need to convert assets to cash without public knowledge and the risk of media exposure if the secret of the disappearance is revealed
descriptions.state: She feels a mix of relief at having avenged her mother and anxiety about the approaching deadline
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She takes a taxi home, orders food delivery, and enters her house, fully aware that the public narrative of her mother's death and her own disappearance complicates her survival plans

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь wants to continue preparations for survival after her mother's death and the secret disappearance of a woman
descriptions.conflict: Police secrecy complicates her plans to convert assets to cash and prepare for apocalypse
descriptions.state: Cautious, relieved, tired, determined
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She receives food, checks the lock, and reflects on her mother's death and the need for survival preparation.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь wants to eat her mother's favorite dishes and a personal meal
descriptions.conflict: She has no appetite but forces herself to eat
descriptions.state: Reflective, slightly melancholic, hungry
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She receives the food, thanks the delivery boy, and prepares to eat.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь wants to wash away fatigue and dirt before eating
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Refreshed, calm
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She takes a shower, eats quickly, and decides to manage her 30 billion yuan assets for survival.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь wants to plan how to use her money for survival against heat, rain, floods, and landslides
descriptions.conflict: Her current house is too low and unsuitable for the coming disasters
descriptions.state: Analytical, worried, determined
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to sell her houses and cars to buy a wheelhouse and prepare for the first wave of disasters.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь wants to find a magical storage space like in novels
descriptions.conflict: She lacks such a space and worries about where to store supplies
descriptions.state: Hopeful, imaginative
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She touches her jade bracelet and wishes for a magical storage space.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь wants to activate the magical space on her bracelet
descriptions.conflict: She doubts it is real and fears it is a hallucination
descriptions.state: Surprised, skeptical, excited
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The bracelet glows brightly, and she realizes it is not a dream.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь wants to explore her new magical space
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Overwhelmed, joyful, amazed
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She enters the magical space, sees three zones, and feels refreshed by the sun, wind, and air.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь wants to examine the white zone
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Curious, comfortable
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She steps into the white zone, feels the ideal temperature, and notices the gray zone with a vortex.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist stands in a room observing a semi-transparent vortex near a grey zone that resembles a black hole from sci-fi films, with a glowing "0%" inscription above it.

location.name: A mysterious space adjacent to a grey zone and a black portal
location.description: transitioning to a standard office room

descriptions.intent: She intends to test the nature of the vortex by entering and exiting the space to understand its mechanics and verify her hypothesis about its origin based on her reading experience.
descriptions.conflict: The unknown nature of the vortex and the need to safely interact with it without physical harm or getting stuck.
descriptions.state: Curious, confident, and analytical, feeling a sense of wonder at the potential discovery.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully enters and exits the space with a thought command, confirming the portal's functionality and ease of use.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist mentally commands the computer, desk, and bookshelf to be collected, causing all furniture to vanish instantly and appear in the grey zone where items are automatically sorted.

location.name: The office room and the grey storage zone

descriptions.intent: She wants to test the storage capabilities of the grey zone by moving large objects into it to see how the sorting mechanism works.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for the sorting system to malfunction or the items to be lost in the grey zone.
descriptions.state: Surprised and amazed by the smoothness and efficiency of the teleportation and sorting process.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The furniture is successfully teleported and sorted in the grey zone, leaving the "0%" inscription unchanged, confirming the storage system's reliability.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: After several experiments, the protagonist deduces that objects must touch her body to enter the space, that connected objects can be moved via one point of contact, and that the grey zone automatically sorts items unless manually organized.

location.name: The grey storage zone and the office room

descriptions.intent: She aims to fully understand the rules governing the space to maximize its utility for storage and resource gathering.
descriptions.conflict: The need to establish clear rules for interaction to avoid mistakes or inefficiencies in using the space.
descriptions.state: Satisfied and intellectually stimulated by the logical conclusions she has drawn from her experiments.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the grey zone is perfect for compressed storage, significantly increasing capacity, and realizes the potential for buying and storing vast amounts of resources.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist considers the fertility of the black land and recalls a past incident where her lawn remained green due to an automatic irrigation system while her indoor rose withered from lack of water.

location.name: Her mind
location.description: recalling past events and the current space

descriptions.intent: She plans to test the black land's fertility by planting the withered rose to see if it can recover and grow fresh produce even during a future catastrophe.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of whether the black land can truly support life and revive dead plants.
descriptions.state: Hopeful and determined, driven by the need for food security in a crisis.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides that if the black land is fertile, it is suitable for planting, and resolves to use the space for growing fresh fruits and vegetables.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist finds a garden trowel, teleports the withered rose into the space, retrieves vanilla ice cream and a glass of hot water from the refrigerator, and places them in the grey zone before planting the rose in the black soil.

location.name: The office room
location.description: the grey storage zone, and the black planting zone

descriptions.intent: She wants to test the regenerative properties of the black soil by planting the dead rose and preserving perishable food items simultaneously.
descriptions.conflict: The challenge of managing multiple tasks—planting and storing food—within the same timeframe and space.
descriptions.state: Focused and eager to see the results of her planting experiment.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The rose instantly revives with green leaves and new shoots, confirming the black land's fertility, while the ice cream and water remain unchanged in temperature and state.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist observes the revived rose and the preserved food, realizing that time is stopped in the space, and concludes that the three zones (black for planting, white for living, grey for storage) function perfectly.
descriptions.intent: She aims to confirm the distinct functions of each zone and plan a massive resource acquisition strategy given her financial means and infinite storage.
descriptions.conflict: The temptation to immediately spend her money on resources versus the need to verify the system's limits first.
descriptions.state: Ecstatic and triumphant, feeling a surge of joy at the discovery of the space's full potential.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She celebrates the perfect functionality of the three zones and looks forward to a crazy shopping spree for resources.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: A phone rings at the door, forcing the protagonist to exit the space, where she sees a curly-haired man in a press vest with a camera and a large bouquet of white chrysanthemums on the security monitor.
descriptions.intent: She wants to identify the intruder and determine his intentions before deciding how to respond to his presence.
descriptions.conflict: The intrusion of an unknown person into her secure residence and the threat of him exposing her private food deliveries online.
descriptions.state: Alert and suspicious, maintaining a cold demeanor despite the unexpected visitor.
descriptions.relation: Antagonistic, with the man trying to gain access and the woman defending her privacy.
descriptions.outcome: The man claims to be a new neighbor and a journalist, threatening to publish photos of her food deliveries if she doesn't open the door.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist calls the residential complex security service while the man continues to speak through the camera, then decides to call the police instead of paying him off, as she is no longer afraid.
descriptions.intent: She aims to handle the situation legally and protect her privacy by involving authorities rather than negotiating with a threatening individual.
descriptions.conflict: The man's persistence in trying to enter and his threats to expose her private life to the public.
descriptions.state: Resolute and unafraid, showing a shift from potential fear to confident defiance.
descriptions.relation: Hostile, with the man escalating his threats and the woman preparing to counter them.
descriptions.outcome: The man continues to shout at the door, preparing to make another attempt to enter.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The door opens to reveal the protagonist in black sportswear with a smudge and a baseball cap, standing with a cold aura, while the man approaches with a forced smile and the bouquet of chrysanthemums.
descriptions.intent: She wants to confront the man directly, demand his credentials, and assert her authority over the situation without yielding to his pressure.
descriptions.conflict: The man's attempt to charm her with flowers and claims of being a journalist versus her demand for proof of his identity.
descriptions.state: Cold, authoritative, and unimpressed by his attempts to manipulate her emotions.

outfits.Дзян Янь: Black sportswear with a smudge and a baseball cap

descriptions.relation: Confrontational, with the man trying to gain favor and the woman maintaining a strict boundary.
descriptions.outcome: She coldly questions him and refuses the flowers, demanding to see his identification.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist demands the man's identification, and he attempts to open his red wallet from his pocket, but she quickly snatches the document from him before he can reveal it.
descriptions.intent: She aims to verify his identity immediately and prevent him from using any false credentials to gain her trust or access.
descriptions.conflict: The man's attempt to hide or delay showing his ID versus her swift action to seize the document.
descriptions.state: Quick, decisive, and protective of her privacy and security.
descriptions.relation: Tense, with the man trying to control the narrative and the woman taking control of the interaction.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully intercepts his document, preventing him from showing a potentially fake or misleading ID, and maintaining her upper hand in the confrontation.

descriptions.title: Дзяан Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзяан Янь пытается проверить подлинность удостоверения мошенника и защитить себя от вымогательства
descriptions.conflict: Мошенник требует огромную сумму за молчание, используя поддельное удостоверение и угрожая разоблачением
descriptions.state: Дзяан Янь чувствует холодное презрение и внутреннее негодование, сохраняя внешнюю невозмутимость
descriptions.relation: Дзяан Янь доминирует над мошенником, тот пытается манипулировать её репутацией
descriptions.outcome: Мошенник арестован полицией и охраной после того, как Дзяан Янь подставила ногу, чтобы он упал

descriptions.title: Дзяан Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзяан Янь решает продать старый дом и найти новый безопасный жилье, а также арендовать склад
descriptions.conflict: Страх перед новыми мошенниками и необходимость срочно переехать из-за слежки
descriptions.state: Дзяан Янь чувствует тревогу и решимость действовать быстро
descriptions.relation: Нет
descriptions.outcome: Дзяан Янь звонит Дузитену, чтобы обсудить поиск нового жилья и склада

descriptions.title: Дзяан Янь, Дузитен
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзяан Янь объясняет Дузитену свои требования к новому жилью и складу
descriptions.conflict: Дузитен отмечает, что требования сужают круг вариантов, но Дзяан Янь настаивает на срочности
descriptions.state: Дзяан Янь терпелива, но настойчива, Дузитен профессионален и внимателен
descriptions.relation: Дузитен уважает Дзяан Янь и готов помочь
descriptions.outcome: Дузитен обещает прислать адреса подходящих объектов

descriptions.title: Дзяан Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзяан Янь пьет черный кофе, чтобы собраться с силами для осмотра складов
descriptions.conflict: Усталость после перелета и необходимость быстро принять решения
descriptions.state: Дзяан Янь готова к новым задачам и чувствует себя бодрой
descriptions.relation: Нет
descriptions.outcome: Дзяан Янь готова к осмотру складов

descriptions.title: Дзяан Янь, Дузитен
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзяан Янь хочет убедиться, что склад соответствует её требованиям
descriptions.conflict: Склад должен быть большим, но удаленным от города, с хорошей герметичностью и удобными подъездными путями
descriptions.state: Дзяан Янь удовлетворена выбором склада
descriptions.relation: Дузитен рекомендует склад как лучший вариант
descriptions.outcome: Дзяан Янь и Дузитен соглашаются, что этот склад лучше всего подходит для её нужд

descriptions.title: Dudzitien, Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: A large
location.description: remote warehouse facility far from the city, featuring convenient access roads and high hermeticity

descriptions.intent: Dudzitien explains the warehouse's suitability as a former courier hub while noting the need to compensate owners for removing surveillance cameras; Sister Yan intends to secure this location for her upcoming survival preparations
descriptions.conflict: The presence of surveillance cameras requires financial compensation to the owners, and Dudzitien questions why a wealthy social media star would choose a labor-intensive grocery business
descriptions.state: Dudzitien is slightly confused but professional; Sister Yan is internally joyful and confident about her decision
descriptions.relation: Dudzitien acts as a guide and consultant, while Sister Yan makes decisive purchasing choices
descriptions.outcome: Sister Yan agrees to buy everything, including the shelving units, confirming her plan to open a supermarket

descriptions.title: Dudzitien, Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The interior of the warehouse
location.description: filled with nearly new steel shelving units from a closed hypermarket

descriptions.intent: Sister Yan inspects the shelving units, noting their sturdiness and quality, and decides to purchase them all; Dudzitien is surprised by her decision to buy the entire stock
descriptions.conflict: Dudzitien struggles to understand why a millionaire would engage in a low-profit, labor-intensive business like running a supermarket
descriptions.state: Sister Yan is determined and smiling confidently; Dudzitien is baffled but respectful
descriptions.relation: Dudzitien expresses mild confusion and disbelief at her client's unconventional business choice
descriptions.outcome: The transaction is finalized, and Dudzitien moves on to show her another warehouse with good water pipe communications

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: While walking towards another warehouse with Dudzitien

descriptions.intent: Sister Yan contemplates the impending apocalypse, focusing on the critical need for water and food as key survival resources
descriptions.conflict: Radioactive water from a neighboring state's nuclear facilities poses a severe threat that will spread via rain and floods, complicating resource acquisition
descriptions.state: Sister Yan is calculating and serious about the survival threat
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She resolves to stockpile water to the maximum extent possible despite the risks

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Sister Yan calculates the water needs for her lifetime (51 tons for drinking, 7,000-10,000 tons for domestic use) and decides to order 1,000 tons of drinking water directly from manufacturers
descriptions.conflict: Delivering such a large volume to her villa would be too conspicuous, so she opts for direct delivery to the warehouse
descriptions.state: Sister Yan is pragmatic and resourceful
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to use filtration systems for domestic water instead of mineral water and orders massive 30-ton PE plastic reservoirs

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Sister Yan orders 1,000 units of 30-ton PE plastic reservoirs, which are corrosion-resistant and equipped with convenient valves
descriptions.conflict: The total cost of 20 million yuan is significant, but she has the funds and space to absorb it
descriptions.state: Sister Yan is financially secure but focused on efficiency
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She plans to move the filled reservoirs to her storage facility once delivered

descriptions.title: Sister Yan, Dudzitien
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Sister Yan requests Dudzitien to find temporary workers to fill the reservoirs and considers hiring a professional team for mass procurement
descriptions.conflict: Registering a trading company might attract unwanted attention, so she decides to negotiate directly with large suppliers herself
descriptions.state: Sister Yan is willing to endure hardship and work like a hamster to prepare for the apocalypse
descriptions.relation: Dudzitien assists in finding labor, while Sister Yan takes charge of supplier negotiations
descriptions.outcome: She accepts the difficulty of the task and commits to personal involvement in the procurement process

descriptions.title: Sister Yan, Dudzitien
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Sister Yan and Dudzitien finalize the inspection of the warehouses, agreeing to rent and clear them by the next day
descriptions.conflict: Time is limited, with only one to two months left before the apocalypse, so efficiency is crucial
descriptions.state: Sister Yan is satisfied with the progress made
descriptions.relation: Cooperation is smooth and efficient
descriptions.outcome: All selected facilities are secured for rent and cleared of unnecessary items within the agreed timeframe

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: A different location
location.description: possibly her residence or another property

descriptions.intent: Sister Yan plans to spend the remaining time on more exciting activities and mentions access to an apartment owned by her older brother Du
descriptions.conflict: The apartment will only be accessible in the evening when the owner brings the keys, while another apartment already has her access
descriptions.state: Sister Yan is organized and prepared for the next phase of her preparations
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She secures access to multiple properties, ensuring she has safe havens for her survival preparations

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь решает потратить оставшееся время на что-то захватывающее, а не на подготовку к апокалипсису
descriptions.intent: Она планирует использовать вечер для более интересной деятельности, чем подготовка к катастрофе
descriptions.conflict: Ограниченное время до наступления ночи и необходимость найти занятие
descriptions.state: Решительная и энергичная, несмотря на недавнюю усталость
descriptions.relation: Ничего

descriptions.outcome: Дудзитен соглашается и уезжает после assurances о конфиденциальности

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Wholesale market
location.description: large storage area with aisles of bulk goods

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь intends to secure massive supplies of strategic goods like sugar, salt, and grains to ensure survival against the apocalypse, understanding that money solves problems others cannot
descriptions.conflict: The merchant insists on advance payment only due to the sheer volume of orders, explaining the legal difference between a deposit and non-refundable prepayment, while also noting the difficulty of selling bulk sugar and salt immediately
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels confident and unbothered by the financial demands, recalling her past wealth and resolving to avoid the fatal mistakes of her previous life

outfits.Dзян Янь: modern casual attire suitable for shopping; Merchant=standard shopkeeper uniform

descriptions.relation: Transactional and professional, with the merchant explaining terms and Dзян Янь agreeing immediately
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь secures confirmation of supplies for grains, oil, and flour, leveraging her financial strength to bypass the merchant's concerns about immediate sales

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь aims to purchase specific dried goods and seafood for immediate consumption, planning to buy fresh produce later, focusing on high-value natural delicacies that cannot be artificially replicated
descriptions.conflict: Store inventory is limited despite her desire to stock up even more, and the high cost of several million yuan per transaction
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels determined and focused, ignoring the high costs as she prioritizes natural survival goods over artificial substitutes

outfits.Dзян Янь: modern casual attire suitable for shopping

descriptions.relation: Customer and merchant interaction focused on bulk purchasing
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь purchases approximately 1,000 kg of various dried goods including truffles and bamboo mushrooms, spending millions without hesitation

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Spice and canned goods shop

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь seeks to stock up on essential condiments, marinades, pickled vegetables, stewed meats, and canned fruits to ensure a diverse and flavorful diet
descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of boxes required (5,000 per item) and the need to move quickly before closing time
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels satisfied and methodical, treating the shopping trip as a strategic mission rather than a leisure activity

outfits.Dзян Янь: modern casual attire suitable for shopping

descriptions.relation: Customer and shopkeeper transaction
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully purchases 5,000 boxes of each spice and canned good variety

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to acquire a large stock of self-heating meals and popular soups like Xiao Long Bao, spicy fish broth, and chicken pepper soup for future consumption
descriptions.conflict: Limited stock availability and the need to finalize purchases before evening
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels content and prepared, having satisfied her interest in snacks and meals

outfits.Dзян Янь: modern casual attire suitable for shopping

descriptions.relation: Customer and store employee interaction
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь buys 1,000 boxes of self-heating meals and various soup types, completing her snack and meal procurement

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь aims to secure a massive supply of snacks including biscuits, dried fruits, nuts, gummy candies, and chocolate to last through potential shortages
descriptions.conflict: The physical weight of 5,000 boxes per item and the fatigue from carrying such a large load
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels tired but joyful, reflecting on her past life where wealth did not prevent starvation, reinforcing her resolve to be prepared

outfits.Dзян Янь: modern casual attire suitable for shopping

descriptions.relation: Internal reflection on past failures and current preparedness
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь completes her snack purchases, feeling a sense of accomplishment and relief as evening approaches

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Street outside the market
location.description: near a small alleyway leading to a noodle shop

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь seeks a place to eat after her long shopping trip, following the shopkeeper's directions to a small alleyway noodle shop known for its beef noodles
descriptions.conflict: The shopkeeper warns that the place closes early at 4 PM and is run by a strict owner, adding urgency to her search
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels hungry and eager, appreciating the shopkeeper's helpfulness despite the humble surroundings

outfits.Dзян Янь: modern casual attire suitable for shopping; Shopkeeper=standard street vendor attire

props: Map or verbal directions to the alleyway
descriptions.relation: Helpful interaction between customer and shopkeeper
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь thanks the shopkeeper and hurries toward the alleyway, anticipating the legendary beef noodles

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Small alleyway noodle shop
location.description: cramped interior with a busy kitchen

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to order the famous beef noodle dish with extra meat, kimchi, and beef tendon, following her personal recipe preferences
descriptions.conflict: The shop is nearly empty except for the owner working in the kitchen, and the phone rings immediately after she sits down
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels excited about the food but slightly anxious about the phone call interrupting her meal

outfits.Dзян Янь: modern casual attire suitable for shopping

descriptions.relation: Customer and owner interaction, with the owner preparing the dish
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь places her order for beef noodles with specific additions, ready to enjoy the meal despite the interruption

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Inside the noodle shop
location.description: at her table with the phone ringing

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь intends to explain the large transactions to the bank manager, confirming that she personally made the purchases to avoid false alarms
descriptions.conflict: The bank's system flagged her massive spending as suspicious, requiring her to justify the unusual activity to prevent account freezes
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь remains calm and composed, viewing the bank's concern as a minor inconvenience compared to her survival preparations

outfits.Dзян Янь: modern casual attire suitable for shopping

descriptions.relation: Professional and reassuring interaction between customer and bank representative
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь confirms the transactions were legitimate, receives a formal warning, and hangs up the phone, relieved that she only paid an advance on her purchases

descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь заканчивает разговор с менеджером банка и решает оплатить только аванс, чтобы избежать блокировки средств

descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь добавляет приправы в лапшу и начинает есть

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет насладиться едой и не делиться открытием с подписчиками

descriptions.state: Дзян Янь чувствует удовлетворение от еды и разочарование из-за замороженного аккаунта

outfits.Дзян Янь: в маске, с сумкой для телефона

descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь полностью опустошает тарелку и восхищается вкусом лапши

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь заказывает тыся порций лапши и обсуждает условия оплаты
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет заказать большое количество лапши и обсудить условия оплаты
descriptions.conflict: Хозяйка отказывает в заказе из-за невозможности выполнить его сразу
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь чувствует растерянность, но быстро находит решение

descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь покидает лапшичную и отправляется на рынок лекарственных трав
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет закупить травы и другие компоненты для своих целей

descriptions.state: Дзян Янь чувствует усталость, но мотивирована своими целями

descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь перемещает приправы и основы для горячего горшка в своё магическое пространство

descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь отправляется домой на грузовичке
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет вернуться домой и отдохнуть
descriptions.conflict: Дзян Янь чувствует усталость и необходимость сэкономить деньги
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь чувствует удовлетворение от своих покупок и усталость

outfits.Дзян Янь: в маске, с сумкой для телефона

descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь и её грузовичок имеют нейтральные отношения
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь отправляется домой, чувствуя удовлетворение от своих покупок и усталость

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзянь Янь decides to stop purchasing Western medicines and equipment for later, closes current deals, and leaves the warehouse address before heading home in a truck due to depleted funds and exhaustion despite her strengthened body from spatial energy.

location.name: Road leading to her home
location.description: then inside her magical storage space

descriptions.intent: She aims to rest, organize her inventory, and manage her budget while preparing for the approaching apocalypse in three months.
descriptions.conflict: Financial constraints and physical fatigue hinder her ability to continue shopping, while the noise of water in her space confuses her.
descriptions.state: Exhausted but determined, she feels the need to maintain readiness and not rely entirely on her magical space.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She arrives home, takes a hot shower, dries her hair, and enters her magical space to begin organizing.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: Inside her magical storage space, Dзянь Янь effortlessly organizes previously transported goods onto gray shelves using only her mind to visualize their movement.

location.name: Magical storage space with gray shelving units

descriptions.intent: She plans to systematically fill the shelves with main products after finishing all purchases to ensure everything is accessible and to aid her limited memory.
descriptions.conflict: None, the process is surprisingly simple for her.
descriptions.state: Focused and efficient, she appreciates the convenience of the automated system for waste recognition and cleaning.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She organizes the shelves and decides to move her peacock-like chair and living room into the space later.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзянь Янь calculates her spending, noting she achieved 1.5 of her small goals but keeps food and Chinese herbs as top priorities despite high herb prices, while checking news about an earthquake in a country dumping polluted water and abnormal weather abroad.

location.name: Magical storage space
location.description: specifically the living area with a peacock-like chair

descriptions.intent: She wants to monitor global events and social media trends to understand public perception of her while managing her remaining budget.
descriptions.conflict: She faces aggressive online comments calling her a "star of disasters" and accusing her of bringing misfortune to her parents, which she ignores to avoid drawing more attention.
descriptions.state: Indifferent to online trolls, she accepts the chaos of the approaching apocalypse and focuses on her survival strategy.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She scrolls through comments about her being a valuable bride or a disaster star, dismisses them, and exits the social media feed.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: Despite reaching her purchase limit, Dзянь Янь adds new items to her cart, specifically buying various wigs and clothes of different styles to avoid detection by ubiquitous street cameras.

location.name: Magical storage space
location.description: then transitioning back to the real world

descriptions.intent: She intends to change her appearance frequently to avoid attracting attention from surveillance cameras and to prepare for a changing world.
descriptions.conflict: Her purchase limit is exhausted, yet she finds a way to acquire necessary disguises to maintain her anonymity.
descriptions.state: Cautious and strategic, she prioritizes adaptation and risk avoidance over comfort or convenience.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She spends two hours in the space, then returns to the real world, resolving not to depend on the space for her entire life.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзянь Янь reflects on her innate risk sensitivity and the loss of her parents, reinforcing her resolve to always be ready to retreat or abandon plans if necessary.
descriptions.intent: She aims to adapt to a world that will soon change and ensure her survival by maintaining flexibility and not relying solely on her magical space.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of whether the space will remain with her fuels her anxiety and drives her need for contingency plans.
descriptions.state: Anxious yet prepared, she values self-reliance and the ability to adapt to extreme circumstances.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She accepts the limitations of her current situation and prepares for the next day's mission.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: The next morning, Dзянь Янь travels to the location provided by Du Citen, exiting an old van wearing a Chinese trend sportswear outfit, which shocks Du Citen who expected her in a expensive Pogani car.
descriptions.intent: She intends to inspect the housing complex recommended by Du Citen and evaluate its suitability for her needs.
descriptions.conflict: The drastic change in her appearance and vehicle from yesterday to today causes confusion and surprise in Du Citen, who almost drops his jaw.
descriptions.state: Calm and composed, she remains unmoved by the shock of others and quickly addresses the situation.
descriptions.relation: Du Citen is surprised and confused by her sudden change in status and attire, while Dзянь Янь is indifferent.
descriptions.outcome: Du Citen quickly recovers, confirms the area is suitable, and points out the residential complex details.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: Du Citen describes the residential complex "Chang Shui Wan" (Shallow Bay), noting it has five houses divided into zones A through E, all renovated and built five years ago with good occupancy rates.

location.name: Entrance to the "Chang Shui Wan" residential complex

descriptions.intent: Dзянь Янь wants to visually inspect the district and verify the information provided about the housing options.
descriptions.conflict: None, the description matches her expectations for a safe and convenient living environment.
descriptions.state: Observant and analytical, she takes in the details of the complex's layout and amenities.
descriptions.relation: Du Citen acts as a guide, providing detailed information about the zones and building structures.
descriptions.outcome: Dзянь Янь surveys the area and approves the name of the complex, finding the name "Chang Shui Wan" pleasing.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзянь Янь continues to observe the complex, noting the 24-story buildings, the 32-story building A, ground-floor shops, and supermarkets, confirming the convenience of the location.

location.name: Ground level of the "Chang Shui Wan" residential complex

descriptions.intent: She seeks a place that offers convenience, safety, and a good living environment suitable for her long-term survival plans.
descriptions.conflict: None, the complex meets her criteria for a secure and well-equipped residence.
descriptions.state: Satisfied and decisive, she has found a suitable location for her future.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the district is suitable, the zones are clearly defined, and the name of the complex appeals to her, solidifying her decision to move there.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь surveys the residential complex named "Chang Shui Wan" (Shallow Bay), noting its 24-story buildings and a specific 32-story building A with shops on the ground floor.

location.name: The entrance and grounds of the Chang Shui Wan residential complex
location.description: featuring a small garden with a round pond containing dead algae and clotheslines strung between trees.

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to assess the suitability of the new complex and confirm the identity of the location based on its name evoking memories of a past flood.
descriptions.conflict: The environment shows signs of neglect like dead algae and laundry lines, which Dзяньянь initially dislikes but dismisses as irrelevant in the post-apocalyptic setting.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь feels a mix of curiosity about the name's meaning and nostalgia for a past traumatic flood event where she failed to evacuate.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь enters the complex after Дузытен swipes a card to grant her access, noting the low population density and the presence of only elderly people with children.

descriptions.title: Дузытен
descriptions.scene: Дузытен guides Dзяньянь through the complex grounds, explaining the history of a specific apartment in Building A that was bought for a wedding but is now being sold because the bride ran away.

location.name: The grounds of the Chang Shui Wan complex

descriptions.intent: Дузытен intends to show Dзяньянь the specific apartment she is interested in and discuss the sale of her old properties to help her finances.
descriptions.conflict: Дузытен feels internal conflict between his desire to ask about her financial situation and his fear of offending her or revealing his own agency's connection to her family.
descriptions.state: Дузытен feels anxious and hesitant, worrying about Dзяньянь's financial troubles and her sudden rush to sell her villa.
descriptions.relation: Дузытен becomes more concerned and protective of Dзяньянь, realizing her financial desperation.
descriptions.outcome: Дузытен admits the apartment in Building A has a troubled history and agrees to help sell Dзяньянь's old properties quickly to bridge the gap in her down payment.

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь reveals her urgent need to sell her villa and buy a penthouse, prompting Дузытен to ask if she has encountered a problem or needs financial help.

location.name: Inside the complex grounds
location.description: near the path to Building A.

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to secure a penthouse quickly before the predicted apocalypse in three months and needs to liquidate her assets immediately.
descriptions.conflict: Дузытен struggles to understand why she is rushing so much and worries she might be facing a crisis similar to the wealthy heiress trope in dramas.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь remains calm and smiling despite her urgency, while Дузытен feels a surge of anxiety and a desire to offer his own savings.
descriptions.relation: Дузытен expresses his willingness to help financially, though he downplays his own resources, while Dзяньянь reassures him of her trust in him.
descriptions.outcome: Дузытен agrees to help and Dзяньянь confirms she trusts him, leading to a moment of shared vulnerability where she mentions her father's illness and the family's support.

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь delivers a serious warning to Дузытен about a prophecy stating the world will end in three months and urges him to stock up on supplies.

location.name: The grounds of the Chang Shui Wan complex
location.description: likely near a vehicle or stopping point.

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь aims to prepare Дузытен for the impending apocalypse by convincing him to gather food, medicine, and other necessities.
descriptions.conflict: Дузытен is skeptical and confused by the prophecy, viewing it as a sign of mental instability caused by the death of her friend Лиджун, and tries to change the subject.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is serious and determined, while Дузытен feels a mix of disbelief, pity, and a desire to avoid upsetting her further.
descriptions.relation: Дузытен shifts from concern to a protective, almost pitying stance, deciding not to challenge her directly but to agree to her requests to keep the peace.
descriptions.outcome: Дузытен agrees to stock up on supplies like masks and ibuprofen, and Dзяньянь insists he listen to her seriously, marking a shift in their dynamic towards shared survival preparation.

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь and Дузытен arrive at Building E of the Qing Shui Wan complex, which is shaped like a pyramid with Building A at the very top.

location.name: The entrance to Building E of the Qing Shui Wan complex
location.description: a pyramid-shaped structure with a moving truck outside.

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to proceed with the move-in process and finalize the transaction for the penthouse.
descriptions.conflict: The scene is interrupted by the presence of a young woman in black with a small boy, creating a tense atmosphere as they approach the building.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь feels a sudden surge of anger upon seeing the woman, while Дузытен observes the scene with curiosity and caution.
props: leather furniture being carried by workers
descriptions.relation: Dзяньянь's anger towards the woman is immediate and intense, contrasting with Дузытен's observational stance.
descriptions.outcome: The arrival at the building reveals a moving truck and workers carrying leather furniture, setting the stage for a confrontation with the woman in black.

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь identifies the woman in black with the child as Джан Цици, the mistress of her uncle Суньдемин, and feels a surge of rage upon seeing her.

location.name: The entrance to Building E of the Qing Shui Wan complex.

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to confront Джан Цици and express her anger over the woman's presence and connection to her family.
descriptions.conflict: The emotional weight of seeing her uncle's mistress, who is also the mother of her child, creates a complex emotional conflict for Dзяньянь.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is filled with rage and shock, while Джан Цици appears distressed with red eyes and mourning ribbons on her hands.
descriptions.relation: Dзяньянь feels a strong emotional connection and anger towards Джан Цици, viewing her as a threat or a painful reminder of her past.
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends with Dзяньянь's intense emotional reaction to seeing Джан Цици, setting up a potential confrontation or emotional climax.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Джан Цици, Дудзен
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь observes a distressed woman, identified as her stepfather's mistress Jjan Qici, giving orders to workers while wearing black mourning ribbons on her arms and red-rimmed eyes.

location.name: A semi-flooded suburban house in a residential district
location.description: specifically near a freight elevator and stairwell

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь suppresses her urge for revenge against Jjan Qici, deciding to wait until the apocalypse occurs before acting, while planning her survival strategy.
descriptions.conflict: Dзяньянь feels internal rage towards Jjan Qici but is restrained by the current situation and the need to remain inconspicuous until the end times arrive.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is calm on the outside but internally conflicted, suppressing her desire for immediate retribution to focus on long-term survival plans.

outfits.Dзяньянь: face hidden under a mask and hat
outfits.clothing details not specified; Джан Циц: black mourning ribbons on arms, clothing details not specified

descriptions.relation: Dзяньянь recognizes Jjan Qici as her stepfather's mistress and feels a desire to punish her later; Дудзен shows indifference to Jjan Qici's behavior
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь decides to endure the current situation and wait for the apocalypse to execute her revenge plan, ignoring Jjan Qici's complaints about workers.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Дудзен
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь notices the freight elevator reaching the seventh floor and decides to inspect the adjacent stairwell, finding it dirty with cigarette butts, trash, and a smell of urine.

location.name: The stairwell next to the freight elevator on the seventh floor

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to check the condition of the stairwell as a potential escape route or observation point, anticipating that elevators might fail after the apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: The unpleasant smell and dirty conditions of the stairwell disgust Dзяньянь, causing her to immediately turn back without answering Дудзен's question about what happened.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is disgusted by the environment but maintains a calm exterior to avoid raising suspicion

outfits.Dзяньянь: face hidden under a mask and hat

descriptions.relation: Дудзен asks Dзяньянь what is wrong, showing concern, while Dзяньянь remains silent and evasive
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь lies to Дудзен that she was just inspecting the stairs and follows him into the passenger elevator to continue the apartment viewing.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Дудзен
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь and Дудзен inspect the apartment, which is about 120 square meters with four bedrooms and three living rooms, featuring south-north orientation and ready-made finishes including water, electricity, and gas.
descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь evaluates the apartment's suitability for her survival needs, considering the need to reinforce walls and the potential water level rise after the catastrophe.
descriptions.conflict: The apartment lacks furniture, and Dзяньянь considers buying the entire upper floor but decides against it to avoid drawing attention to herself.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is calculating and strategic, weighing the pros and cons of the apartment against her survival goals

outfits.Dзяньянь: face hidden under a mask and hat

descriptions.relation: Дудзен offers to show other options if this one doesn't suit, while Dзяньянь makes the final decision quickly
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь decides to buy the apartment immediately, noting that Jjan Qici lives on the seventh floor and she can observe her from above.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Дудзен
descriptions.scene: Дудзен asks Dзяньянь where she will stay since she sold her villa, offering her his home where his wife recently returned from culinary school.

location.name: The entrance area of the residential complex

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь needs a temporary place to stay while the apartment is being renovated, but she prefers to maintain her independence and privacy.
descriptions.conflict: Dзяньянь refuses the offer to stay at Дудзен's home, citing her hotel reservation at Intercontinental as a reason to avoid social interaction.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is determined to keep a low profile and avoid unnecessary social connections that could compromise her safety

outfits.Dзяньянь: face hidden under a mask and hat

descriptions.relation: Дудзен is friendly and inviting, while Dзяньянь is polite but firm in her refusal
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь declines the offer and instructs Дудзен to handle the formalities of the purchase and renovation arrangements.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь hires a well-known company for renovation and security system installation, focusing on heat insulation, fire and water protection, and soundproofing panels.
descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь prepares the apartment for long-term survival by reinforcing its defenses against the anticipated apocalypse conditions.
descriptions.conflict: The renovation tasks are extensive, requiring significant time and resources, but Dзяньянь is determined to complete them before the catastrophe.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is focused and resolute, prioritizing her survival needs over comfort or speed

outfits.Dзяньянь: face hidden under a mask and hat

descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь successfully secures the apartment and begins the process of transforming it into a fortified safe haven.

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь поручает Дудзете оформление сделки и поиск компании для ремонта, а также находит известную компанию для установки систем безопасности

location.name: офис или место встречи с компанией

descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет полностью подготовить помещение к жизни, укрепив его защиту и обеспечив комфорт
descriptions.conflict: необходимость выполнения сложных требований по ремонту и безопасности
descriptions.state: решительная и целеустремленная
descriptions.relation: Дзяньянь доверяет Дудзету формальности
descriptions.outcome: задачи ремонта определены, включая теплоизоляцию, защиту от огня и воды, а также шумоизоляцию

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Основные задачи ремонта включают укрепление теплоизоляции, защиту от огня и воды, установку шумоизоляционных панелей по всему периметру помещения
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет создать максимально защищенное и комфортное пространство
descriptions.conflict: необходимость выполнения сложных технических работ
descriptions.state: сосредоточенная на деталях
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: стены и потолок усилены металлическими элементами

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Входная дверь заменена на двойную из сверхпрочной стали, оконные стекла заменены на ударопрочные с теплоизоляцией, на пол установлена система подогрева
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить максимальную безопасность и комфорт
descriptions.conflict: необходимость замены всех элементов на более прочные
descriptions.state: требовательная к качеству
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: внешние стены снабжены технологическим отверстием для экстренных ситуаций

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Некоторые окна спальни и кабинета замурованы цементом и кирпичами
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет полностью изолировать эти помещения
descriptions.conflict: реакция ремонтной бригады на такие требования
descriptions.state: непреклонная
descriptions.relation: бригадира озадачивает решение Дзяньянь
descriptions.outcome: руководитель ремонтной бригады удивлен, но соглашается из-за щедрой оплаты

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь требует укрепить потолок и стены металлом, что ошеломляет опытных рабочих
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет создать максимально защищенное пространство
descriptions.conflict: нежелание рабочих выполнять такие сложные работы
descriptions.state: уверенная в своих требованиях
descriptions.relation: рабочие ошеломлены требованиями
descriptions.outcome: бригада согласилась выполнить заказ благодаря щедрой оплате

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь подписывает контракт с компанией по системам безопасности, требующей прочной и скрытой установки камер с резервным питанием
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить полную безопасность помещения
descriptions.conflict: необходимость скрытой установки камер
descriptions.state: внимательная к деталям
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: камеры установлены на 32, 31, 20, 7 этажах, внешних стенах гостиной, крыши и у входной двери

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь решает проблему привлечения внимания управляющей компании благодаря внушительному бюджету
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет избежать проблем с управляющей компанией
descriptions.conflict: необходимость скрытой установки камер
descriptions.state: уверенная в своих силах
descriptions.relation: переговоры с управляющим директором
descriptions.outcome: все формальности улажены, подписано соглашение о конфиденциальности

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь переключается на закупки мяса, молочных продуктов и медикаментов
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить себя свежими продуктами
descriptions.conflict: необходимость найти поставщиков, готовых работать с ней
descriptions.state: активная
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: закуплено 5 тонн говядины и свинины, 3 тонны баранины и курятины, а также по 1.000 кг утятины, гусятины и голубятины

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь заказывает тонну нарезок баранины, говядины, говяжьих сухожилий, утиных потрохов и других ингредиентов для горячего горшка
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет разнообразить свой рацион
descriptions.conflict: необходимость найти поставщиков, готовых работать с ней
descriptions.state: довольная выбором продуктов
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: закуплено 30.000 штук свежих куриных яиц, 8.000 утиной и гусятиной продукции, 10 тонн коровьего молока, 2 тонны овечьего и верблюжьего молока

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь закупает тысячу упаковок молочных напитков и йогуртов, а также по 5 тонн сливок и сыров
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить себя молочными продуктами
descriptions.conflict: необходимость найти поставщиков, готовых работать с ней
descriptions.state: довольная выбором продуктов
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: закупленные продукты отправляются на временное хранение в арендованные холодильные склады

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь закупает 3-5 тонн рыбы, креветок, крабов, молюсков и других даров моря
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет разнообразить свой рацион морепродуктами
descriptions.conflict: нерегулярные поставки
descriptions.state: терпеливая
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: процесс закупки отнимает около месяца

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь закупает сотню зарядных станций, небольших домашних ветряных генераторов и ручных динамо машин
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить себя источниками энергии
descriptions.conflict: необходимость найти поставщиков, готовых работать с ней
descriptions.state: активная
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: закуплено 10 больших аккумуляторных батарей и 300 беспроводных зарядных устройств

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь закупает 2.000 м² солнечных фотоэлектрических панелей за 40 млн юаний
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить себя источниками энергии
descriptions.conflict: высокая стоимость панелей
descriptions.state: решительная
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: панели предназначены для установки в пространственном хранилище

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь закупает по 500 тонн жидкого водородного топлива и природного газа
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить себя источниками энергии
descriptions.conflict: опасность хранения таких веществ
descriptions.state: тревожная
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь чувствует тревогу при размещении этих веществ в хранилище

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь закупает по 1 тысяче тонн различных видов бензина и дизеля, а также 500 тонн моторного масла и 10 тонн антифриза
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить себя источниками энергии
descriptions.conflict: необходимость найти поставщиков, готовых работать с ней
descriptions.state: активная
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: закуплено 1 тысяча тонн угля и древесного угля

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь закупает различные отопительные устройства: тепловентиляторы, электрические обогреватели, инфракрасные обогреватели, графеновые коврики, электроодеяла и другие виды оборудования
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет обеспечить себя источниками тепла
descriptions.conflict: необходимость найти поставщиков, готовых работать с ней
descriptions.state: активная
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: всего по 3.000 штук каждого вида оборудования

descriptions.title: Dzenian
descriptions.scene: Dzenian completes the purchase of massive winter fuel supplies including 1,000 tons of coal and wood during a cold winter
descriptions.intent: To secure sufficient heating resources and equipment like thermal ventilators, electric heaters, infrared heaters, graphene mats, and electric blankets, buying 3,000 units of each type to survive the harsh climate
descriptions.conflict: The extreme cold of the winter and the need to protect against freezing temperatures while managing limited resources in a chaotic world
descriptions.state: Determined and pragmatic, focusing on survival necessities rather than luxury
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Dzenian successfully acquires a vast array of heating devices and fuel to ensure warmth and comfort in her storage space.

descriptions.title: Dzenian
descriptions.scene: Dzenian purchases air filtration and water management equipment to protect against pollution and flooding
descriptions.intent: To secure 300 powerful air filters and purifiers for air protection, 50 pumps, and 20 dehumidifiers to handle potential flooding and high humidity levels
descriptions.conflict: The dual threats of air pollution and rising water levels in the post-apocalyptic environment
descriptions.state: Cautious and prepared, anticipating environmental hazards like floods and moisture
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Dzenian secures essential equipment to maintain air quality and manage water risks within her living and storage areas.

descriptions.title: Dzenian
descriptions.scene: Dzenian acquires large quantities of seeds, saplings, alcohol, and tobacco as currency and survival items
descriptions.intent: To stockpile seeds, saplings, and massive amounts of alcohol and tobacco which serve as currency and valuable trade goods in the chaos
descriptions.conflict: The unpredictability of the future and the need to have liquid assets that retain value when other systems fail
descriptions.state: Strategic and forward-thinking, recognizing the economic value of consumables
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Dzenian fills her storage with diverse alcohol and tobacco products, ranging from premium to budget options, acknowledging their role as "liquid gold" in the new world.

descriptions.title: Dzenian
descriptions.scene: Dzenian reflects on the value of alcohol and tobacco while organizing her storage supplies
descriptions.intent: To understand the economic necessity of stocking alcohol and tobacco as they become true currency in the chaos
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of future events and the potential need to trade these items for essential goods
descriptions.state: Reflective and serious about the harsh realities of survival
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Dzenian finishes organizing her alcohol and tobacco reserves, realizing that these items are vital for trade and survival in the unpredictable future.

descriptions.title: Dzenian
descriptions.scene: Dzenian shifts focus to clothing, dividing her purchases into daily wear and specialized gear
descriptions.intent: To acquire 10,000 sets of practical daily clothing and specialized protective gear including active wear, insulated jackets, thermal underwear, heat/cold protection suits, and anti-radiation masks
descriptions.conflict: The need to balance comfort with protection against extreme temperatures and radiation while avoiding conspicuous branding
descriptions.state: Practical and cautious, prioritizing function over fashion
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Dzenian selects unobtrusive models in black, white, and gray to avoid attracting attention while ensuring comprehensive protection.

descriptions.title: Dzenian
descriptions.scene: Dzenian purchases all sizes of clothing and household textiles to prepare for physical changes and basic needs
descriptions.intent: To buy all sizes of clothing from small to extra-large to account for potential body changes and to stock bedding, mattresses, and mosquito nets
descriptions.conflict: The need to prepare for physical changes and the necessity of having bedding and shelter for outdoor stays
descriptions.state: Thorough and prepared, considering every possible scenario for her body and living conditions
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Dzenian secures a complete wardrobe and bedding inventory, including tents and nets, to handle various living situations and physical changes.

descriptions.title: Dzenian
descriptions.scene: Dzenian visits pharmacies to purchase radiation protection drugs and common illness medications
descriptions.intent: To buy 3,000 bottles of Potassium Iodide and 1,000 bottles of Prussian Blue for radiation protection, plus medicines for colds, fevers, and stomach issues

descriptions.state: Satisfied and content as she continues her shopping, feeling confident in her ability to prepare for the future.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She purchases 6 tons of each major vegetable, 1 ton of less popular vegetables, 5,000 kg of each spice, and 10,000 kg of each fruit, ensuring a well-stocked pantry for the long term.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь

She also manages to exchange a few million dollars using available channels, with her black card supporting automatic currency conversion up to a limit of about 4 million USD.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь

descriptions.state: Excited and eager as she prepares for her trip, looking forward to exploring new places and cultures.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She orders 30,000 ready-made dishes from various restaurants and 8,000 cups of milk tea, preparing her space for her upcoming trip to Canada. She also ensures that her space is well-stocked with a variety of food and beverages to sustain her during her travels.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь

descriptions.intent: She intends to travel to Canada to purchase a large quantity of goods before her visa expires, taking advantage of the country's proximity to the United States and its large Chinese population.
descriptions.conflict: She must manage jet lag and the fatigue caused by long flights, although she has adapted to these challenges over time.
descriptions.state: Tired but determined, she is ready to embark on her next adventure, confident in her ability to handle the challenges of international travel.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She boards her flight to Canada, choosing this destination due to its large Chinese population and proximity to the United States, which will make it easier for her to purchase the goods she needs. She also reflects on her past travels and the reasons for choosing Canada, feeling excited about the opportunities that await her in this new location.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь arrives in Vancouver, her first stop in Canada, and begins her shopping spree in this city.

location.name: Vancouver
location.description: Canada, a city known for its large Chinese population and proximity to the United States.

descriptions.intent: She intends to purchase a large quantity of goods in Vancouver, taking advantage of the city's large Chinese population and proximity to the United States.
descriptions.conflict: She must navigate the city and find the best deals on the goods she needs, while also managing her time and energy.
descriptions.state: Excited and eager as she begins her shopping spree in Vancouver, looking forward to finding the best deals on the goods she needs.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She arrives in Vancouver, her first stop in Canada, and begins her shopping spree in this city. She purchases a used iPhone and several anonymous SIM cards, preparing to place an anonymous warning on several well-known Chinese websites about an impending natural disaster in early August.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь visits a café in Vancouver, orders a cold Americano, and begins placing anonymous warnings on Chinese websites.

location.name: A café in Vancouver
location.description: Canada, where she orders a cold Americano and accesses Chinese websites.

descriptions.intent: She intends to place an anonymous warning on several well-known Chinese websites about an impending natural disaster in early August, alerting people to prepare for the coming disaster.
descriptions.conflict: She must ensure that her warning is received and acted upon by the people she wants to warn, while also maintaining her anonymity.
descriptions.state: Serious and focused as she places her warning, determined to help others prepare for the coming disaster.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She orders a cold Americano and accesses several well-known Chinese websites, placing an anonymous warning about an impending natural disaster in early August. She hopes that her warning will be received and acted upon by the people she wants to warn, helping them prepare for the coming disaster.

descriptions.relation: None

descriptions.title: Janyan

descriptions.state: Impulsive yet calculated, seizing opportunities to maximize resource control

descriptions.title: Janyan

descriptions.state: Cautious but confident, leveraging her background and financial resources to bypass bureaucratic barriers
props: 15 billion yuan transferred via special channels
descriptions.relation: Security agency, arms dealers

descriptions.title: Janyan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of weapons and the financial cost test her resolve, but her preparedness and funds allow her to proceed without hesitation
descriptions.state: Amused and satisfied, having successfully completed her most dangerous procurement mission
descriptions.relation: Friendly banter between buyer and seller, mutual respect for the transaction

descriptions.title: Джан Янь

descriptions.conflict: Prescription drugs are strictly regulated both abroad and at home, limiting her ability to acquire them in large quantities.
descriptions.state: Concerned for health and safety, she prioritizes medical readiness despite regulatory hurdles.
descriptions.relation: N/A

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзянь Янь intends to return home after purchasing medical supplies and depleting most of her funds, hoping to avoid the impending catastrophe predicted for August 8th
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat in Anmin exceeds weather forecasts, causing her anxiety about the apocalypse starting earlier than expected, while her social media warnings are being censored or mocked by the public
descriptions.state: Exhausted from travel, physically weakened, and mentally tense due to the abnormal heat and the strange behavior of the public
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She arrives at the airport, boards a transfer car, and observes the dangerously high temperature of 38°C on the dashboard, confirming the abnormality

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь, Driver
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: The driver asks about the air conditioning comfort while navigating the highway, while Дзянь Янь checks her phone to monitor the public reaction to her apocalypse warnings
descriptions.conflict: The driver is polite but the car's AC cannot cool the 38°C heat, and Дзянь Янь sees her posts being deleted or mocked, with some users dismissing her warnings as pranks or noting their own spoiled rice stocks
descriptions.state: Distracted, worried about the heat, and frustrated by the public's disbelief and the censorship of her posts
descriptions.relation: Professional courtesy between VIP passenger and driver
descriptions.outcome: Дзянь Янь confirms the heat is normal for her, but the driver notices the temperature is abnormal, and she continues reading the comments on her posts

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь

descriptions.conflict: A sudden collision occurs, causing the car to swerve and brake hard, throwing Дзянь Янь forward against her seatbelt
descriptions.state: Shocked and physically jolted by the impact, then frozen in fear upon seeing the aftermath
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The car stops abruptly, and Дзянь Янь realizes she is safe due to the seatbelt, but the driver apologizes for the scare and prepares to exit the vehicle

descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: The driver intends to inspect the front of the car and the creature that caused the collision
descriptions.conflict: The driver is startled by the impact and must quickly assess the situation while Дзянь Янь stares in horror at the creature on the road
descriptions.state: The driver is apologetic and cautious; Дзянь Янь is horrified and paralyzed by fear

outfits.Driver: white shirt, black trousers, white gloves

descriptions.relation: Driver is concerned for the passenger's safety and the vehicle's integrity
descriptions.outcome: The driver puts on sunglasses, sets up a warning triangle, and steps out to investigate the strange creature that crashed into the windshield

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзянь Янь observes the creature on the road and the damage to the windshield
descriptions.conflict: The creature is still weak but bleeding, and the damage to the car is severe, with black bamboo-like limbs protruding from the wound
descriptions.state: Terrified and frozen, unable to move or speak due to the shock of seeing the creature
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Дзянь Янь sees the creature lying on the road, bleeding and twitching, and realizes the danger of the situation

descriptions.title: Dзянь Янь, Driver
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: The driver intends to check the creature and assess the damage to the car
descriptions.conflict: The creature is unknown and dangerous, and the driver must decide whether to approach it or retreat
descriptions.state: The driver is cautious and apologetic, while Дзянь Янь is terrified and waiting for the driver's return

outfits.Driver: white shirt, black trousers, white gloves

descriptions.relation: Driver is trying to protect the passenger and the car

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan, Driver
