She must balance her desire for revenge with the practical danger of the weapon and the timing of the insect attack.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь feels determined and resolute, having made up her mind to stop the bullying immediately. She is confident in her ability to handle the situation with the chainsaw, masking her fear with a calculated and cunning demeanor. Her emotional state shifts from passive victimhood to active aggression, fueled by the need to protect her dignity and safety. She feels a surge of satisfaction upon activating the weapon, believing it gives her the upper hand. Her resolve is hardened by the realization that hiding is no longer an option.

descriptions.title: Хэтчум
descriptions.scene: Хэтчум, собиравшаяся ругаться с супругами, мгновенно закрывает рот, наблюдая нелепую сцену

location.name: Вход в здание
location.description: перед лифтом, где происходит конфронтация с толпой

descriptions.intent: Хэтчум хочет прекратить абсурдную сцену и избежать дальнейшего конфликта
descriptions.conflict: Нелепость ситуации и присутствие агрессивно настроенной толпы мешают ей действовать
descriptions.state: Испугана и ошеломлена происходящим
descriptions.relation: Хэтчум и Судай наблюдают за ситуацией
descriptions.outcome: Хэтчум понимает, что вмешиваться не стоит, и молчит

descriptions.title: Судай
descriptions.scene: Судай наблюдает за Хэтчум и тихо пробормотает мужу, затем тянет его к пожарной лестнице
descriptions.intent: Судай хочет избежать участия в фарсе и уходит от конфликта
descriptions.conflict: Толпа готовится окружить их, но вмешательство новой фигуры меняет ситуацию
descriptions.state: Раздражена и решительна
descriptions.relation: Судай и её муж действуют вместе
descriptions.outcome: Они пытаются уйти, но ситуация меняется

descriptions.title: Дзянь
descriptions.scene: Дзянь выходит из лифта с огромной бензопилой, заставляя толпу отступать
descriptions.intent: Дзянь хочет защитить себя и свой путь домой
descriptions.conflict: Толпа пытается окружить её, но бензопила пугает их
descriptions.state: Агрессивна и угрожающая
descriptions.relation: Дзянь доминирует над толпой
descriptions.outcome: Толпа отступает, испуганная бензопилой

descriptions.title: Хэтчун Мей
descriptions.scene: Хэтчун Мей вытирает подсолнух и шепотом говорит Джан Цицы о бензопиле
descriptions.intent: Хэтчун Мей пытается оценить ситуацию и дать знак остальным
descriptions.conflict: Бензопила Дзянь разрушает их план разоблачения
descriptions.state: Задумчива и насторожена
descriptions.relation: Хэтчун Мей и Джан Цицы обсуждают ситуацию
descriptions.outcome: Хэтчун Мей дает знак остальным, но план рушится

descriptions.title: Джан Цицы
descriptions.scene: Джан Цицы выходит вперед, пытаясь поговорить спокойно с Дзянь Янь
descriptions.intent: Джан Цицы хочет поговорить спокойно и избежать конфликта
descriptions.conflict: Дзянь Янь бросает на её плечо тяжелую бензопилу
descriptions.state: Испугана и напугана
descriptions.relation: Джан Цицы и Дзянь Янь вступают в конфликт
descriptions.outcome: Джан Цицы вздрагивает и бледнеет от холода металла у горла

descriptions.title: Маленький Сун Соафей
descriptions.scene: Маленький Сун Соафей подбегает к Дзянь Янь и умоляет её не обижать маму
descriptions.intent: Маленький Сун Соафей хочет защитить маму и попросить пощады
descriptions.conflict: Дзянь Янь угрожает Джан Цицы бензопилой
descriptions.state: Испуган и плачет
descriptions.relation: Маленький Сун Соафей и Дзянь Янь вступают в эмоциональный контакт
descriptions.outcome: Маленький Сун Соафей умоляет Дзянь Янь не обижать маму

descriptions.title: Джан Цицы
descriptions.scene: Джан Цицы признается в своей ошибке и просит пощады
descriptions.intent: Джан Цицы хочет объяснить свою ошибку и попросить пощады
descriptions.conflict: Дзянь Янь продолжает угрожать и не верит в слова Джан Цицы
descriptions.state: Испугана и растеряна
descriptions.relation: Джан Цицы и Дзянь Янь вступают в эмоциональный конфликт
descriptions.outcome: Джан Цицы признается в своей ошибке и просит пощады

descriptions.title: Дзянь Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзянь Янь угрожает толпе и объясняет, почему они не должны вмешиваться
descriptions.intent: Дзянь Янь хочет защитить себя и свой путь домой
descriptions.conflict: Толпа пытается вмешаться и записать происходящее
descriptions.state: Агрессивна и решительна
descriptions.relation: Дзянь Янь доминирует над толпой
descriptions.outcome: Толпа распускается, испуганная угрозами Дзянь Янь

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan feels the wave of anger and hatred radiating from Jiang CiCi despite wearing sunglasses, realizing the heat and fear are clouding CiCi's mind.

location.name: Stairwell landing with surveillance cameras installed

descriptions.intent: Dzhan Yan intends to punish Jiang CiCi for her previous behavior and assert dominance over her.
descriptions.conflict: The heat and fear create a thick fog in Jiang CiCi's mind, hindering her ability to think clearly while Dzhan Yan prepares to strike.
descriptions.state: Dzhan Yan is calm but dangerous, while Jiang CiCi is terrified and confused about the source of the threat.

outfits.Dzhan Yan: implied casual attire suitable for holding a chainsaw; Jiang CiCi=implied casual clothing, hair described as thick burgundy

descriptions.relation: Tension escalates as Dzhan Yan decides to use the saw against CiCi
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan lifts the chainsaw from CiCi's shoulder, causing CiCi to breathe a sigh of relief before the saw suddenly roars back to life.

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan raises the roaring chainsaw and swiftly directs it toward Jiang CiCi's ear in front of all witnesses.
descriptions.intent: Dzhan Yan aims to inflict a severe lesson on Jiang CiCi by threatening her ear with the spinning blade.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang CiCi screams hysterically and closes her eyes, while Sun Xiaofei rushes to his mother in tears, fearing for their lives.
descriptions.state: Jiang CiCi is in extreme panic and distress, sweating profusely, while Dzhan Yan remains cold and focused on her goal.
descriptions.relation: Heichunmei watches in horror, unable to intervene, while Sun Xiaofei clings to his mother
descriptions.outcome: The blade stops just a millimeter from CiCi's ear, cutting a few strands of her thick burgundy hair which swirls around her head like a cloud.

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan turns off the chainsaw and looks indifferently at Sun Xiaofei before addressing Jiang CiCi again.
descriptions.intent: Dzhan Yan delivers a final warning to Jiang CiCi, stating that her punishment is complete and she must leave.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang CiCi remains silent and shaken, unable to respond to the threat or the situation's absurdity in a legal state.
descriptions.state: Dzhan Yan feels a mix of satisfaction and indifference, while Jiang CiCi is left reeling from the near-death experience.
descriptions.relation: Dzhan Yan's cold gaze shifts from the boy back to CiCi, emphasizing her control over the situation
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan declares her goal achieved and orders CiCi to leave, threatening that her next encounter might not be so lucky.

descriptions.title: Jiang CiCi
descriptions.scene: Jiang CiCi supports Sun Xiaofei by the hand and rushes down the stairs, trying to escape the scene.
descriptions.intent: Jiang CiCi wants to get away from Dzhan Yan and protect her son from further harm.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat exhausts her, making it difficult to run, but she forces herself to keep moving forward.
descriptions.state: Jiang CiCi is exhausted and terrified, holding back her breathing as she flees the confrontation.
descriptions.relation: Mother and son share a moment of fear and reliance as they escape together
descriptions.outcome: They successfully leave the stairwell, leaving Dzhan Yan alone in the space.

descriptions.title: Heichunmei
descriptions.scene: Heichunmei apologizes to Dzhan Yan and runs away following her husband after the confrontation ends.
descriptions.intent: Heichunmei wants to apologize for the disturbance and avoid further conflict with Dzhan Yan.
descriptions.conflict: She feels guilty for not being able to properly say goodbye and fears Dzhan Yan's reaction.
descriptions.state: Heichunmei is flustered and regretful, trying to de-escalate the situation quickly.
descriptions.relation: Heichunmei seeks forgiveness, while Dzhan Yan watches her leave with indifference
descriptions.outcome: Heichunmei flees the scene, leaving Dzhan Yan alone to reflect on the events.

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan watches Heichunmei leave, then returns to her apartment without saying a word.

location.name: Stairwell landing transitioning to Dzhan Yan's apartment

descriptions.intent: Dzhan Yan wants to retreat to her safe space and process the events of the day.
descriptions.conflict: None, as she is alone and in control of her movements.
descriptions.state: Dzhan Yan is calm and contemplative, analyzing the situation and her own capabilities.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan enters her apartment, ready to reflect on the challenges ahead.

descriptions.title: Chunm
descriptions.scene: Chunm observes the closing door of Dzhan Yan's apartment and comments on the power of the descent.
descriptions.intent: Chunm wants to understand the significance of Dzhan Yan's actions and the space she inhabits.
descriptions.conflict: None, as he is merely observing and reflecting.
descriptions.state: Chunm is thoughtful and slightly awed by the events that just transpired.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Chunm acknowledges the gradual effects of the space on Dzhan Yan's physical form and mental state.

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan reflects on her need to improve her physical abilities and prepare for the apocalypse.
descriptions.intent: Dzhan Yan plans to continue training and preparing for the challenges of the coming apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: She recognizes that her current strength is not enough to face the full extent of the apocalypse's threats.
descriptions.state: Dzhan Yan is determined and realistic about the dangers ahead, refusing to rely solely on her mysterious space.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan resolves to become stronger and more self-reliant, acknowledging that survival will require more than just food supplies.

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan decides to relax for the day after completing her preparations and reflecting on her goals.
descriptions.intent: Dzhan Yan wants to take a break and enjoy a moment of peace before facing the next day's challenges.
descriptions.conflict: None, as she has made a conscious decision to prioritize rest and mental clarity.
descriptions.state: Dzhan Yan feels a sense of accomplishment and readiness to face the future with renewed energy.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan allows herself to relax, knowing that tomorrow will bring new plans and challenges to address.

descriptions.title: Дзянья Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Living room
location.description: 32nd floor apartment with double-glazed windows and privacy film

descriptions.intent: Дзянья Янь decides to relax after planning to become strong for survival, drinking chilled coconut water and checking the thermometer which shows 57°
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and power outage warnings create a tense atmosphere as she considers the severity of the situation
descriptions.state: She feels a mix of relaxation and underlying concern about the global crisis
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to investigate the crowd gathering in the courtyard below using a powerful binocular

descriptions.title: Дзянья Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She wants to understand why so many people are gathering in the courtyard despite the heat and mosquito threat
descriptions.conflict: The intense sunlight and double-glazed windows limit her view, requiring her to use equipment to see clearly
descriptions.state: Curious and slightly worried about the crowd's lack of fear
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She adjusts the binocular focus and looks down at the courtyard to identify the people and their purpose

descriptions.title: Дзянья Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She observes the group of officials and management staff moving towards the underground garage
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat makes everyone look flushed and uncomfortable, yet they proceed with purpose
descriptions.state: Surprised and analytical as she tries to deduce the reason for their actions
descriptions.relation: Officials are communicating with each other and management staff
descriptions.outcome: She deduces that the underground garage might be converted into a heat shelter due to the power outage and extreme temperatures

descriptions.title: Дзянья Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She questions why the authorities are personally present instead of just notifying residents via phone
descriptions.conflict: The complexity of the situation involving 500 apartments and sold parking spaces makes the decision-making process unclear to her
descriptions.state: Confused and skeptical about the necessity of such a large-scale operation
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She continues to analyze the situation, noting that the complex is on a high ground with stable soil and built by a state company

descriptions.title: Дзянья Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She considers the implications of converting parking spaces into shelters and the challenges of moving cars
descriptions.conflict: The fact that most parking spaces are sold or rented makes the conversion difficult and raises questions about resident cooperation
descriptions.state: Thoughtful and concerned about the logistical challenges
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She reflects on the usual methods of resolving such issues and wonders why this situation requires such a dramatic response

descriptions.title: Дзянья Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She evaluates the advantages of her apartment's location and construction quality in the context of the crisis
descriptions.conflict: The usual benefits of her apartment's location and construction are overshadowed by the current emergency
descriptions.state: Realizing that her apartment's features are not as significant as she thought in this crisis
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the current situation highlights the importance of preparedness and the limitations of her usual advantages

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь reflects on the stability of the construction site and the potential foresight of officials regarding the upcoming rain season.

location.name: A garage leading to a building with underground passages
location.description: situated in a district with stable soil built by a state company

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь stops dwelling on the mystery of the officials' foresight and decides to focus on preparing a celebratory dinner to mark her successful stockpiling before the catastrophe.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the future weather and the mystery of the officials' knowledge hinder her peace of mind, but she chooses to move forward.
descriptions.state: She is relieved and ready to celebrate her achievement, shifting from worry to anticipation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to stop overthinking and prepares to enter the building, leaving the binoculars behind.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь decides to treat herself to a special dinner after successfully restocking supplies before the disaster.
descriptions.intent: She wants to celebrate her victory over the chaos by preparing a lavish meal, specifically choosing a high-end restaurant menu to enjoy later.
descriptions.conflict: The simple lunch of sesame noodle soup she just ate contrasts with her desire for a grand celebration, requiring her to source high-quality ingredients and equipment.
descriptions.state: She feels satisfied with her preparations and excited about the upcoming feast.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She retrieves expensive wine and crystalware from her spatial storage, along with candelabras and a tablecloth, setting the stage for a grand dinner.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь prepares the dining table and enjoys a relaxing bath before the meal.
descriptions.intent: She aims to create a solemn and festive atmosphere by arranging the table with fine linens and lighting, then refreshes herself in a pink bath.
descriptions.conflict: The need to balance the elaborate table setting with personal relaxation before the main event.
descriptions.state: She is calm and focused on creating the perfect ambiance for her celebration.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She pours the wine for aeration, enjoys a relaxing bath, dries her hair, and changes into a light silk dress.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь returns to the dining table and admires the wine and the setting while observing the dark, hot outside world.
descriptions.intent: She intends to savor the aroma of the aged wine and the festive atmosphere she has created.
descriptions.conflict: The outside world is dark, hot (58°C), and filled with giant mosquitoes and distressed neighbors, contrasting sharply with her peaceful interior.
descriptions.state: She is serene and appreciative of her safety and luxury, viewing the outside chaos as a brief background episode.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She closes the curtains via smartphone, finalizing the decision to order a specific menu from a "Black Pearl" rated restaurant.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь summons a lavish dinner consisting of multiple high-end dishes using her spatial storage.
descriptions.intent: She wants to enjoy a feast that includes rare cuts of meat, seafood, and desserts, served with original restaurant ware to maintain aesthetic standards.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of dishes and the need to maintain their freshness and heat without cooking them fresh presents a logistical challenge, though her spatial storage solves it.
descriptions.state: She is meticulous and proud of her culinary background as a former food blogger.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: All the ordered dishes appear on the table with small, elegant portions, ready to be eaten without reheating.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь enjoys her dinner with blue music, savoring each bite as a celebration of her survival.
descriptions.intent: She aims to fully immerse herself in the experience of eating, treating the meal as a victory celebration against the external chaos.
descriptions.conflict: The contrast between her peaceful dining and the implied suffering outside is acknowledged but does not disturb her enjoyment.
descriptions.state: She is relaxed, happy, and grateful for her ability to feast while others struggle.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finishes her meal, cleans the dishes in an automatic machine, and prepares to transition to entertainment.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь turns on the news and attempts to play the game "King of Glory" despite the extreme heat affecting her phone.
descriptions.intent: She wants to watch the news and play her favorite game, hoping to find a match despite the server issues and her phone overheating.
descriptions.conflict: The servers are empty, and her phone is overheating to the point of being unusable (60°C), making it difficult to find a match or play normally.
descriptions.state: She is patient but slightly frustrated by the technical difficulties and the extreme heat.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: After a long wait, she finally finds a match, but her teammates play suspiciously well, leading her to suspect they are bots or cheaters.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь experiences an unprecedented streak of luck in the game, winning every match and earning MVP titles.
descriptions.intent: She hopes to enjoy a normal gaming session and perhaps prove her skill despite the heat and bot-like teammates.
descriptions.conflict: The suspicion that she is playing against bots or that her teammates are cheating undermines her confidence in the game's integrity.
descriptions.state: She is surprised by her sudden success and confused by the nature of her opponents.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Every match ends in her victory with her receiving the MVP title, marking a bizarre and lucky turn of events in the game.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: The protagonist reflects on her gaming session where she defeated bots and won MVP titles despite the extreme heat of 60°C, which caused her phone to overheat significantly.

location.name: A gaming room or living space where the temperature is extremely high

descriptions.intent: She enjoys the game and finds bots more useful than human teammates, seeking entertainment and victory in the harsh conditions.
descriptions.conflict: The intense heat of 60°C without air conditioning threatens her electronic devices and general comfort, making the environment hostile.
descriptions.state: She feels a sense of satisfaction and relief from her gaming success, contrasting with the external chaos.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She experiences a rare streak of luck and enjoyment before the power outage disrupts her routine.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: At 10:00 PM, a sharp click signals the sudden loss of electricity, plunging the entire city into darkness and causing street lamps to fail.

location.name: The city
location.description: specifically residential complexes where residents react to the sudden blackout.

descriptions.intent: She observes the event but remains calm, having prepared her private space earlier in the day.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden darkness and heat cause panic among residents, with cries, curses, and banging on metal basins creating chaos.
descriptions.state: She remains composed while others panic, having already secured her private sanctuary.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The city descends into darkness and chaos, with some residents using flashlights, laptops, or melting candles due to the heat.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: Residents on upper floors lose water supply simultaneously with the power outage, while those on lower floors continue activities in dim light as the temperature rises further.

location.name: Residential buildings
location.description: specifically upper floors versus lower floors

descriptions.intent: She ensures her private space is comfortable and secure, avoiding attention from the outside world.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of electricity and water exacerbates the heat, leading to growing panic and fear among the population.
descriptions.state: She feels safe and in control within her private space, contrasting with the fear outside.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Panic grows as the temperature continues to rise and the darkness intensifies the fear among people.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: Despite the Wi-Fi signal loss, mobile communication remains available due to battery backups and cooling compressors at base stations, but residents fear total communication loss if batteries drain.
descriptions.intent: She checks her intrusion protection system and confirms it works, then retreats to her private space.
descriptions.conflict: The chat group explodes with messages, complaints, and demands for backup power, with some seeking medicine or alcohol.
descriptions.state: She feels reassured by her system's functionality and chooses to stay hidden in her private space.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The chat group becomes a battleground of complaints and rumors, while she remains calm and isolated.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: Representatives of the property management company post a message in the chat group around midnight, announcing that backup generators will not be connected to residential floors due to grid overload risks.
descriptions.intent: She decides to stay in the shadows and not draw attention, accepting the first night without electricity.
descriptions.conflict: The official announcement explains the blackout as a protective measure against grid overload, with underground parking used for cooling.
descriptions.state: She feels resigned to the situation and comfortable in her private space.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Residents are warned to remove cars by 8:00 AM due to giant mosquitoes and informed that bomb shelters will open the next day.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: The property management company announces that bomb shelters and civil shelters in Anmin City will open the next day with food and water supplies, requiring pre-registration to prevent chaos.

location.name: Anmin City
location.description: specifically bomb shelters and civil shelters

descriptions.intent: She remains unaware of these announcements, focusing on her private space's comfort and ambiance.
descriptions.conflict: The need for registration creates a barrier to accessing essential resources, and many residents cannot sleep due to the heat.
descriptions.state: She feels peaceful and insulated from the outside world's struggles.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The chat group continues to buzz with complaints and criticism of the property management, while she remains oblivious.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: In her private space, which is always sunny but now shaded by blackout curtains, she enjoys the scent of mugwort incense and cozy bedding, creating an ideal environment despite the external heat.

location.name: Her private space/capsule
location.description: equipped with blackout curtains and automated home systems

descriptions.intent: She seeks comfort and relaxation, planning to plant flowers and potentially get a pet in the future.
descriptions.conflict: Her past trauma from her parents' death makes her hesitant to form attachments to living creatures with short lifespans.
descriptions.state: She feels calm, relaxed, and ready to sleep after two months of turmoil and drinking wine.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She quickly falls asleep, finding peace in her private sanctuary while the outside world suffers.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: At 7:30 AM the next day, automatic curtains slowly open to let sunlight create romantic patterns on the room, and she stretches lazily before getting up.
descriptions.intent: She contemplates planting flowers in the black soil around her and considers getting a small pet like a yellow-winged parrot.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal doubts about forming attachments due to her parents' death linger, preventing immediate action on her plans.
descriptions.state: She feels lazy and contemplative, balancing her desire for companionship with her fear of loss.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to plant flowers in the near future but postpones getting a pet due to her emotional reservations.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь prepares breakfast and coffee with Baijiu after morning routines.

location.name: Dзян Янь's apartment kitchen
location.description: described as a space with monitoring cameras and chat access

descriptions.intent: She plans a day of fitness, shooting, and learning to operate an excavator and yacht, starting with checking security cameras and resident chat for news.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal fear of attachment to short-lived beings clashes with her desire for a normal day, while a stranger approaches her door.
descriptions.state: Calm but internally conflicted about emotional attachments, slightly distracted by the morning heat and the stranger's presence.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She checks the monitoring system and sees a man approaching her door, triggering a security alert.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь identifies the approaching man as Джан Цимин, the property committee chairman and chat administrator.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to ignore the stranger, while Джан Цимин seeks to communicate with her about an important matter.
descriptions.conflict: Джан Цимин's sweaty, disheveled appearance and persistent knocking contrast with Dзян Янь's desire for privacy and her decision to block his calls.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is wary and annoyed; Джан Цимин is desperate and frustrated by the heat and her silence.
descriptions.relation: Strangers with a brief formal acquaintance from the apartment purchase process
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь blocks his call, and Джан Цимин realizes she is home but chooses not to answer, leading him to knock on the door.

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цимин knocks on Dзян Янь's door and receives an electric shock from her low-voltage protection system.
descriptions.intent: Джан Цимин wants to enter or at least get her attention to discuss an important matter.
descriptions.conflict: The door's electrical protection system delivers a painful shock to his sweaty hand, preventing him from entering or knocking again.
descriptions.state: Джан Цимин is shocked, in pain, and disoriented by the unexpected electric shock.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Джан Цимин is burned and shocked, unable to knock again, and cries out in pain while trying to explain his situation.

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цимин calls out to Dзян Янь, claiming her phone is off and offering to charge it with portable batteries.
descriptions.intent: Джан Цимин wants to convince Dзян Янь to open the door and engage with him.
descriptions.conflict: Dзян Янь ignores his pleas, and his offer to charge her phone is seen as a cheap pick-up line by him.
descriptions.state: Джан Цимин is frustrated, confused, and trying to rationalize the electric shock as something other than a standard spark.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь turns off the monitor sound and pretends to be absent, while Джан Цимин realizes the shock was real and not static electricity.

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цимин speculates that Dзян Янь is in her bedroom and stops trying to knock, eventually deciding to leave.
descriptions.intent: Джан Цимин wants to give up and leave after realizing his attempts are futile.
descriptions.conflict: His frustration and the heat make him want to leave, but his curiosity and determination keep him from walking away immediately.
descriptions.state: Джан Цимин is irritated, defeated, and considering leaving the scene.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Джан Цимин turns around with an irritated expression and heads toward the stairs, ending his attempt to reach Dзян Янь for now.

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan pretends to be absent while turning off her monitor sound
descriptions.intent: She wants to avoid further confrontation with Dzhan by feigning absence
descriptions.conflict: Dzhan continues to shout outside, refusing to accept her silence
descriptions.state: Irritated and trying to maintain composure despite the noise
descriptions.relation: Tension between Dzhan Yan and Dzhan
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan successfully ignores him, but Dzhan assumes she is in the bedroom

descriptions.title: Dzhan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan shouts again and then decides to leave
descriptions.intent: He wants to get a response or force her to open the door
descriptions.conflict: She refuses to answer, leading to his frustration
descriptions.state: Annoyed and impatient
descriptions.relation: Frustration with Dzhan Yan's silence
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan decides to go to the stairs and leave

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: Hechunmei opens the door and greets Dzhan
descriptions.intent: She wants to borrow a charger and greet Dzhan
descriptions.conflict: None initially, but Dzhan mocks her behavior
descriptions.state: Cheerful and curious
descriptions.relation: Friendly but slightly mocking interaction
descriptions.outcome: Hechunmei asks for a charger, Dzhan mocks her curiosity

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan overhears the conversation and waits for Dzhan to leave
descriptions.intent: She wants to check her phone and avoid further interaction
descriptions.conflict: The noise from the hallway and the previous shouting
descriptions.state: Cautious and relieved once Dzhan leaves
descriptions.relation: Indirect interaction through overhearing
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan waits until Dzhan leaves before using her phone

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan checks her phone and sees notifications about the courtyard
descriptions.intent: She wants to understand the situation in the courtyard
descriptions.conflict: The disturbing images and news about dead bodies
descriptions.state: Shocked and horrified
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan sees a photo of decomposed bodies in the courtyard

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan analyzes the photo of the dead bodies
descriptions.intent: She wants to understand the cause of death and the circumstances
descriptions.conflict: The gruesome details and the smell of decay
descriptions.state: Disgusted and fearful
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan realizes the bodies were thrown out within 24 hours

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan reads the chat messages from other residents
descriptions.intent: She wants to gather information about the incident
descriptions.conflict: The anger and confusion of other residents
descriptions.state: Concerned and overwhelmed
descriptions.relation: Indirect connection with other residents
descriptions.outcome: Residents discuss the morality and actions of those who threw the bodies

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan receives a message from Dzhan Cimin
descriptions.intent: She wants to understand the purpose of the video message
descriptions.conflict: The unexpected and somewhat creepy nature of the message
descriptions.state: Suspicious and uneasy
descriptions.relation: Uncomfortable interaction with Dzhan Cimin
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan sees herself in the video with a chainsaw

descriptions.title: Dzhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzhan Yan processes the information about being moved to an underground shelter
descriptions.intent: She wants to understand the implications of the message
descriptions.conflict: The sudden change in her living situation and the threat of relocation
descriptions.state: Shocked and uneasy
descriptions.relation: Uncomfortable interaction with Dzhan Cimin
descriptions.outcome: Dzhan Yan realizes Dzhan Cimin has recorded her and plans to move her to an underground shelter

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цимин записывает Джан Цици в список жильцов для переселения в подземное убежище, гарантируя ей отдельный уголок
descriptions.intent: Обеспечить безопасность и комфорт для Джан Цици в условиях надвигающейся катастрофы
descriptions.conflict: Джан Цици испытывает внутреннее напряжение от навязчивости Джан Цимина
descriptions.state: Джан Цици вздрагивает от настойчивости, Джан Цимин действует решительно

outfits.Джан Цици: легкое платье с цветочным узором, волосы подстрижены до ушей

descriptions.relation: Джан Цимин проявляет заботу, Джан Цици отвечает с усмешкой
descriptions.outcome: Джан Цици соглашается на условия переселения, понимая серьезность ситуации

descriptions.title: Джан Цици
descriptions.scene: Джан Цици осматривает подземную парковку, переоборудованную под убежище
descriptions.intent: Оценить условия жизни в убежище и убедиться в их пригодности
descriptions.conflict: Условия далеки от комфортных, но оставаться на поверхности при 70° равносильно смерти
descriptions.state: Джан Цици выдыхает, выключает телефон, направляется в домашний спортзал
descriptions.relation: Джан Цици сосредоточена на выживании
descriptions.outcome: Джан Цици принимает решение использовать спортзал для подготовки к эвакуации

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цимин спускается по лестнице и замечает девушку из видеозаписи
descriptions.intent: Найти Джан Цици и обсудить ситуацию
descriptions.conflict: Появление новой фигуры нарушает спокойствие спуска
descriptions.state: Джан Цимин замедляет шаг, наблюдает с улыбкой
descriptions.relation: Джан Цимин узнает в девушке Джан Цици, она узнает его
descriptions.outcome: Они встречаются, но разговор прерывается звуком сирены

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин, Джан Цици
descriptions.scene: Слышен вой сирены, начинается новая эвакуация
descriptions.intent: Уяснить причину тревоги и подготовиться к эвакуации
descriptions.conflict: Температура растет, возможны перебои с кислородом
descriptions.state: Оба напряжены, Джан Цици удивлена, Джан Цимин озирается
descriptions.relation: Они одновременно реагируют на угрозу
descriptions.outcome: Джан Цимин предлагает идти, не теряя времени, Джан Цици кивает

descriptions.title: Джан Цици
descriptions.scene: Толпа людей спешит к аварийным выходам
descriptions.intent: Спастись от жары и возможной гибели
descriptions.conflict: Люди толкаются, шум усиливается
descriptions.state: Джан Цици следует за Джан Цимином, ноги ватные
descriptions.relation: Джан Цици подчиняется лидерству Джан Цимина
descriptions.outcome: Они движутся вниз к более прохладным местам

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь заканчивает тренировку на втором этаже, слышит сирены
descriptions.intent: Оценить серьезность ситуации и подготовиться к эвакуации
descriptions.conflict: Ситуация становится серьезнее, чем ожидалось
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь осознает опасность, быстро переодевается
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь сосредоточена на выживании
descriptions.outcome: Она направляется к выходу, готовая присоединиться к эвакуации

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цимин узнает личность Дзян Янь из видеозаписей
descriptions.intent: Уяснить истинную личность Дзян Янь и пересмотреть свои приоритеты
descriptions.conflict: Удивление от того, что Дзян Янь — богатая наследница
descriptions.state: Джан Цимин склоняется к Дзян Янь, откладывая Джан Цици
descriptions.relation: Джан Цимин меняет отношение к Дзян Янь
descriptions.outcome: Он решает, что Дзян Янь важнее для него, чем Дзян Цици

descriptions.title: Джан Цици
descriptions.scene: Джан Цици звонит Джан Цимину, но не получает ответа
descriptions.intent: Довести до Джан Цимина свою тревогу и необходимость встретиться
descriptions.conflict: Джан Цимин игнорирует звонки, занят размышлениями
descriptions.state: Джан Цици устала, но продолжает подниматься
descriptions.relation: Джан Цици разочарована, но настойчива
descriptions.outcome: Она решает подняться на двадцать восьмой этаж самостоятельно

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цимин анализирует ситуацию и рассматривает перспективы отношений с Дзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Оценить эмоциональную связь с Дзян Янь и возможные перспективы
descriptions.conflict: Кризис открывает новые горизонты, но требует принятия решений
descriptions.state: Джан Цимин мечтает о новых отношениях, радуется перспективам
descriptions.relation: Джан Цимин склоняется к Дзян Янь
descriptions.outcome: Он планирует использовать кризис для развития отношений с Дзян Янь

descriptions.title: Jian Zimin
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Zimin feels happy about potential new relationship horizons and smiles broadly, trying to hide his excitement from his daughter
descriptions.conflict: His daughter notices his unusual happiness and questions the cause, creating a moment of awkwardness
descriptions.state: Excited, slightly embarrassed, feeling the heat of the crisis
descriptions.relation: Father-daughter dynamic, playful teasing
descriptions.outcome: He admits nothing special happened but asks why she came up, shifting the conversation to her persistence

descriptions.title: Jian Zimin, Jian Cici
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Cici wants to express her dedication and test his reaction, while Jian Zimin wants to invite her in under the guise of concern
descriptions.conflict: The intense heat and the underlying tension of the crisis atmosphere affect their interaction
descriptions.state: Jian Cici is playful and confident; Jian Zimin is flustered and aroused by the situation
descriptions.relation: Flirtatious tension, Jian Cici teases him, Jian Zimin feels the heat rising
descriptions.outcome: Jian Zimin invites her in to drink water and mentions he has the requested records, making his advance explicit

descriptions.title: Jian Cici
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Cici understands the subtext of his invitation but decides not to accept immediately due to her pride and need for support
descriptions.conflict: The moral collapse of society and resource scarcity make her vulnerable, yet she maintains her dignity
descriptions.state: Resolute, slightly offended but not defeated, calculating her next move
descriptions.relation: She distances herself politely, rejecting his offer for now
descriptions.outcome: She declines his offer to enter, citing the need to get rations before the evening relocation

descriptions.title: Jian Zimin
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Zimin wants to win her over completely and alleviate her concerns about the son
descriptions.conflict: Her initial rejection threatens his confidence, but he quickly pivots to offer help with her son
descriptions.state: Heart racing, eager to please, desperate to secure her alliance
descriptions.relation: He softens her stance by offering help with her son, changing her mood
descriptions.outcome: She accepts his help and leaves to get water, leaving him feeling relieved and hopeful

descriptions.title: Jian Cici
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Cici wants to return to her apartment safely and process the new information she received
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat causes physical distress, making her legs tremble and heart race
descriptions.state: Exhausted, flushed, physically weak, mentally alert despite the heat
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She slowly descends the stairs, reaching her 7th-floor apartment in a trance-like state

descriptions.title: Jian Cici
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Cici wants to read the message from Jian Zimin and understand its implications
descriptions.conflict: The message reveals a shocking identity that changes her entire perspective on the situation
descriptions.state: Shocked, angry, realizing the depth of her past grievances
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the girl who humiliated her is the daughter of the missing woman and a billionaire heiress

descriptions.title: Jian Cici
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Cici wants to vent her anger and plan revenge against the heiress
descriptions.conflict: The moral collapse of society gives her the freedom to act without fear of consequences
descriptions.state: Filled with burning hatred, determined, plotting
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She resolves to cut the heiress off at the root and plans to deal with her permanently after the relocation

descriptions.title: Jian Cici
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Cici wants to manipulate the living arrangements to be next to the heiress
descriptions.conflict: She must convince Jian Zimin to agree to this request despite their recent argument
descriptions.state: Calculating, manipulative, using her son as a bargaining chip
descriptions.relation: She sends a message to Jian Zimin asking for a specific living arrangement
descriptions.outcome: She asks to be placed next to the heiress, framing it as a way to make peace

descriptions.title: Jian Zimin
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Zimin wants to maintain harmony and help his daughter achieve her goals
descriptions.conflict: He is unaware of her true intentions and believes she just wants to make peace
descriptions.state: Willing to do anything for her, confused by her sudden request
descriptions.relation: He agrees to her request, showing his devotion and lack of suspicion
descriptions.outcome: He agrees to speak with the management company to arrange the living situation

descriptions.title: Jian Cici, Sun Yaov
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Jian Cici wants to hide her true feelings from her son, while Sun Yaov wants to know about his new sibling
descriptions.conflict: The revelation of the heiress's identity and Jian Cici's hatred creates a dangerous atmosphere for the child
descriptions.state: Jian Cici is nauseous and hiding her true nature; Sun Yaov is innocent and curious
descriptions.relation: Mother-son bond, but with underlying tension and deception
descriptions.outcome: Sun Yaov asks if he will have a brother, unaware of the plot against the heiress

descriptions.title: Djan Qici
descriptions.scene: Djan Qici sends a message to her brother and feels nauseous, then her son Sunyao enters the room asking about a new brother.

location.name: Apartment 3201
location.description: a residential space with a bedroom and living area

descriptions.intent: Djan Qici wants to inform her brother about something important before feeling sick, while Sunyao seeks information about family changes.
descriptions.conflict: Djan Qici cannot answer her son's question about a new brother, creating emotional tension.
descriptions.state: Djan Qici feels nauseous and emotionally conflicted, while Sunyao is curious and concerned.
descriptions.relation: Mother-son dynamic with underlying family secrets
descriptions.outcome: Djan Qici remains silent, leaving her son confused about the family situation.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan completes a rigorous workout routine including strength training, elliptical exercise, and stretching, then takes a shower.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan aims to maintain physical fitness and prepare for upcoming challenges.
descriptions.conflict: The demanding workout routine tests her endurance and recovery capabilities.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels exhausted but determined after completing her exercise regimen.
descriptions.relation: Self-discipline and preparation for survival
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan finishes her workout and prepares for the next phase of her day.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan activates a holographic shooting range system and summons 4D military gear from a supplier.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to practice shooting skills using realistic simulation equipment.
descriptions.conflict: The challenge of mastering accurate shooting despite having prior experience with firearms.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels focused and determined to improve her combat abilities.
descriptions.relation: Interaction with advanced technology for training purposes
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan successfully activates the system and prepares for shooting practice.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan practices shooting with a pistol, leveraging previous experience but struggling with accuracy.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan aims to improve her shooting accuracy and combat effectiveness.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of hitting targets accurately despite having basic firearm knowledge.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels frustrated and tired as her fingers ache from repeated practice.
descriptions.relation: Self-reflection on past gaming choices affecting current skills
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan recognizes the need for better games like PUBG or Counter Strike for skill development.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan finishes training, drinks orange juice, and checks news updates without finding any new information.

location.name: Living room of apartment 3201 with panoramic windows

descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to stay informed about current events and potential threats.
descriptions.conflict: The news system shows no updates, raising concerns about a possible system bug or information blackout.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels anxious and worried about the lack of new information.
descriptions.relation: Concern about information reliability and potential dangers
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan experiences growing anxiety about the situation's severity.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan attempts to publish a message but receives a server error, confirming her fears about system failures.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to communicate with others but encounters technical difficulties.
descriptions.conflict: The server is temporarily unavailable, preventing communication and information sharing.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels increasingly worried and uncertain about the situation.
descriptions.relation: Frustration with technological limitations during crisis
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan realizes the gravity of the situation as communication channels fail.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan checks the residents' chat and discovers urgent messages about evacuation and parking lot arrangements.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to understand the evacuation procedures and secure a safe location.
descriptions.conflict: Limited parking spaces and strict deadlines create pressure for immediate action.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels overwhelmed by the urgency and complexity of the situation.
descriptions.relation: Awareness of community-wide crisis and resource scarcity
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan learns about the evacuation requirements and limited resources.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan reviews evacuation details including temperature warnings and temporary shelter conditions in the underground parking lot.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to prepare for evacuation and understand the temporary shelter conditions.
descriptions.conflict: The harsh conditions and limited space in the underground parking lot pose significant challenges.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels concerned about the spartan conditions and potential risks.
descriptions.relation: Understanding of community-wide evacuation protocols
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan realizes the severity of the situation and the need for immediate preparation.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan checks her personal data in the evacuation table and discovers she has no parking space or property rights.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to secure a safe location for herself and her belongings.
descriptions.conflict: Lack of parking space and property rights puts her at a disadvantage in the evacuation process.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels vulnerable and uncertain about her future living arrangements.
descriptions.relation: Realization of her precarious position in the community
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan learns she will share a small space with neighbors and face difficult conditions.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan observes that many neighbors are in similar situations, including renters and elderly people without assistance.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to understand the broader community impact and potential support networks.
descriptions.conflict: The widespread nature of the crisis affects many people, creating a sense of collective vulnerability.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan feels empathy for others while recognizing the shared challenges.
descriptions.relation: Awareness of community-wide struggles and solidarity needs
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan understands the scale of the crisis and the need for community cooperation.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь решает отправиться в официальное убежище, но планирует вернуться ночью в свой пентхаус в защитном костюме, считая это оптимальным решением, понимая, что оставаться одной в перегревающейся квартире странно, но делиться пространством с сотнями людей в подземном убежище — настоящее испытание
descriptions.conflict: Жара достигает 62° на улице и 59° внутри, делая пребывание в пентхаусе опасным, а подземное убежище психологически тяжело из-за шума и тесноты
descriptions.state: Решительная, но осознающая тяжесть ситуации
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь активирует систему защиты с высоким напряжением, проверяет дом и выходит из квартиры, чувствуя жар, окутывающий её как одеяло

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь спускается по лестнице к выходу, стремясь покинуть безопасное пространство Шиньяньского залива в одиночку
descriptions.conflict: На пути ей попадаются люди с тазами и тонкими одеялами, их лица красные от жары, дыхание тяжёлое, они молча кивают и показывают большой палец, удивляясь её громоздкой экипировке
descriptions.state: Уставшая, но физически подготовленная благодаря нескольким дням в укрытии
descriptions.relation: Молчаливое взаимодействие с людьми на лестнице
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь достигает первого этажа за полчаса, когда уже начинают летать мутантные кровососущие комары

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь направляется к выходу из комплекса, чтобы покинуть территорию
descriptions.conflict: Комары-мутанты с длительным сроком жизни и способностью размножаться только после насыщения кровью, температура выше 70° может их уничтожить, но все потенциальные жертвы уже обречены на гибель
descriptions.state: Бдительная, осознающая опасность комаров и отсутствие пищи для них
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь открывает дверь и быстрым шагом направляется к выходу, чувствуя раскалённый воздух

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь идёт по саду, оценивая условия и опасность
descriptions.conflict: Воздух настолько раскалён, что перед глазами плавают горячие волны, пластиковое покрытие дорожек деформировано, грунт горячее воздуха, поверхность под ногами мягкая и липкая, асфальт был бы расплавлен
descriptions.state: Озадаченная, но продолжающая движение
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь замечает, что это не асфальт, и продолжает путь, чувствуя липкость поверхности под ногами

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь ускоряет шаг, чтобы быстрее покинуть сад
descriptions.conflict: Повсюду валяются мусорные пакеты и банки, источающие невыносимую вонь, среди клумб лежат высохшие и скрюченные тела людей, кровь которых высосана комарами, трава и кустарники высохли, на земле лежат мёртвые черви и насекомые, в пруду — треснувшая глина и трупы рыб и раков
descriptions.state: Ужасающаяся, но вынужденная продолжать путь
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Запах разложения и нечистот пробивается сквозь изоляционную экипировку, Дзян Янь подходит к воротам комплекса

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь пытается выйти из комплекса
descriptions.conflict: Дверь комплекса заперта на Ю-бразный замок, контроль доступа отключён из-за отсутствия электричества
descriptions.state: Разочарованная, но не сдающаяся
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь сталкивается с проблемой закрытого выхода, что усложняет её задачу покинуть территорию

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь accelerates her pace through a stench of decomposition and filth that penetrates her isolation suit.

location.name: The entrance to a residential complex
location.description: blocked by a Y-shaped lock and a guard booth

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь intends to exit the complex to reach the official evacuation point despite the lockdown and heat.
descriptions.conflict: The access control is offline due to a power outage, and the guard booth is empty, forcing her to rely on pre-planned actions.
descriptions.state: Determined and calm, she anticipates the lack of guards and prepares her response in advance.

outfits.Dзян Янь: Full isolation suit with protective gear

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She sends a message to the resident group requesting gate opening, ignoring the guard's warning about rules and heat protection vehicles.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Guard
descriptions.scene: A young guard in full protective gear appears and opens the lock after receiving Dзян Янь's message.

location.name: The entrance gate of the residential complex

descriptions.intent: The guard attempts to dissuade Dзян Янь from walking, suggesting she wait for a specialized supply vehicle with heat protection.
descriptions.conflict: Dзян Янь refuses the offer and insists on walking, while the guard expresses disbelief at her decision.
descriptions.state: The guard is skeptical and concerned about the heat, while Dзян Янь remains confident and polite.
descriptions.relation: The guard admires her bravery and spirit as she walks away, then closes the gate behind her.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь exits the complex on foot, leaving the guard watching her with awe before the gate is secured.

descriptions.title: Dжан Цими, Лю Дахун, Group of People
descriptions.scene: Chairman of the Residents' Council Dжан Цими and Complex Manager Лю Дахун arrive with a group, heavily wrapped in protective gear and wearing motorcycle helmets.

location.name: The entrance to the guard booth

descriptions.intent: They seek shelter in the guard booth to escape the merciless sun and discuss the pending supply vehicle arrival.
descriptions.conflict: The supply vehicle has not arrived by the expected time, causing frustration and anxiety about the heat and lack of resources.
descriptions.state: Frustrated and worried, they are huddled together against the extreme heat.

outfits.motorcycle helmet; Лю Дахун: Heavily wrapped in protective gear, motorcycle helmet

descriptions.relation: Лю Дахун complains about the problems, lack of staff, and money, while Dжан Цими listens.
descriptions.outcome: They enter the guard booth and close the door to escape the sun, initiating a conversation about the difficulties of their current situation.

descriptions.title: Dжан Цица
descriptions.scene: A young woman standing near Dжан Цими interrupts the conversation with a cold smile and a shocking proposal.
descriptions.intent: Dжан Цица suggests using others' hands to remove unwanted people to reduce problems and competition.
descriptions.conflict: Her suggestion of using knives to kill those who are unlucky shocks everyone and creates tension among the group.
descriptions.state: Cold and calculating, she remains unaffected by the horror of her words while others are stunned.

outfits.Dжан Цица: Not explicitly described, but implied to be dressed for the heat

descriptions.relation: The group is shocked by her casual suggestion of murder, and Лю Дахун feels his eyelids twitching in fear or anger.
descriptions.outcome: The group is thrown into shock by her proposal, and Лю Дахун questions the specifics of her plan while trying to maintain composure.

descriptions.title: Лю Дахун, Dжан Цица, Dжан Цими
descriptions.scene: Лю Дахун inspects the window to ensure no one is outside before questioning Dжан Цица about her plan.
descriptions.intent: Лю Дахун seeks clarification on who she wants to kill and how she plans to use the stolen knives.
descriptions.conflict: Dжан Цица reveals a message from Dзян Янь to the main manager, showing that she intends to involve Dзян Янь in the plot.
descriptions.state: Лю Дахун is suspicious and wary, while Dжан Цица remains calm and confident in her plan.
descriptions.relation: Dжан Цими becomes cautious of Dжан Цица's wealth and influence, while Лю Дахун tries to understand the situation.
descriptions.outcome: Dжан Цица explains that they will use the guards' knives to deal with those who are unlucky, and the group realizes the gravity of her intentions.

descriptions.title: Dжан Цими, Dжан Цица
descriptions.scene: Dжан Цими takes the phone and reads the message from Dзян Янь, expressing confusion and concern.
descriptions.intent: Dжан Цими tries to dissuade Dжан Цица from involving Dзян Янь, reminding her of her earlier desire to get closer to Dзян Янь.
descriptions.conflict: Dжан Цица remains silent and smiles coldly, while Dжан Цими feels a shift in his attitude towards her due to her wealth and power.
descriptions.state: Dжан Цими is confused and cautious, while Dжан Цица is firm and unyielding in her resolve.
descriptions.relation: Dжан Цими warns Dжан Цица not to get involved with her, while Dжан Цица dismisses his concerns and justifies her actions.
descriptions.outcome: Dжан Цица argues that times have changed and that resources are more important than money, leading Dжан Цими to consider the possibility of a catastrophic end due to the heat.

descriptions.title: Лю Дахун, Dжан Цица
descriptions.scene: Лю Дахун questions Dжан Цица about her plan to use "bloody mosquitoes" to destroy part of the residents.
descriptions.intent: Лю Дахун seeks further clarification on her plan to lure people inside the complex with monsters.
descriptions.conflict: Dжан Цица confirms her plan to open the doors and let the monsters in, creating a new threat to the residents.
descriptions.state: Лю Дахун is concerned and confused, while Dжан Цица remains calm and confident in her plan.
descriptions.relation: Лю Дахун is wary of her plan, while Dжан Цица explains her reasoning and justifies her actions.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to plan how to lure the monsters inside the complex, setting the stage for a potential massacre of the residents.

descriptions.title: Людахун, Джан Цици
descriptions.scene: Людахун, не выдержав разговора, обращается к Джан Цици с вопросом о значении предложения использовать кровососущих комаров для уничтожения жильцов. Джан Цици с лёгкой усмешкой уточняет, не имел ли он в виду открытие дверей для заманивания монстров внутрь дома, тем самым начав планирование вторжения. Людахун молчит с непроницаемым взглядом, создавая напряжение в группе. Его сдержанное заявление о том, что уменьшение числа людей облегчит управление и сэкономит ресурсы, шокирует остальных сотрудников. Все взгляды переключаются на него с недоумением и опаской, пытаясь понять скрытый смысл его слов.

descriptions.title: Людахун, Джан Цици, сотрудники
descriptions.scene: После паузы, наполненной тревогой, кто-то из присутствующих спрашивает, как уменьшение людей может облегчить управление. Людахун, игнорируя растерянные лица, объясняет, что меньше людей требуют меньше ресурсов, но предупреждает, что последствия могут быть непростыми. В воздухе повисла атмосфера страха, когда взгляды с опаской переходили от одного человека к другому, ожидая ответа. Джан Цици с холодной улыбкой обращается к остальным, заявляя, что после сегодняшнего дня всё изменится и они будут управлять теми, кто останется. Она утверждает, что кто-то будет платить за нежелание понимать, а остальные будут лишь наблюдать.

descriptions.title: Людахун, Джан Цици, Джанцимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цици признаёт прозорливость Людахуна, напоминая, что ресурсы хватит максимум на три дня, после чего временные укрытия превратятся в хаос. Она предупреждает, что те, кто контактирует с официальными органами, станут объектом подозрений и обвинений в краже ресурсов. Джанцимин чувствует волну тревоги, но последнее замечание пробуждает в нём амбиции и стремление к власти. Он соглашается, что при уменьшении количества людей можно сэкономить ресурсы и контролировать всё, включая Шеньшуйвань. Джан Цици усмехается про себя, видя в Людахуне человека без принципов, готового менять убеждения ради власти и ресурсов.

descriptions.title: Людахун, сотрудники
descriptions.scene: Некоторые управляющие с надеждой обращаются к Людахуну, предлагая перейти на сторону правителей. Людахун, взяв незажённую сигарету в рот и глубоко вдохнув, размышляет несколько секунд. Он холодно оглядывает всех и соглашается на план, но выдвигает два важных условия. Он требует, чтобы этот план знали только они, а сотрудники на местах и те, кто связан с жильцами, должны молчать. Действовать разрешается только после того, как официальные поставки уйдут, и главное условие — их не должны поймать.

descriptions.title: Дзяньян
descriptions.scene: Дзяньян выходит за пределы жилого комплекса и скрывается в одном из уединённых уголков, где снимает рюкзак с запасами. Она достаёт два полностью заряженных электрофумигатора, купленных ранее в интернете, рассчитывая на обычных комаров. Хотя она взяла всего около десяти штук, она решает идти дальше, не зная, смогут ли они убить мутировавших монстров. Она быстро направляется в сторону ближайшего торгового центра, наблюдая за пустыми улицами, где не видно живых людей.

descriptions.title: Дзяньян
descriptions.scene: Взгляд Дзяньяна скользит по пустым улицам, где она замечает обгоревшие и покопчённые корпуса автомобилей и зданий, пострадавшие от пожаров. На улицах и тротуарах разбросаны останки животных и людей, чьи сушёные трупы поглощены жаром. Везде лежит слой чёрной пыли, то ли дорожной, то ли от сожжённых тел. Дзяньян замечает стукивающие звуки, как будто труп был сброшен с высоты, и к нему быстро подлетает стая кровожадных комаров, обрушившаяся на тело с невероятной скоростью.

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: The character walks through a landscape covered in black dust, possibly from burnt bodies, while ignoring the sounds of a body falling from a height and a swarm of bloodthirsty mosquitoes attacking it.

location.name: A desolate road leading to a shopping center
location.description: covered in black dust and swarming with mosquitoes

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян continues walking despite the rising tension and mosquito attacks, aiming to reach the shopping center for safety and supplies
descriptions.conflict: The intense heat exceeding 60°C, the swarm of mosquitoes attacking her, and the heavy protective suit she is wearing
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels the world slowly transforming into something terrible and uncontrollable, maintaining focus despite the chaos
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully repels the mosquitoes using her enhanced senses and electric shockers, depleting her initial devices but replenishing them from her space

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян switches to new electric shockers from her space and continues fighting the mosquitoes, which are now less intense after being swarmed and drained of blood.

location.name: The road near the shopping center
location.description: surrounded by dead mosquitoes and their dried blood turning into black powder

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян aims to reach the shopping center safely while dealing with the remaining mosquitoes
descriptions.conflict: The mosquitoes are still attacking, but their intensity has decreased; the heat is still extreme
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels a mix of relief and irritation as she continues her journey
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully repels the remaining mosquitoes and continues towards the shopping center

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян uses mosquito repellent to create a protective barrier around herself as she approaches the shopping center, which has been vandalized but remains intact.

location.name: The entrance to the shopping center
location.description: which has been vandalized but remains intact

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян aims to enter the shopping center safely while protecting herself from mosquitoes
descriptions.conflict: The mosquitoes are still attracted to her, and the heat is still extreme
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels a sense of relief as she approaches the shopping center, but remains cautious
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully creates a protective barrier and continues towards the shopping center

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян uses an electric saw to cut through the three locks on the shopping center's door, creating a loud noise that attracts more mosquitoes.

location.name: The entrance to the shopping center
location.description: which has been vandalized but remains intact

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян aims to enter the shopping center safely while dealing with the mosquitoes
descriptions.conflict: The loud noise of the electric saw attracts more mosquitoes, and the heat is still extreme
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels a mix of determination and caution as she cuts through the locks
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully cuts through the locks and prepares to enter the shopping center

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян opens the door quickly and closes it again, using mosquito repellent to keep the mosquitoes outside while she secures the door with new locks.

location.name: The entrance to the shopping center
location.description: which has been vandalized but remains intact

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян aims to enter the shopping center safely while keeping the mosquitoes outside
descriptions.conflict: The mosquitoes are still attracted to her, and the heat is still extreme
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels a sense of relief as she secures the door and prepares to enter
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully secures the door and enters the shopping center

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян enters the small shopping center, which is about 200 m², and begins searching for useful items, including coffee and water.

location.name: Inside the shopping center
location.description: which is small and about 200 m²

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян aims to find useful items, including coffee and water, while avoiding any potential threats
descriptions.conflict: The shopping center has been vandalized, and there are signs of intruders who may have left through a hidden door
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels a sense of relief as she enters the shopping center, but remains cautious

descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels a sense of satisfaction as she collects the cups and other items
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully collects the cups and other items, preparing to leave the shopping center

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян finds several bottles of high-quality water and adds them to her space, completing her search for useful items.

location.name: Inside the shopping center

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян aims to collect useful items, including water, while avoiding any potential threats

descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels a sense of satisfaction as she completes her search for useful items
