descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully collects the water and other items, preparing to leave the shopping center

descriptions.title: Dзянь Ян
descriptions.scene: Dзянь Ян finishes securing her shelter and begins looting the store for supplies.

location.name: A store interior
location.description: transitioning to a hidden room with a secret door, then back to the store shelves.

descriptions.intent: She aims to gather free high-quality items like water and coffee supplies to prepare for the upcoming heat and potential attacks.
descriptions.conflict: The intense heat inside the hidden room (over 70°C) and the risk of spoiled goods hinder her immediate entry and selection process.
descriptions.state: Focused and pragmatic, she knows her true goal is a brief respite before facing new trials, maintaining a calm demeanor despite the chaos outside.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She successfully clears the store of valuable non-perishable goods and liquor, ignoring spoiled dairy, and returns to the dining area as evening approaches.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Ян
descriptions.scene: Dзянь Ян inspects the hidden room and secures the valuable Maotai liquor.

location.name: A dark
location.description: hot storage room filled with neatly stacked boxes and shelves.

descriptions.intent: She wants to verify the safety of the room and secure the specific high-value items, particularly the Maotai liquor, before leaving.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and lack of light initially prevent entry, and she must assess the condition of the alcohol which could be affected by temperature.
descriptions.state: Cautious but decisive, she waits for the air to cool before entering fully, showing patience and strategic thinking.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the room is safe, loads the Maotai and other goods into her space, and notes the owners failed to move items earlier due to underestimating the heat duration.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Ян
descriptions.scene: Dзянь Ян checks the weather, removes gear, and monitors the building via cameras while exercising.

location.name: Dining area
location.description: then her personal space, then the gym on the second floor, then the building entrance via cameras.

descriptions.intent: She intends to cool down, monitor the situation outside, and train to prepare for the impending insect attack.
descriptions.conflict: The external temperature is dangerously high (approx 66°C), and the threat of giant mutated mosquitoes is imminent, requiring her to stay alert and physically prepared.
descriptions.state: Alert and determined, she transitions from looting to training, recognizing the severity of the mosquito threat after seeing the camera feed.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She finishes her workout, re-donnes her protective gear, and checks the cameras, only to discover the building entrance is swarming with mosquitoes and bodies are lying around.

descriptions.title: Dзянь Ян
descriptions.scene: Dзянь Ян witnesses the massacre at the building entrance and hears the screams of victims.

location.name: Building entrance (viewed via cameras)
location.description: first and seventh floors, other floors of the building.

descriptions.intent: She seeks to understand the scale of the attack and prepare for her own defense against the mutated mosquitoes.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer number of giant mutated mosquitoes and the vulnerability of humans to their bites create a dire situation where even a single bite can be fatal.
descriptions.state: Shocked and horrified, she realizes the gravity of the situation as she hears the cries of children, the elderly, and adults being attacked.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The camera feed reveals a horrific scene of bodies, blood, and swarms of mosquitoes, accompanied by desperate cries for help and screams of panic from the victims inside the building.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: Dzinian feels her vision constrict and doubts if she switched screens, but upon closer inspection, she breathes cold air as the protected Tieshiuwan complex transforms into a slaughterhouse for bloodthirsty mosquitoes in hours.

location.name: A closed and protected complex turned into a massacre zone

descriptions.intent: Dzinian tries to comprehend the sudden disaster and verify if the screen switch was an error or reality.
descriptions.conflict: The visual evidence of the massacre contradicts her initial doubt, forcing her to accept the horror of the situation.
descriptions.state: Shocked and terrified by the sudden transformation of the safe zone into a bloodbath.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the complex is overrun and decides to investigate the cause rather than panic.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: Dzinian removes her protective helmet, sits on a sofa with a tablet, and accelerates the playback of security camera footage to review the timeline of the breach.
descriptions.intent: She aims to determine if the door was left open by negligence or if the management surrendered, seeking the specific moment of the breach.
descriptions.conflict: The footage reveals a contradiction between safety rules and the actions of a specific individual, creating confusion about the cause.
descriptions.state: Focused and analytical despite the horror, trying to process the accelerated video feed.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She identifies that the entrance door was opened at 8:30 PM, violating the strict curfew rules.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: The video shows a young man in full protective gear opening the door, looking around, securing it loosely, and leaving it open, allowing an army of giant mosquitoes to swarm the hallway.
descriptions.intent: Dzinian analyzes the guard's actions to understand why he left the door open during the mosquito hunting hours.
descriptions.conflict: The guard's actions directly violate safety protocols, and his behavior suggests intentional negligence or malice rather than accident.
descriptions.state: Growing anxiety and suspicion as she watches the guard's careless movements.
descriptions.relation: Dzinian recognizes the guard from a previous encounter, linking him to a specific profile.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the breach was not an accident but a deliberate act by someone she knows.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: Dzinian zooms in on the footage and identifies the guard as a security personnel seen the previous day at the underground parking entrance, noting his distinctive red-flame yellow sneakers and his left hand with six fingers.

location.name: Underground parking entrance (via memory) and current complex

descriptions.intent: She wants to confirm the identity of the traitor and understand the significance of his six-fingered hand matching a specific suspect profile.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that a known associate is the culprit creates a personal conflict and deepens the mystery of his motives.
descriptions.state: Deeply troubled and fearful, struggling to believe a trusted figure would commit such a crime.
descriptions.relation: Dzinian feels a sense of betrayal and confusion regarding the guard's identity and actions.
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the guard knew the rules and chose to break them, possibly under pressure or as a planned crime.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: Dzinian questions the guard's motives, wondering if he was under pressure or acting intentionally, and decides she cannot ignore the evidence of a conscious attack orchestrated by someone inside.
descriptions.intent: She resolves to find the person responsible and uncover the truth behind the attack, refusing to act impulsively.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the guard's motives and the potential for further catastrophe hinders her immediate action, forcing her to be cautious.
descriptions.state: Determined but cautious, weighing the risks of acting too quickly against the need for justice.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She decides to gather more information quietly without revealing her knowledge to avoid triggering new disasters.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: While reviewing the footage again, Dzinian notices a strange small device in the guard's hand as he leaves the door open, realizing it is not a standard locking mechanism but a potential trigger for the attack.
descriptions.intent: She needs to understand the function of the mysterious device and how it relates to the mosquito attack.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of the device complicates the investigation, suggesting a technological component to the biological attack.
descriptions.state: Puzzled and determined, biting her lip as she tries to piece together the mechanism of the attack.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the device as a key element of the conspiracy and vows to find the person behind it.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: Dzinian acknowledges the danger of acting impulsively and decides to continue monitoring events secretly while collecting evidence, fearing that the current situation is just the beginning of a chain of catastrophes.
descriptions.intent: She plans to stay hidden and gather proof before taking any drastic actions to ensure her safety and the safety of others.
descriptions.conflict: The fear that her investigation might lead to new tragedies weighs on her, making her hesitant to move too fast.
descriptions.state: Cautious and reflective, contemplating the escalating nature of the crisis.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to wait for the right moment to act, aware that the night is getting darker and time is running out.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: Dzinian watches other camera feeds showing bloodied people with torn bodies covered in mosquito proboscises, resembling zombies, which makes her feel nauseous and prompts her to close the tablet and pick up her phone.

location.name: Monitoring room or living area with multiple screens

descriptions.intent: She seeks to communicate with others and assess the broader situation after witnessing the gruesome scenes on the monitors.
descriptions.conflict: The visual horror of the infected or attacked residents causes physical nausea and emotional distress, hindering her ability to focus.
descriptions.state: Nauseous and horrified by the zombie-like appearance of the victims on the screens.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She switches from visual analysis to communication, preparing to engage with the resident chat group.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: Dzinian checks the resident chat application and finds a group filled with over 999 messages of anger, curses, and pleas for help, indicating that many residents still have power or are in basements with backup generators.
descriptions.intent: She wants to gauge the morale of the residents and understand the extent of the chaos and resource scarcity.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming volume of negative messages and desperate pleas for medicine creates a sense of urgency and helplessness.
descriptions.state: Overwhelmed by the sheer volume of panic and anger expressed in the chat.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the severity of the situation and the desperate need for resources like antibiotics and bandages.

descriptions.title: Dzinian
descriptions.scene: Dzinian reads the frantic requests for medicine and the news of a veterinarian performing amputations, while noting the repeated messages from the management company that seem to go unheard amidst the chaos.
descriptions.intent: She aims to understand the distribution of resources and the management's response to the crisis.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of effective communication from management and the scarcity of medical supplies exacerbate the residents' suffering.
descriptions.state: Concerned and empathetic towards the suffering residents, feeling the weight of the crisis.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She absorbs the grim reality of the situation, realizing that the attack is part of a larger, unfolding disaster.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: The management company chat reveals a catastrophic breach where a resident forgot to close the entrance door, allowing swarms of blood-sucking mosquitoes into the entire residential complex. The company announces immediate lockdown of all entrance doors and begins disinfecting lower floors while asking remaining residents to stay put or protect their skin if moving.

location.name: Residential Complex Chat Interface and Lower Floors

descriptions.intent: The management team aims to contain the infestation and evacuate 1,500 residents to a shelter before the temperature rises further. Dzyanyan intends to leave the city tonight to escape the hellish conditions.
descriptions.conflict: The heat is 60 degrees, causing deaths from exposure and mosquito attacks, while the chat fills with outrage against the negligent residents and the management's slow response.
descriptions.state: Dzyanyan feels intense shame and guilt as her ears burn from the accusations in the chat. The management is stressed and busy with disinfection, ignoring the flood of insults.

outfits.Management Staff: implied protective gear during disinfection; Dzyanyan=protective gear and a backpack for evacuation

descriptions.relation: Tension escalates between residents blaming the negligent individuals and the management company remaining silent.
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan decides not to release surveillance footage proving her guilt, chooses to ignore the insults, and prepares to leave the complex.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: It is nearly 10 PM under a dark sky with an unusually red full moon reflecting blood on the ground. The temperature continues to rise despite the night, and the first groups of people appear on the streets moving slowly and heavily burdened.

location.name: Streets of the City near the Residential Complex

descriptions.intent: The evacuees aim to reach the official shelter before dawn to survive the rising heat and insect attacks. Dzyanyan plans to hide in a dark corner of a building to avoid detection while escaping the city.
descriptions.conflict: Swarms of giant mosquitoes circle overhead like living clouds, attacking the people and clogging their makeshift mosquito net shields.
descriptions.state: Panic grows among the crowd as shrieks of horror and continuous spraying of insecticides fill the air.

outfits.Evacuees: homemade protective suits, backpacks, helmets made from mosquito nets

descriptions.relation: The crowd shares a collective fear as they are hunted by the insect swarm.
descriptions.outcome: The spray only temporarily repels the monsters, and the people struggle to move forward while being pursued by the dark clouds of insects.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Some people attempt to reach the shopping center, with two tourists peering through the glass door of a cafe to see inside. Dzyanyan hides in a dark corner of the room, blending into the shadows so no one notices her presence.

location.name: Inside a Cafe within the Shopping Center

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to remain unseen and safe inside the building while the heat inside is even worse than outside. The tourists seek shelter or supplies inside the cafe.
descriptions.conflict: The interior is stiflingly hot, and the tourists are unaware of Dzyanyan's presence.
descriptions.state: Dzyanyan is cautious and stealthy, relying on the darkness to conceal herself.

outfits.Dzyanyan: protective gear and backpack (implied from previous scene)

descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan is an invisible observer while the tourists interact with the environment.
descriptions.outcome: The tourists do not notice Dzyanyan, and she remains hidden in the corner as the heat intensifies inside the building.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь hides in a dark corner of a cafe while strangers look inside through a glass door, unaware of her presence.

location.name: A dark
location.description: hot corner of a cafe with a glass door, outside a shopping center area with no metro access

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь plans to leave the cafe because the heat inside is unbearable and she suspects the strangers will not enter due to the danger of the area.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and the knowledge that entering the underground parking or metro area is equivalent to death hinder her movement and decision-making.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels cautious and alert, realizing the danger of the environment and the need to act quickly.
descriptions.relation: No interaction with others as she is hiding alone
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь decides it is time to leave and prepares to put on her jet suit to escape the dangerous heat.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь puts on a 60 kg jet suit over her fire-resistant gear, feeling the weight of the suit like carrying an adult man on her back.

location.name: Inside the dark corner of the cafe

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь intends to use the jet suit to fly away from the dangerous area and avoid the swarms of mutated insects.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy weight of the jet suit makes movement difficult, but her increased physical strength allows her to manage it.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels the strain of the heavy suit but remains determined to escape the danger.
descriptions.relation: No interaction with others as she is alone
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully puts on the jet suit and prepares to leave the cafe.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь notices movement on the pavement outside the cafe and sees dried, mummified corpses twitching, causing her heart to freeze.

location.name: Outside the cafe on the pavement

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to understand what is happening with the corpses and ensure her safety before proceeding.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden movement of the corpses and the realization that they are not normal poses a significant threat to her life.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is shocked and fearful, realizing that the corpses are not dead but are being used as incubators for insects.
descriptions.relation: No interaction with others as she is alone
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь realizes that the corpses are incubators for mutated insects and decides to wait for them to fly away before leaving.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь waits for the young insects to fly away and then exits the cafe, using her jet suit to avoid the swarms of insects.

location.name: Outside the cafe on the pavement

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to leave the area safely and avoid the swarms of insects that are attracted to the corpses.
descriptions.conflict: The swarms of insects are less aggressive than adults, but she still needs to be cautious and avoid them.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is relieved that the insects are less aggressive but remains vigilant and cautious.
descriptions.relation: No interaction with others as she is alone
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully exits the cafe and prepares to fly away from the area.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь uses her jet suit to fly up to the seventh floor and higher, avoiding the swarms of insects that cannot fly higher than the sixth floor.

location.name: Outside the cafe
location.description: flying up to the seventh floor and higher

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to reach a higher altitude where the insects are less common and avoid being chased by them.
descriptions.conflict: The mutated insects may be stronger, but her speed and the height of her flight will help her avoid them.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is focused and determined to reach a safe altitude and avoid the insects.
descriptions.relation: No interaction with others as she is alone
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully flies up to the seventh floor and higher, avoiding the swarms of insects.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь continues to fly up to the ninth floor and beyond, heading towards Shan Shui Wan, feeling confident that no one will recognize her under the jet suit.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to reach a new area and explore the city ruins, feeling confident that her jet suit will protect her from being recognized.
descriptions.conflict: The city looks like an abandoned ghost fortress, and she needs to be cautious of any potential threats.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is confident and determined to explore the city ruins and find a safe place to stop.
descriptions.relation: No interaction with others as she is alone
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully flies up to the ninth floor and beyond, heading towards Shan Shui Wan.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь decides to stop in an old district and looks around, noticing that all the windows are dark and the residents have moved to the basements.

location.name: An old district in the city ruins

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to explore the area and find a safe place to rest, but she is cautious of the abandoned and eerie atmosphere.
descriptions.conflict: The city looks like an abandoned ghost fortress, and she needs to be cautious of any potential threats in the dark and eerie environment.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is cautious and alert, realizing the danger of the abandoned city and the need to be careful.
descriptions.relation: No interaction with others as she is alone
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully stops in an old district and looks around, noticing the abandoned and eerie atmosphere.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь notices two curious eyes in a window on the seventh floor, belonging to a little girl in a pink dress with ruffles, a toy crown, and a bracelet, with her parents sitting silently beside her.

location.name: A window on the seventh floor of an apartment building

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to observe the little girl and her parents, curious about their situation and the little girl's mention of Superman.
descriptions.conflict: The little girl's mention of Superman and the parents' silent presence raise questions about their situation and the little girl's health.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is curious and concerned about the little girl and her parents, wondering about their situation and the little girl's health.
descriptions.relation: The little girl and her parents are a family unit, and Dзян Янь is an observer
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь observes the little girl and her parents, curious about their situation and the little girl's mention of Superman.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь listens to the little girl's conversation with her parents, where the little girl mentions seeing Superman and asks about fairy healing and meeting Peppa, George, and Doraemon.

location.name: A window on the seventh floor of an apartment building

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to understand the little girl's wishes and the parents' responses, curious about the little girl's imagination and the parents' situation.
descriptions.conflict: The little girl's wishes for fairy healing and meeting fictional characters highlight the desperation and hope of the family, while the parents' responses show their love and concern for their daughter.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is moved by the little girl's wishes and the parents' love for their daughter, feeling a sense of sadness and hope.
descriptions.relation: The little girl and her parents are a family unit, and Dзян Янь is an observer
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь listens to the little girl's conversation with her parents, moved by the little girl's wishes and the parents' love for their daughter.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь watches as the little girl falls asleep, her small hand slipping down, while her parents whisper their love and try to hide their tears.

location.name: A window on the seventh floor of an apartment building

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to observe the little girl's peaceful sleep and the parents' emotional response, feeling a sense of sadness and hope.
descriptions.conflict: The little girl's peaceful sleep and the parents' emotional response highlight the tragedy of their situation and the love they have for their daughter.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is moved by the little girl's peaceful sleep and the parents' emotional response, feeling a sense of sadness and hope.
descriptions.relation: The little girl and her parents are a family unit, and Dзян Янь is an observer
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь watches as the little girl falls asleep, moved by the little girl's peaceful sleep and the parents' emotional response.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь continues to fly up to the 32nd floor of the building, using her jet suit to reach a higher altitude and avoid the swarms of insects.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to reach a higher altitude and avoid the swarms of insects, feeling confident in her ability to fly and avoid danger.
descriptions.conflict: The jet suit's speed is limited by her lack of experience, making her flight relatively slow and requiring careful control.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is focused and determined to reach a safe altitude and avoid the insects, feeling confident in her ability to fly and avoid danger.
descriptions.relation: No interaction with others as she is alone
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully flies up to the 32nd floor, using her jet suit to reach a higher altitude and avoid the swarms of insects.

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь достигает тридцать второго этажа и осматривается, проверяя наличие преследователей
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь пытается оценить безопасность и найти способ вернуться домой после отключения связи
descriptions.conflict: Отсутствие мобильной сети делает невозможным управление умным домом, что рушит её первоначальный план
descriptions.state: Облегчение от отсутствия преследователей, но разочарование из-за потери связи
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь осознаёт, что ей нужно найти альтернативный способ проникновения в квартиру

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь анализирует три варианта проникновения в квартиру
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь ищет наиболее безопасный и быстрый способ попасть домой
descriptions.conflict: Каждый вариант имеет свои недостатки: крыша требует взлома замка, окно слишком узкое и привлекает москитов, подъезд требует шума
descriptions.state: Рассудительность и принятие решения
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь выбирает вариант с крышей как самый простой

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь взлетает на крышу и осматривается
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет осмотреться и найти вход в здание
descriptions.conflict: Высокая температура и необходимость проявлять осторожность
descriptions.state: Усталость от полёта, но решимость
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь успешно достигает крыши и начинает осмотр

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь осматривает крышу и готовит инструменты
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет найти вход в здание
descriptions.conflict: Вероятность встретить кого-то на крыше, необходимость проявлять осторожность
descriptions.state: Осторожность и бдительность
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь достает нож и фонарик из хранилища

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь взламывает дверь на крышу и спускается в коридор
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет попасть в свой коридор
descriptions.conflict: Замок на двери, необходимость взломать его
descriptions.state: Уверенность в своих действиях
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь успешно взламывает замок и спускается в коридор

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь подходит к двери своей квартиры и сталкивается с проблемой защиты
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет попасть в свою квартиру
descriptions.conflict: Система защиты дома подаёт разряд при попытке несанкционированного проникновения
descriptions.state: Разочарование и принятие нового плана
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь понимает, что не может открыть дверь из-за системы защиты

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь активирует пространственное хранилище и перемещается внутрь
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет отдохнуть и переодеться
descriptions.conflict: Усталость после ночных приключений
descriptions.state: Усталость, но комфорт
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь успешно перемещается в убежище и переодевается

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь смотрит реалити-шоу и чувствует голод
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет расслабиться и посмотреть шоу
descriptions.conflict: Голод
descriptions.state: Удовольствие от просмотра, но голод
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь чувствует голод и решает приготовить еду

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь готовит ужин в убежище
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет приготовить вкусный ужин
descriptions.conflict: Н/Д
descriptions.state: Удовольствие от готовки
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь успешно готовит ужин

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь ест ужин и наслаждается моментом
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет насладиться едой
descriptions.conflict: Н/Д
descriptions.state: Удовольствие от еды
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь успешно заканчивает ужин

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь проверяет телефон и видит восстановление связи
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет проверить связь
descriptions.conflict: Н/Д
descriptions.state: Воодушевление
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Связь восстановилась, Дзяньянь готова покинуть убежище

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь покидает убежище и возвращается в реальный мир
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет вернуться в реальный мир
descriptions.conflict: Волна удушающего жара
descriptions.state: Усталость, но решимость
descriptions.relation: Н/Д
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь успешно возвращается в реальный мир, несмотря на жару

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь заканчивает ужин и проверяет телефон, обнаружив восстановление связи

location.name: Убежище
location.description: затем реальный мир дома в Циншуйване, затем снова в убежище

descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет вернуться в реальный мир, чтобы проверить обстановку, но сталкивается с удушающей жарой
descriptions.conflict: Высокая температура и необходимость экономить энергию мешают комфортному пребыванию в доме
descriptions.state: Дзяньянь чувствует облегчение от связи, но затем испытывает физический дискомфорт от жары
descriptions.relation: Нет взаимодействия с другими персонажами
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь возвращается в убежище, чтобы проверить чат жильцов, где обсуждают условия жизни

descriptions.title: Жители комплекса
descriptions.scene: Обсуждение в чате владельцев жилья в Циншуйване после ужаса
descriptions.intent: Люди пытаются отвлечься, обмениваясь фото и видео из подземного убежища
descriptions.conflict: Конфликты из-за отказа делиться припасами и жалобы на условия жизни
descriptions.state: Люди выглядят измождёнными, на лбах выступил пот, лица пылают от жары
descriptions.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за распределения ресурсов
descriptions.outcome: Люди обсуждают работу кондиционеров и их неэффективность из-за высокой температуры

descriptions.title: Сотрудники ЖКХ
descriptions.scene: Установка кондиционеров в подземном убежище
descriptions.intent: Сотрудники ЖКХ устанавливают кондиционеры для охлаждения помещений
descriptions.conflict: Стандартные бытовые модели не справляются с охлаждением из-за высокой температуры и большого количества людей
descriptions.state: Люди выглядят измождёнными, несмотря на работу кондиционеров
descriptions.relation: Сотрудников ЖКХ критикуют за неэффективность работы кондиционеров
descriptions.outcome: Люди понимают, что условия в подземном убежище лучше, чем в квартирах, но всё ещё невыносимы

descriptions.title: Жители комплекса
descriptions.scene: Обсуждение проникновения кровососущих монстров в убежище
descriptions.intent: Люди пытаются понять, почему кровососущие монстры проникли в убежище
descriptions.conflict: Кровососущие монстры проникли через пешеходный проход, оставив следы крови на стенах
descriptions.state: Люди испытывают страх и гнев из-за проникновения монстров
descriptions.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за неизвестных виновников
descriptions.outcome: Люди проклинают неизвестных виновников проникновения монстров

descriptions.title: Жители комплекса
descriptions.scene: Обсуждение импровизированного крематория в парковочном пространстве
descriptions.intent: Люди пытаются понять, почему в парковочном пространстве возник огонь
descriptions.conflict: Огонь и дым в парковочном пространстве, где лежат тела погибших
descriptions.state: Люди испытывают ужас и отчаяние из-за количества погибших
descriptions.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за потери близких
descriptions.outcome: Люди понимают, что работники ЖКХ не успевают транспортировать тела за пределы комплекса

descriptions.title: Жители комплекса
descriptions.scene: Обсуждение видеоролика с импровизированного убежища в паркинге
descriptions.intent: Люди пытаются найти утешение и поддержку в трудных условиях
descriptions.conflict: Люди сидят, лежат на полу, некоторые пытаются заснуть, другие играют в карты
descriptions.state: Люди испытывают отчаяние и усталость из-за потери близких
descriptions.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за потери близких
descriptions.outcome: Люди понимают, что мечтать о тишине и покое бессмысленно, но никто не курил

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь анализирует численность участников чата и замечает пропажу людей
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет понять, почему количество участников чата резко уменьшилось
descriptions.conflict: Пропажа почти 200 семей за один день, что означает гибель не менее 600 человек
descriptions.state: Дзяньянь испытывает тревогу и страх из-за количества погибших
descriptions.relation: Дзяньянь чувствует связь с погибшими через их истории
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь понимает, что связь оставалась нестабильной, а температура продолжала подниматься

descriptions.title: Правительство
descriptions.scene: Правительство объявляет об открытии новых временных убежищ и складов с продовольственными запасами
descriptions.intent: Правительство хочет помочь жителям выжить в условиях жары и нехватки ресурсов
descriptions.conflict: Люди должны добираться до новых убежищ самостоятельно из-за ограниченных ресурсов
descriptions.state: Люди испытывают надежду и отчаяние одновременно
descriptions.relation: Правительство поддерживает связь с населением через приложение VChat
descriptions.outcome: Люди понимают, что правительство держит приложение VChat под контролем для обеспечения бесперебойной связи

descriptions.title: Жители комплекса
descriptions.scene: Обсуждение конфликтов и споров в чатах жилых комплексов
descriptions.intent: Люди пытаются найти решение конфликтов и споров
descriptions.conflict: Конфликты и споры вспыхивают с новой силой из-за нехватки ресурсов
descriptions.state: Люди испытывают напряжение и гнев из-за нехватки ресурсов
descriptions.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за нехватки ресурсов
descriptions.outcome: Люди понимают, что конфликты и споры будут продолжаться до тех пор, пока не будет найдено решение

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Underground parking of Tianshuiwan residential complex
location.description: a dark, humid, and stifling subterranean space filled with the smell of waste and human bodies

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan intends to survive the catastrophe by maximizing her survival skills before the heatwave ends, knowing that the future will be more dangerous once the isolation breaks
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and lack of resources hinder her ability to rest, while the impending return of the outside world threatens to bring chaos and competition for scarce supplies
descriptions.state: Exhausted but mentally sharp, she is hyper-focused on learning and preparing for the inevitable return of the hostile outside world
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She spends days training on simulators for piloting, driving, and shooting, absorbing knowledge like a sponge while ignoring entertainment to prepare for the coming storm.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Underground parking of Tianshuiwan residential complex

descriptions.intent: She plans to endure the remaining heatwave safely, using the isolation to master essential survival skills before the temperature drops and the crowds return
descriptions.conflict: The oppressive heat and the knowledge that the outside world will become dangerous again create a psychological burden as she prepares for the transition from safety to chaos
descriptions.state: Determined and focused, she suppresses her fatigue to ensure she is ready for the moment the heat breaks
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The heatwave begins to subside, dropping from 75 degrees to 60 degrees on the eighteenth day, signaling the end of the immediate thermal threat.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Underground parking of Tianshuiwan residential complex

descriptions.intent: She observes the streets from her vantage point, waiting for the first signs of life returning to the surface after weeks of silence
descriptions.conflict: The sudden drop in temperature and the return of the outside world introduce the risk of conflict and resource scarcity that she has been training for
descriptions.state: Alert and cautious, she watches the horizon for the first movement of people and vehicles
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She spots a convoy of trucks painted with heat-resistant paint arriving at the residential complex gates, marking the return of supplies and the end of the isolation.

descriptions.title: Military Personnel, Civilians
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Entrance of Tianshuiwan residential complex
location.description: where armed soldiers maintain order amidst the arriving convoy

descriptions.intent: The military aims to secure the delivery of supplies and manage the crowd of desperate survivors eager to exit the underground
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the disciplined military order and the chaotic, desperate emotions of the starving and dehydrated civilians
descriptions.state: The soldiers are serious and controlled, while the civilians are a mix of hysterical joy and desperate need
descriptions.relation: The military holds the civilians in check while they unload supplies and allow people to exit
descriptions.outcome: The temperature drops to 37 degrees, and the first rain begins to fall, shocking the parked cars and the waiting crowd.

descriptions.title: Civilians
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: The survivors seek to escape the underground and drink the rainwater, believing it to be a sign of salvation and the end of their suffering
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming joy of the rain clashes with the reality of potential contamination and the physical danger of the environment
descriptions.state: Ecstatic, hysterical, and desperate, they jump, cry, and drink the water without thinking of the consequences
descriptions.relation: The crowd shares a collective moment of euphoria and relief
descriptions.outcome: The heavy rain washes the dust and heat away, causing people to collapse in joy and drink the warm, muddy water greedily.

descriptions.title: Unknown Voice, Civilians
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: A voice attempts to warn the crowd about the potential toxicity of the rainwater due to chemical disinfectants and ash
descriptions.conflict: The warning is drowned out by the collective euphoria and dehydration of the crowd, who prioritize immediate thirst over long-term safety
descriptions.state: The crowd is oblivious and desperate, ignoring the logical warnings in favor of immediate relief
descriptions.relation: The warning voice stands in opposition to the celebratory mood of the crowd
descriptions.outcome: The warnings about radioactive fallout, viruses, and parasites are ignored as the dehydrated people continue to drink the water and celebrate their survival.

descriptions.title: Людахун
descriptions.scene: The crowd ignores warnings about radiation and dehydration, focusing solely on survival and drinking urine or condensation while water rationing favors the management committee.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: flooded with rainwater, grey dust piles, and makeshift water sources

descriptions.intent: Людахун wants to organize the crowd to move sandbags from the empty parking garage to building entrances to prevent flooding, knowing the drainage issues in Anming are severe.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is exhausted, indifferent to safety risks like radiation or bacteria, and resents Людахун for trying to command them after only a few days of managing food distribution.
descriptions.state: Людахун is determined but faces immediate hostility; the crowd is irritated, tired, and hostile towards authority figures they perceive as incompetent or self-serving.
descriptions.relation: Людахун is challenged by the crowd who distrust him due to past negligence by the management company that allowed pests to enter their homes.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd rejects Людахун's request, mocking his authority and refusing to help, leaving him isolated and angry as they continue walking home.

descriptions.title: Людахун
descriptions.scene: Людахун attempts to rally support by explaining the history of flooding in the complex and the strategic value of moving sandbags to residential entrances instead of the empty garage.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: near the entrance to the parking garage

descriptions.intent: Людахун seeks to persuade the men to help move sandbags to protect buildings from rising floodwaters caused by the heavy rain and broken drainage system.
descriptions.conflict: A man in the crowd angrily questions Людахун's right to command, pointing out that he has only been in charge for a couple of days and that the workers are paid to carry loads while cleaners are absent.
descriptions.state: Людахун feels frustrated and defensive as his authority is openly challenged by the weary and resentful workers.
descriptions.relation: The relationship between Людахун and the workers deteriorates as the workers express their fatigue and refusal to follow orders they deem unfair.
descriptions.outcome: The argument escalates with the crowd growing agitated, accusing Людахун of overstepping his bounds and threatening to hold him responsible for lightning strikes or other disasters.

descriptions.title: Людахун
descriptions.scene: The crowd's anger peaks as they express distrust in Людахун's leadership, citing past failures where pests entered their homes due to the management company's negligence.
descriptions.intent: Людахун tries to maintain order and prevent the situation from escalating further, hoping to regain some semblance of control over the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's resentment boils over, with individuals refusing to help and expressing their exhaustion and hunger, making Людахун's task of organizing flood protection nearly impossible.
descriptions.state: Людахун is tense and angry, clenching his fists as he internally vows that the crowd will come crawling back to him later.
descriptions.relation: The crowd's distrust and hostility towards Людахун intensifies, creating a hostile environment where his leadership is actively rejected.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd continues to argue and refuse to help, leaving Людахун isolated and unable to execute his plan to move the sandbags.

descriptions.title: Сун Дзентао
descriptions.scene: Сун Дзентао steps forward from the crowd to offer help despite his fatigue, citing his military background and experience in flood relief operations.
descriptions.intent: Сун Дзентао wants to demonstrate his willingness to help by moving sandbags to the building entrances, leveraging his past experience to inspire others to join him.
descriptions.conflict: Сун Дзентао faces the physical challenge of his own exhaustion and weakness, as well as the social challenge of convincing others to join his effort in a hostile environment.
descriptions.state: Сун Дзентао is determined and resilient, driven by a sense of duty and community spirit despite his physical limitations.
descriptions.relation: Сун Дзентао's actions inspire hope and unity among the crowd, contrasting with the earlier hostility and division.
descriptions.outcome: Сун Дзентао grabs two sandbags and starts carrying them to the building entrance, setting an example for others to follow.

descriptions.title: Сун Дзентао
descriptions.scene: Сун Дзентао's wife notices his intention to help and tries to stop him out of concern for his safety, while Сун Дзентао reassures her of his ability to hold on.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: near the entrance to the parking garage

descriptions.intent: Сун Дзентао wants to reassure his wife that he can handle the situation and that they will return home together safely, while his wife wants to protect him from harm.
descriptions.conflict: Сун Дзентао's determination to help clashes with his wife's concern for his well-being, creating a moment of emotional tension between them.
descriptions.state: Сун Дзентао is calm and reassuring, while his wife is worried and anxious about his safety.
descriptions.relation: The couple's relationship is tested by the crisis, with Сун Дзентао trying to maintain a positive outlook while his wife expresses her fears.
descriptions.outcome: Сун Дзентао successfully reassures his wife and continues to carry the sandbags, demonstrating his commitment to helping his community.

descriptions.title: Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: Джан Цимин supports Сун Дзентао's effort to unite the community, emphasizing the importance of solidarity in the face of the crisis.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: near the entrance to the parking garage

descriptions.intent: Джан Цимин wants to encourage unity and cooperation among the residents, using his official tone to lend weight to the call for collective action.
descriptions.conflict: Джан Цимин's attempt to promote unity faces the challenge of the crowd's exhaustion and resentment, which may hinder the effectiveness of his message.
descriptions.state: Джан Цимин appears worn out and official, with a beard and tired eyes, reflecting the strain of the crisis on his appearance and demeanor.
descriptions.relation: Джан Цимин's support for Сун Дзентао strengthens the bond between them and reinforces the theme of community solidarity.
descriptions.outcome: Джан Цимин's encouragement helps to bolster Сун Дзентао's resolve and inspires others to join the effort of moving sandbags and protecting the buildings from flooding.

descriptions.title: Сун Дзентао
descriptions.scene: Сун Дзентао continues to carry sandbags to the building entrances, demonstrating his commitment to helping his neighbors despite his physical limitations.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: near the entrance to the parking garage

descriptions.intent: Сун Дзентао wants to complete his task of moving sandbags to protect the buildings from flooding, using his past experience to guide his actions.
descriptions.conflict: Сун Дзентао faces the physical challenge of his own exhaustion and weakness, as well as the social challenge of convincing others to join his effort in a hostile environment.
descriptions.state: Сун Дзентао is determined and resilient, driven by a sense of duty and community spirit despite his physical limitations.
descriptions.relation: Сун Дзентао's actions inspire hope and unity among the crowd, contrasting with the earlier hostility and division.
descriptions.outcome: Сун Дзентаo successfully moves the sandbags to the building entrances, setting an example for others to follow and contributing to the community's flood protection efforts.

descriptions.title: Сун Дзентао
descriptions.scene: Сун Дзентаo's internal monologue reveals his belief that his sacrifices and contributions will eventually be rewarded, filling him with a strange sense of anticipation.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: near the entrance to the parking garage

descriptions.intent: Сун Дзентао wants to maintain his sense of purpose and hope, believing that his efforts will pay off in the end.
descriptions.conflict: Сун Дзентао's optimism faces the challenge of the harsh reality of the crisis, which may dampen his spirits and undermine his belief in a positive outcome.
descriptions.state: Сун Дзентао is filled with a strange sense of anticipation and hope, despite the physical and emotional toll of the crisis on him and his community.
descriptions.relation: Сун Дзентао's internal state reflects the broader theme of resilience and hope in the face of adversity, inspiring others to join his cause.
descriptions.outcome: Сун Дзентаo's belief in the eventual reward of his efforts strengthens his resolve and encourages others to continue their flood protection efforts.

descriptions.title: Людахун
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Людахун молча следует за охранниками и жильцами, пытаясь добраться до своей квартиры, но его нахмуренный вид свидетельствует о внутреннем напряжении
descriptions.conflict: резкий запах разлагающихся тел, засохшая кровь, липкий кожный покров мертвецов, личинки в глазах, гниющие туши насекомых, паника людей
descriptions.state: усталость, страх, напряжение, подавленность

outfits.Людахун: нет описания одежды, только нахмуренный вид

descriptions.relation: Людахун изолирован от других, молча наблюдает за хаосом
descriptions.outcome: люди запаниковали, кричали, ругались, плакали, затем добрались до квартир после вспышки молнии

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь стоит у окна, наблюдая за городом, анализирует ситуацию, вспоминает прошлую жизнь, планирует эвакуацию или адаптацию
descriptions.conflict: отсутствие электричества и свечей, затопление бассейна, угроза наводнения, морозы и снегопады впереди
descriptions.state: сосредоточенность, тревога, решимость
descriptions.relation: Дзяньянь изолирована, но наблюдает за ситуацией
descriptions.outcome: она осознает необходимость активных действий, а не пассивного выживания

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь изучает происходящее, анализирует погодные условия, вспоминает прошлую жизнь, планирует будущее
descriptions.conflict: аномальная жара, ливни, наводнения, морозы, снегопады, отсутствие кондиционеров, устаревшие коммуникации
descriptions.state: тревога, решимость, сосредоточенность
descriptions.relation: Дзяньянь изолирована, но наблюдает за ситуацией
descriptions.outcome: она осознает необходимость активных действий, а не пассивного выживания

descriptions.title: Dзянья Янь
descriptions.scene: 4-5 sentences

location.name: Apartment interior
location.description: 32nd floor, darkened room with drawn curtains and a nightlight on

descriptions.intent: She observes the environment without eating, checks the thermometer, and sets up security cameras to monitor the flood situation
descriptions.conflict: The temperature drop feels like cold after weeks of extreme heat, and she worries about the safety of her floor and neighbors
descriptions.state: Cautious and alert, she is physically exhausted from not eating but mentally focused on survival
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the water level on the first floor and sees evacuees moving toward the stairs, deciding not to open her door to them

descriptions.title: Dзянья Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She checks the camera feed on the 7th floor to see if her neighbor Jiang Cici is still there
descriptions.conflict: The camera shows the apartment is empty, raising questions about Cici's safety
descriptions.state: Concerned and vigilant, she switches the camera to her own floor immediately after
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She sees a thin, exhausted Hechunmei standing outside her door, marking the arrival of the first guest

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She stands at the door with a dim flashlight, asking if the girl from the neighboring apartment will return from the official shelter
descriptions.conflict: Her flashlight is nearly dead, and she cannot see clearly through the wire mesh above the door; she was previously shocked by the door's electricity
descriptions.state: Skeptical and slightly fearful, she recalls the danger of the electric door and the current storm
descriptions.relation: She questions Dзянья Янь about the neighbor's fate, showing a mix of curiosity and suspicion
descriptions.outcome: Dзянья Янь's husband opens the door to let her in, interrupting her questioning

descriptions.title: Jiao Guangufu
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: He opens the door to let his wife and daughter in, then responds to her question about the neighbor
descriptions.conflict: He is tired after 20 days without sleep and frustrated by his wife's obsession with the neighbor's return
descriptions.state: Irritated and weary, he feels the need to protect his family from further stress
descriptions.relation: He defends his decision to let the neighbor back in, contrasting with his wife's desire for a spectacle
descriptions.outcome: He explains that the neighbor will likely return due to the storm and the flooded shelters, dismissing his wife's desire for a show

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She argues that the neighbor will return to face retribution from other residents
descriptions.conflict: Her husband is tired and wants to avoid conflict, while she is eager for a dramatic confrontation
descriptions.state: Zestful and vindictive, she believes the neighbor deserves punishment for leaving the stairwell door unlocked
descriptions.relation: She mocks her husband's fatigue and insists on the neighbor's inevitable downfall
descriptions.outcome: She reveals that the neighbor's actions caused deaths in the building and that other residents are planning revenge

descriptions.title: Jiao Guangufu
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: He tries to calm his wife down, reminding her of their own struggles and the deaths of his parents
descriptions.conflict: He is overwhelmed by grief and exhaustion, while she remains focused on the neighbor's fate
descriptions.state: Resigned and angry, he decides to stop tolerating her behavior after losing his parents to heatstroke and stroke
descriptions.relation: He sets a boundary, telling her to stop bringing up the past and to consider their own problems
descriptions.outcome: He walks into the apartment, slamming the door, leaving her confused and shocked

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She stands in disbelief, wondering if her husband has ever yelled at her before
descriptions.conflict: She is stunned by his outburst and unsure how to react
descriptions.state: Confused and hurt, she processes the sudden change in his behavior
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She remains standing, lost in thought, as footsteps approach from the stairwell

descriptions.title: Sui, Dingtao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Stairwell entrance to Dзянья Янь's apartment

descriptions.intent: They appear soaked from the rain, looking like wet chickens, and Hechunmei reacts with sarcasm
descriptions.conflict: Hechunmei feels humiliated by their presence and mocks their "romantic walk in the rain"
descriptions.state: Mocking and bitter, she recalls a recent humiliation and uses it to justify her attitude
descriptions.relation: She addresses them with disdain, highlighting the contrast between their wet appearance and her dry, safe position
descriptions.outcome: She delivers a sarcastic comment about their behavior, setting the stage for further tension

descriptions.title: Хэтчун Мей
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Дождливая улица перед квартирой
location.description: где двое мужчин выглядят как мокрые курицы

descriptions.intent: Хэтчун Мей хочет унизить Суня и Судая за их романтическую прогулку под дождём, но её попытка проваливается
descriptions.conflict: Сунь Дзентао игнорирует её насмешки и берёт Судай за руку, показывая полное равнодушие к её словам
descriptions.state: Раздражённая и униженная, она осознаёт, что её попытки уколоть других не работают
descriptions.relation: Отношения между Хэтчун Мей и парой напряжены из-за её попыток унизить их
descriptions.outcome: Сунь и Судай уходят вместе, оставляя Хэтчун Мей в глупом положении, что заставляет её раздражённо толкнуть дверь и войти в квартиру

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет разобраться с Джан Цицы, которая подготовила для неё тёплый приём, но решает подождать, пока всё придёт само
descriptions.conflict: Её желудок заурчал, напоминая о голоде, что отвлекает её от мыслей о Джан Цицы
descriptions.state: Удовлетворённая перспективой ждать, но физически голодная, она усмехается и решает отложить конфликт

outfits.Дзян Янь: лёгкая шёлковая накидка, которую она достала из шкафа

descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь чувствует себя уверенно, зная, что сможет справиться с Джан Цицы позже
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь начинает есть ужин, наслаждаясь вкусом и впервые за долгое время чувствуя удовлетворение

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Квартира Дзян Янь
location.description: где она готовится к вечернему перерыву

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет посвятить вечер проверке своих навыков в сельском хозяйстве, используя пустующий чернозёмный участок
descriptions.conflict: Её внимание отвлекает мысль о необходимости применять теоретические знания на практике, несмотря на избыток свежих овощей и фруктов
descriptions.state: Сосредоточенная и мотивированная, она решает начать работу с семенами
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь взаимодействует с семенами, планируя их посадку
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь замачивает семена лука парей в воде, следуя рекомендациям из обучающего видео, и планирует пересадку через 2-3 дня

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Чернозёмный участок земли возле яблочного отсека

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет разделить участок на зоны (фруктовую, цветочную, овощную, лекарственных трав) для улучшения эстетики и упрощения ухода
descriptions.conflict: Её внимание отвлекает мысль о необходимости использовать запасённую водопроводную воду с добавлением питательных веществ, что не является идеальным решением
descriptions.state: Задумчивая и ищущая решение проблемы с водой, она анализирует свойства почвы
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь взаимодействует с почвой и водой, планируя будущие посадки
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь замачивает семена шиповника в воде и планирует высадку кустов по периметру участка через 2 дня

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Граница между белой жилой зоной и чёрной зоной посадок

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет найти источник воды, который она слышит, чтобы решить проблему с уплотнением грунта
descriptions.conflict: Источник воды остаётся невидимым, несмотря на то, что шум доносился с границы между зонами
descriptions.state: Запутанная и ищущая решение, она задумывается о том, как сделать источник видимым и рассеять белый туман
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь взаимодействует с пространством, пытаясь понять его тайны
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь решает перечитать постапокалиптические романы, чтобы найти намёк на разгадку, и продолжает планировать будущие действия

descriptions.title: Dziań Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Vegetable storage area
location.description: a room containing shelves with seeds and water containers

descriptions.intent: She intends to replant vegetables and prepare rose bushes to create a living hedge around the black soil plot, aiming to beautify the garden and fill the air with fragrance
descriptions.conflict: She must manage limited space and time, deciding to wait for current plants to sprout before expanding further
descriptions.state: She feels satisfied and peaceful, viewing gardening as a relaxing activity despite the physical strain on her back and legs
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finishes planting vegetables, roses, peonies, tulips, and other flowers in a flower bed occupying slightly more than a third of a basketball court

descriptions.title: Dziań Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She plans to clean up after gardening, take a shower, and spend the night in the real world to maintain her connection with the outside environment
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and thunderstorm outside threaten to disrupt her sleep and safety, yet she chooses to stay indoors
descriptions.state: She feels tired but determined, preparing for a sleepless night caused by the storm and the presence of intruders
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She takes a shower, dries her hair, sits by the pool, and eventually goes to bed with her security systems activated

descriptions.title: Dziań Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Bedroom window
location.description: courtyard of residential complex Block A

descriptions.intent: She wants to observe the situation outside and identify the mysterious figures moving in the darkness toward the tallest building
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and lightning make it difficult to see clearly, but her enhanced senses allow her to detect the intruders
descriptions.state: She becomes alert and concerned, realizing that the organized group of intruders poses a threat to the building's security
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms that the door to Block A has been breached and that intruders are carrying luggage toward the stairs

descriptions.title: Dziań Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Window of residential complex Block A

descriptions.intent: She aims to assess the extent of the intrusion and determine the number of people who have entered the building
descriptions.conflict: The lack of noise and the absence of visible intruders in the corridors suggest they are hiding or moving stealthily, complicating her assessment
descriptions.state: She feels uneasy and suspicious, wondering how so many people can enter without making a commotion
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She switches to cameras on the 20th and 7th floors and finds the corridors empty, realizing the intruders are likely hiding in the corridors

descriptions.title: Dziań Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She decides to activate her defense systems and prepare for potential attacks, ensuring the building's safety
descriptions.conflict: The worsening weather and the presence of unknown intruders increase the risk of resource shortages and security breaches
descriptions.state: She feels vigilant and ready, though tired, as she prepares to face the challenges ahead
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She sets the voltage of her anti-hacking system to 500 V and settles into her warm, soft blanket, ready to sleep despite the looming threats

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян struggles with sleepiness and decides to activate her security systems before resting.

location.name: Dзяньян's apartment
location.description: a well-insulated room with a warm, soft blanket and a monitor displaying the building's status.

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян wants to secure her apartment against hacking and ensure her safety before sleeping through the storm.
descriptions.conflict: Sleepiness and the overwhelming noise of thunder and lightning hinder her ability to rest comfortably.
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels tired but determined to prepare for the worsening situation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully activates the anti-hacking system at 500V and settles into her blanket to sleep.

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян wakes up naturally and observes the severe weather conditions outside her window.

location.name: Dзяньян's apartment
location.description: near the window overlooking the flooded street.

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян wants to assess the current state of the flood and the behavior of other residents.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and darkness outside create a sense of impending doom and isolation.
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels relaxed initially but becomes concerned as she sees the rising water levels.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян sees that the water has risen to the third floor and that neighbors on higher floors are preparing for evacuation.

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян analyzes the supply crisis and the limitations of government aid during the disaster.
descriptions.intent: Dзяньян wants to understand the true threats facing her, which are food, water, and medicine shortages.
descriptions.conflict: Spoiled food, contaminated water, and lack of medicine pose serious health risks that she must manage alone.
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels anxious about the lack of resources but remains pragmatic about the situation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян concludes that she cannot rely on government help and must act independently to survive.

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян observes the growing tension in the building as people move around and smoke appears in the hallway.

location.name: Dзяньян's apartment
location.description: looking through the monitor at the building's corridors

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян wants to avoid conflict and stay safe while others search for food and medicine.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of intruders, smoke from burning furniture, and the smell of cooking food create a chaotic and dangerous environment.
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels cautious and decides to stay inside her apartment despite the temptation to leave.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян decides to wait out the storm and avoid confrontation with the intruders.

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян focuses on her personal space and cultivates plants as a way to cope with the crisis.
descriptions.intent: Dзяньян wants to maintain a sense of normalcy and productivity by tending to her plants.
descriptions.conflict: The harsh weather conditions make it difficult to find animals or new plants to care for.
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels content and hopeful as she sees her plants growing, but also aware of the limitations.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян successfully tends to her garlic and rose plants and plans to look for animals once the rain stops.

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньян hears strange sounds on her monitor and prepares to investigate the situation on the 20th floor.
descriptions.intent: Dзяньян wants to identify the source of the strange sounds and ensure her safety.
descriptions.conflict: The sounds could indicate danger or an opportunity, creating uncertainty about what to do next.
descriptions.state: Dзяньян feels alert and ready to act, having grabbed her tablet to investigate.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян sees something unexpected on the 20th-floor screen and prepares to respond to the new development.

descriptions.title: Dзяньян
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Apartment building corridor
location.description: 20th floor, filled with refugees and makeshift beds

descriptions.intent: Dзяньян waits for the rain to stop to search for survivors, then investigates strange sounds on the monitor showing the 20th floor
descriptions.conflict: The screen reveals a crowded corridor with a violent conflict breaking out among refugees
descriptions.state: Alert and cautious, ready to intervene
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньян switches the screen to single mode, puts on headphones, and observes the escalating fight

descriptions.title: High man with square face, tattooed arms
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Center of the group on the 20th floor corridor

descriptions.intent: He angrily defends his right to occupy the apartment, claiming others died recently but he cannot just take it
descriptions.conflict: He faces a group of armed men and women who demand to live there, leading to a verbal confrontation
descriptions.state: Angry and defensive, shouting loudly
descriptions.relation: Confrontational with the armed group
descriptions.outcome: The argument intensifies as the group prepares for physical aggression

descriptions.title: Armed group (men and women)
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: They demand to live in the empty building, refusing to leave despite the chaos
descriptions.conflict: They are armed with kitchen knives, hammers, and wrenches, threatening violence against the occupier
descriptions.state: Furious and aggressive, faces full of angry wrinkles
descriptions.relation: United in aggression against the current occupier
descriptions.outcome: The conflict escalates into a full-blown brawl with metal clashing and cries of pain

descriptions.title: Two most violent participants
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: They attempt to continue the fight but are removed from the scene
descriptions.conflict: They are overpowered and thrown out of the room
descriptions.state: Injured and covered in blood
descriptions.relation: Removed from the conflict by force
descriptions.outcome: They are thrown out the open window where the rain washes away their blood

descriptions.title: Unknown voice (soft and playful)
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: The voice invites the group to move to the upper floors, offering a solution to the space shortage
descriptions.conflict: The high man stops and turns around, confused by the sudden change in tone
descriptions.state: Confused and wary
descriptions.relation: The voice is recognized by Dзяньян as a potential ally
descriptions.outcome: The high man stops fighting and listens to the new offer

descriptions.title: Люда Ахун, Джан Цицы, Джан Цимин, guards
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: They approach the group, revealing themselves as the former controllers of resources and power
descriptions.conflict: The high man feels anxious and asks if they have a place for him, while the group looks at them with suspicion
descriptions.state: Люда Ахун and Джан Цимин appear powerful and authoritative; Джан Цицы is cunning
descriptions.relation: The group recognizes them as the former rulers who disappeared during the rain
descriptions.outcome: The high man realizes the shift in power dynamics and asks for clarification

descriptions.title: Люда Ахун, Джан Цимин
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: They explain their past role in managing resources and controlling the building
descriptions.conflict: They reveal that their true nature became apparent when the heat peaked, leading to manipulation and threats
descriptions.state: They appear as saviors who now control the situation
descriptions.relation: They are seen as powerful figures who previously helped the weak but now exploit the situation
descriptions.outcome: The refugees feel anxiety and recognize the danger of relying on them

descriptions.title: Гаожуан (High man)
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: He asks for clarification on what they mean, trying to understand the new situation
descriptions.conflict: He realizes that Люда Ахун and the others are not moving further, and the water level is rising
descriptions.state: Confused and hesitant, previously brave but now cautious
descriptions.relation: He is the one being addressed by the group and the new arrivals
descriptions.outcome: He changes the topic to avoid admitting that his lower apartments also have supplies, fearing it will cause unrest

descriptions.title: Гао Дежуан (likely same as Гаожуан)
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: He considers suggesting a move to the 32nd floor but decides against it
descriptions.conflict: He knows that many people are suffering from food and medicine shortages, and he cannot risk admitting he has supplies
descriptions.state: Cautious and strategic, trying to maintain order
descriptions.relation: He is the one being addressed by Джан Цица and the group
descriptions.outcome: He changes the topic and warns that the water is already reaching the 10th floor and the rain is intensifying

descriptions.title: Gaodaju, Jian CiCi, Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Gaodaju and Jian CiCi discuss the rising floodwaters and the strategic advantage of the 32nd floor, while Gaodaju hesitates about killing living owners but ultimately agrees to seize the opportunity before others do.

location.name: 32nd floor corridor
location.description: dark and wet with rising floodwaters reaching the 10th floor

descriptions.intent: Jian CiCi wants to seize the 32nd floor legally to defend against others, while Gaodaju wants to join the plan but is conflicted about violence
descriptions.conflict: Gaodaju is unsure about killing owners and the morality of the plan, while the rising flood threatens their current position
descriptions.state: Gaodaju is conflicted and thoughtful, Jian CiCi is determined and hateful towards the opposition
descriptions.relation: Jian CiCi persuades Gaodaju to join the plan, Gaodaju agrees after reflection
descriptions.outcome: Gaodaju decides to join the plan and they prepare to move to the elevator

descriptions.title: Gaodaju, Jian CiCi, other residents
descriptions.scene: Other residents in the corridors consider moving to higher floors, and Gaodaju realizes they are armed and serious about causing chaos to seize apartments.
descriptions.intent: Other residents want to move to higher floors for safety, while Gaodaju wants to understand their true intentions
descriptions.conflict: Gaodaju fears the armed group is there to cause chaos and seize apartments, not just for safety
descriptions.state: Gaodaju is cautious and analytical, other residents are determined and armed
props: Weapons mentioned for the armed group
descriptions.relation: Gaodaju realizes the armed group is targeting 3201 apartment and Jian Yan specifically
descriptions.outcome: Gaodaju decides to accept the offer to join the plan despite his concerns

descriptions.title: Gaodaju, Jian CiCi, Jian Danian, Ludahun
descriptions.scene: Jian Danian and Ludahun discuss sharing the opportunity, and Jian CiCi proposes taking two apartments while giving others the right to use corridors and elevators for defense.
descriptions.intent: Jian CiCi wants to share the opportunity with others, while Ludahun wants to join the plan
descriptions.conflict: Ludahun is hesitant and questions the fairness of sharing, while Jian CiCi insists on sharing the opportunity
descriptions.state: Jian CiCi is generous and strategic, Ludahun is cautious and questioning
descriptions.relation: Jian CiCi persuades Ludahun to join the plan, Ludahun agrees after some hesitation
descriptions.outcome: Gaodaju confirms the plan and they all head towards the elevator

descriptions.title: Gaodaju, Jian CiCi, Ludahun, young man
descriptions.scene: Ludahun and the young man discuss sharing food and water with the elderly residents, but the young man refuses and mocks their weakness.
descriptions.intent: Ludahun wants to share food and water with the elderly, while the young man refuses and mocks them
descriptions.conflict: The young man refuses to share food and water, mocking the elderly for their weakness
descriptions.state: Ludahun is generous and compassionate, the young man is cold and mocking
descriptions.relation: The young man's refusal creates tension between the groups
descriptions.outcome: Ludahun decides to leave with the armed group, leaving the elderly behind

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan observes the group leaving via the elevator and decides to prepare for the upcoming conflict by equipping herself with weapons and armor.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to prepare for the upcoming conflict and protect herself
descriptions.conflict: Jian Yan must choose between using powerful weapons that could harm her own people or using less powerful ones
descriptions.state: Jian Yan is calm and determined, focused on the upcoming conflict
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan prepares for the upcoming conflict and decides not to use powerful weapons that could harm her own people

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan considers using powerful weapons like machine guns and bombs but decides against it to avoid harming her own people.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to use powerful weapons to defend herself but is concerned about harming her own people
descriptions.conflict: Jian Yan must choose between using powerful weapons that could harm her own people or using less powerful ones
descriptions.state: Jian Yan is cautious and strategic, focused on protecting her own people
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan decides not to use powerful weapons and prepares for the upcoming conflict with less powerful weapons

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan decides not to use powerful weapons and prepares for the upcoming conflict with less powerful weapons.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to use less powerful weapons to defend herself without harming her own people
descriptions.conflict: Jian Yan must choose between using powerful weapons that could harm her own people or using less powerful ones
descriptions.state: Jian Yan is cautious and strategic, focused on protecting her own people
descriptions.relation: None
