descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь осознаёт необходимость погружаться под воду весь день для покупок с нулевым юанем, что требует огромных физических затрат.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет избежать лишних физических усилий и шума моторов, предпочитая быстрее добраться до центра города, чем плыть на медленном штурмовом катере.
descriptions.conflict: Громкий мотор привлекает внимание, а гребля на руках слишком медленная; высокие здания действуют как рифы, создавая риск столкновения.
descriptions.state: Уставшая, обеспокоенная шумом и медлительностью, но решительная в своих действиях
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Она принимает решение избегать высотных и густонаселённых районов, планируя пересясть на низкопрофильную лодку в центре.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь направляет десантный катер в сторону Центрального делового района, используя компас и театлит для навигации, опасаясь столкновения с многоэтажками.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь стремится добраться до центра города, следуя указанным координатам, несмотря на скорость катера.
descriptions.conflict: Катер движется слишком быстро, создавая риск врезаться в многоэтажки, которые только что погрузились в воду и действуют как рифы.
descriptions.state: Напряжённая, сосредоточенная на навигации
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Катер продолжает движение, но Дзян Янь вынуждена снова вынести резиновую лодку из космоса и вернуть каяк, так как условия навигации усложняются.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь проходит мимо больших пространств с белой водой, где многие уличные достопримечательности и магазины погружены под воду на 40-50 метров.

location.name: Затопленные улицы города
location.description: видны белые воды и утопленные здания

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь пытается оценить масштаб затопления и найти безопасный путь к центру города.
descriptions.conflict: Затопленные здания и магазины создают препятствия, а погружение достопримечательностей вызывает грусть, так как она уроженка Аньмина.
descriptions.state: Грустная, ностальгирующая по прежним местам
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь чувствует грусть, глядя на затопленные места, и использует телескоп для наблюдения за ситуацией.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь использует мощный телескоп, чтобы рассмотреть ситуацию в километре от ближайшего высокого здания, и видит, что кто-то выбросил резиновую лодку из окна многоэтажки.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет понять, что происходит в городе, и оценить активность людей на суше.
descriptions.conflict: Дождь прекратился, но люди продолжают выбрасывать лодки, что создаёт неопределённость в ситуации.
descriptions.state: Наблюдательная, вздыхающая от увиденного
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь видит, что люди выбрасывают лодки из окон, что подтверждает её опасения по поводу активности в городе.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь анализирует финансовую устойчивость жителей высотных зданий и их способность позволить себе дорогие вещи, такие как десантные катера и резиновые лодки.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь пытается понять экономическую ситуацию в городе и почему люди покупают такие вещи.
descriptions.conflict: Десантные катера и резиновые лодки стоят недорого, но немногие люди сознательно их покупают и держат дома.
descriptions.state: Размышляющая, анализирующая
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь приходит к выводу, что люди в высотных зданиях имеют финансовую устойчивость, позволяющую им покупать такие вещи.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь рассматривает различные виды водного транспорта, включая спасательные круги, ховерборды и другие устройства, которые люди используют для передвижения по воде.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет понять, какие виды транспорта используются людьми в городе и как они адаптируются к новым условиям.
descriptions.conflict: Люди используют разные виды транспорта, что усложняет навигацию и понимание ситуации.
descriptions.state: Изумлённая, анализирующая
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь понимает, что люди используют различные виды транспорта для передвижения по воде, что усложняет её задачу.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь осознаёт, что температура воды низкая, и большинство людей под водой носят купальники, что создаёт неудобства для выживания.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет понять, как люди адаптируются к низким температурам воды и каким образом они выживают под водой.
descriptions.conflict: Низкая температура воды и неудобство купальников создают проблемы для выживания людей под водой.
descriptions.state: Обеспокоенная, анализирующая
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь понимает, что люди под водой испытывают неудобства из-за низкой температуры воды и ношения купальников.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь видит, что под водой возле многоэтажек находятся торговые центры, супермаркеты и закусочные, но продукты питания испортились из-за высоких температур и дождей.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет найти припасы, но понимает, что большинство продуктов питания непригодно для использования.
descriptions.conflict: Испорченные продукты и невозможность нырнуть глубоко из-за давления воды и кислорода создают проблемы для поиска припасов.
descriptions.state: Обеспокоенная, разочарованная
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь понимает, что поиск припасов под водой нереален для обычных людей из-за ограничений по глубине и качеству продуктов.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь видит, как некоторые выжившие кричат и машут ей, используя металлические вешалки и разноцветные воздушные шары для привлечения внимания.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет понять, что означают сигналы выживших и как они пытаются привлечь её внимание.
descriptions.conflict: Крики и сигналы выживших создают неопределённость в их намерениях и потребностях.
descriptions.state: Изумлённая, настороженная
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь понимает, что выжившие пытаются привлечь её внимание, но неясно, что они хотят.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь анализирует возможность того, что выжившие видят её и её корабль, и понимает, что человеческий глаз может видеть высокие здания на расстоянии нескольких километров.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет понять, видят ли выжившие её и как они реагируют на её присутствие.
descriptions.conflict: Видимость высоких зданий на расстоянии нескольких километров создаёт неопределённость в том, кто видит кого.
descriptions.state: Наблюдательная, настороженная
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь понимает, что выжившие могут видеть её, но неясно, что они хотят от неё.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь решает развернуть резиновую лодку и быстро поплыть прочь, так как не хочет тратить время на людей и вещи, которые не имеют значения.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет избежать встреч с людьми и вещами, которые не имеют значения для её миссии.
descriptions.conflict: Нежелание тратить время на незначительные вещи противоречит необходимости оставаться в безопасности и избегать конфликтов.
descriptions.state: Решительная, усталая
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь быстро плывёт прочь, избегая встреч с людьми и вещами, которые не имеют значения.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь останавливается у офисного здания, которое почти до крыши было утоплено в качестве щита, так как план выхода напрямую в самые престижные торговые центры города не удастся реализовать.
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет найти безопасное место для временной остановки и переоценить свой план.
descriptions.conflict: Утопленное офисное здание действует как щит, но план выхода в торговые центры не реализуется.
descriptions.state: Уставшая, разочарованная
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь временно останавливается у утопленного офисного здания, понимая, что её первоначальный план не сработает.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь deploys a rubber boat and swims away from the current danger zone to find temporary shelter.

location.name: An underwater urban environment near a sunken office building used as a shield

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь realizes the direct plan to enter top-tier shopping centers is currently impossible due to the submerged city and decides to execute an alternative route involving the underwater pedestrian street to collect treasures first.
descriptions.conflict: The city center has been submerged, turning a familiar area into a labyrinth with poor visibility and underwater obstacles that hinder direct movement.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is cautious but determined, analyzing the situation and checking her diving gear while considering the changing environmental conditions.

outfits.Dзян Янь: full diving suit with insulated boots and gloves, wearing a diving mask, a head-mounted diving lamp, and a handheld diving flashlight

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь is alone in this scene, assessing the threat and planning the next move
descriptions.outcome: She successfully stops near the sunken office building, confirming that the direct approach to the commercial district is blocked and a new strategy is required.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь reviews her alternative plan to enter the city via the underwater pedestrian street and collect external treasures before entering the elite centers.

location.name: The submerged central part of the city

descriptions.intent: She formulates a new strategy to bypass the submerged obstacles by using the pedestrian street, which contains gold shops open to the public, to gather resources before reaching the elite centers.
descriptions.conflict: The pedestrian street is now underwater, creating a complex labyrinth where visibility is low and physical obstacles are present, making navigation difficult without proper tools.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels relieved to have a backup plan but remains focused on the challenges of navigating the submerged environment safely.

outfits.Dзян Янь: full diving suit with insulated boots and gloves, wearing a diving mask, a head-mounted diving lamp, and a handheld diving flashlight

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь is alone, mentally rehearsing the new route and the specific actions needed at each stage
descriptions.outcome: She confirms that her enhanced vision and equipment will allow her to navigate the submerged street without getting lost, solidifying her decision to proceed with the new plan.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь releases the piranha named Хуабао and prepares to teach him how to navigate using the map and compass.

location.name: The edge of the rubber boat near the underwater pedestrian street

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь intends to use Хуабао as a guide and companion, handing him a waterproof map and compass to help with orientation during the dive.
descriptions.conflict: Dзян Янь is unsure if Хуабао, despite his enhanced intelligence, can understand the complex map and compass instructions, fearing he might not be able to process the information correctly.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is excited yet slightly anxious about the child's ability to handle the navigation tools, smiling softly as she considers the risks and rewards of this partnership.

outfits.Dзян Янь: full diving suit with insulated boots and gloves, wearing a diving mask, a head-mounted diving lamp, and a handheld diving flashlight

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь is testing Хуабао's capabilities, while Хуабао shows curiosity and eagerness to help, creating a dynamic of mentorship and trust
descriptions.outcome: Хуабао demonstrates his intelligence by stating the map is already in his head, leading Dзян Янь to realize he does not need to physically hold the map, resolving the conflict about his capability.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь accepts Хуабао's ability to memorize the map and decides to proceed into the water with him, addressing his fear of the water element.

location.name: The edge of the rubber boat

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь reassures Хуабао that she will take him with her, acknowledging his fear of the water element while explaining that his elemental affinity (Water) makes him immune to the cold and fear.
descriptions.conflict: Хуабао expresses fear and hesitation, asking if Dзян Янь will take him, which requires Dзян Янь to provide physical comfort and verbal reassurance to calm him down.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels a mix of maternal affection and professional resolve, suppressing a bitter smile as she comforts the child and prepares to enter the cold water.

outfits.Dзян Янь: full diving suit with insulated boots and gloves, wearing a diving mask, a head-mounted diving lamp, and a handheld diving flashlight

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь is comforting and guiding Хуабао, who is initially fearful but becomes obedient and hides behind her diving lamp after she agrees to take him
descriptions.outcome: Хуабао calms down, accepts the water element, and climbs onto Dзян Янь's hand, hiding behind her diving lamp as she prepares to enter the water.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь enters the cold water, securing the rubber boat and assessing the cleanliness of the commercial district.

location.name: The underwater pedestrian street near the commercial district

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь intends to dive into the water, secure the boat, and swim towards the first jewelry store to begin collecting treasures.
descriptions.conflict: The water temperature is significantly lower than the air (4-5 degrees Celsius), which is uncomfortable even with insulated gear, and the environment is dark and potentially hazardous.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is focused and determined, ignoring the cold discomfort as she enters the water and secures her equipment to proceed with the mission.

outfits.Dзян Янь: full diving suit with insulated boots and gloves, wearing a diving mask, a head-mounted diving lamp, and a handheld diving flashlight

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь is leading the way into the water, with Хуабао following her lead and observing the surroundings
descriptions.outcome: She successfully enters the water, secures the boat, and notes that the commercial district is relatively clean with few corpses or debris, making it safer for navigation.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь swims towards the first jewelry store, using Хуабао's compass to navigate the underwater path.

location.name: The underwater pedestrian street leading to the jewelry district

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь aims to reach the first known jewelry store quickly to collect a personalized diamond ring, using Хуабао's guidance to maintain the correct direction.
descriptions.conflict: The underwater environment presents challenges such as low visibility and the need to avoid obstacles, requiring precise navigation and reliance on Хуабао's compass skills.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is moving with purpose and speed, trusting Хуабао's ability to guide her while keeping an eye on the surroundings for any threats.

outfits.Dзян Янь: full diving suit with insulated boots and gloves, wearing a diving mask, a head-mounted diving lamp, and a handheld diving flashlight

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь relies on Хуабао for navigation, while Хуабао actively uses the compass to provide clear directions, creating a cooperative dynamic
descriptions.outcome: They successfully navigate the underwater path, and a rusty sign reading "Diamonds Forever" appears, confirming they have reached the jewelry district.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь identifies the location as the jewelry district and accelerates her progress towards the first store.

location.name: The jewelry district on the underwater pedestrian street

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь intends to enter the first jewelry store immediately to collect a personalized diamond ring, knowing that each ring requires a unique identity verification and can only be personalized once in a lifetime.
descriptions.conflict: The urgency to collect the ring before time runs out or conditions worsen, combined with the need to navigate the specific layout of the jewelry district efficiently.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is focused and determined, increasing her swimming speed to reach the target store as quickly as possible without compromising safety.

outfits.Dзян Янь: full diving suit with insulated boots and gloves, wearing a diving mask, a head-mounted diving lamp, and a handheld diving flashlight

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь and Хуабао are moving together towards the target, with Хуабаo continuing to provide navigation support
descriptions.outcome: They arrive at the first jewelry store, which is a relatively well-known brand, marking the beginning of the treasure collection phase of their mission.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь прибывает к первому ювелирному магазину, известному своими персонализированными бриллиантовыми кольцами и необходимостью подписания любовного договора

location.name: Уличный ювелирный магазин с рольставнями и водной средой

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет проверить магазин на наличие сокровищ, несмотря на маркетинговые уловки и строгие правила
descriptions.conflict: Магазин закрыт рольставнями, внутри темно, и есть риск встретить охрану или призраков
descriptions.state: Спокойная, решительная, несмотря на неизвестность
descriptions.relation: Н/д
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь легко разрезает рольставни и стекло, проверяет магазин фонариком, не обнаруживая живых тел, но находя калькуляторы, котов и символы богатства

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь, Хуабао
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь подтверждает отсутствие тел и плавно входит в магазин, где Хуабао реагирует на золото
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет осмотреть украшения, Хуабао хочет их съесть
descriptions.conflict: Хуабао пытается укусить сейфы, но не может пробить стальную пластину
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь спокойна, Хуабао возбужден и болен зубами

outfits.Хуабао: зелёная жидкость со слабым светло-зелёным светом, напоминающая зелёную водяную змею или мутировавшую медузу с водолазным компасом на лопасти

descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь и Хуабао общаются разумом, Дзян Янь контролирует действия Хуабао
descriptions.outcome: Хуабао понимает, что не может открыть сейфы, Дзян Янь останавливает его, они решают сначала закрыть пространство, а потом дома открывать ящики

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь, Хуабао
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь объясняет Хуабао план действий по открытию сейфов после возвращения домой
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет безопасно извлечь золото, Хуабао хочет сразу открыть ящики
descriptions.conflict: Хуабао слишком возбужден и хочет немедленно открыть сейфы, что опасно
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь улыбается и успокаивает, Хуабао понимает и соглашается
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь и Хуабао договариваются о последовательности действий
descriptions.outcome: Хуабао соглашается с планом, они готовятся к извлечению золота

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь, Хуабао
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь использует силу мысли, чтобы открыть сейфы, и они захватывают все ювелирные магазины на улице
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет быстро и безопасно извлечь золото из всех сейфов
descriptions.conflict: Сейфы сделаны из чистой стали и сложно разрезать обычными инструментами
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь довольна, Хуабао рад
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь и Хуабао работают вместе
descriptions.outcome: Они успешно открывают все сейфы, захватывают золото и продолжают захватывать остальные магазины на улице

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь испытывает радость от поиска сокровищ и обновления помещения
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет насладиться процессом поиска сокровищ
descriptions.conflict: Н/д
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь счастлива, забыла усталость и холод воды
descriptions.relation: Н/д
descriptions.outcome: Уровень дофамина в теле Дзян Янь резко возрастает, она полностью погружена в процесс

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь experiences a surge of dopamine from finding high-value items, forgetting her physical exhaustion and the cold water surrounding her.

location.name: A pedestrian street transitioning to the entrance of the Wnymine shopping center
location.description: characterized by glass walls and doors for atmosphere display.

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь seeks to find the most prestigious treasure storage locations, driven by the happiness of buying treasures for zero yuan and upgrading her environment.
descriptions.conflict: The contrast between the closed doors of street jewelry stores and the open, monitored doors of the shopping center creates a logistical hurdle, though security measures like U-locks and police-linked alarms mitigate theft risks.
descriptions.state: Euphoric and energetic, having forgotten fatigue due to the dopamine rush.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь and Huabao (her companion/tool) share a bond where Huabao expresses excitement through sounds like "dze-dze dzdze" and physical actions like licking the safe door.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully locates a safe storage room on the underground floor near the dispatch center, cutting through the steel door with her underwater cutting gun after verifying the security systems are compromised by rain and age.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь inspects the underground storage room, noting its deceptive appearance and high-tech security features that are now non-functional due to water damage.

location.name: Underground floor of the Wnymine shopping center
location.description: specifically a 20 m² room disguised as a utility room with acrylic signs.

descriptions.intent: She aims to assess the security level of the room and prepare to search for treasures inside, comparing it to her own refuge in the bay of repulsion.
descriptions.conflict: The room is filled with water, limiting visibility, and is equipped with cameras, infrared sensors, and high-voltage anti-theft systems that she must disable or bypass.
descriptions.state: Cautious yet impressed by the high security, momentarily feeling like she is in a jewelry museum rather than a mall.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь observes Huabao's hunger and excitement as he licks the safe door, showing a dynamic of shared discovery and companionship.
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the room's walls are lined with thick steel plates and decides to proceed with caution, using her flashlight to illuminate the dark, water-filled space.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь detects the scent of red pigeon eggs and realizes the presence of red diamonds, the rarest and most valuable colored diamonds in the world.

location.name: Inside the water-filled underground storage room of the shopping center.

descriptions.intent: She wants to locate the red diamonds immediately, knowing their extreme scarcity and high market value which could buy a house in Beijing.
descriptions.conflict: The rarity of red diamonds (over 1 carat) and their absence from normal auctions make their presence here unexpected, requiring her to verify the claim before acting.
descriptions.state: Excited and surprised, her eyes lighting up at the discovery of the scent and the implication of the diamonds' existence.
props: red pigeon eggs (metaphorical or actual scent source)
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь feels a strong connection to the treasure, acknowledging Huabao's role in guiding her to this specific location.
descriptions.outcome: She accepts that today is her lucky day and prepares to interact with the specific safe containing the red diamonds, driven by the knowledge of their immense value.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь examines the unique, custom-made safe in the corner of the room, noting its square shape, stacked smaller safes on top, and Huabao's interest in it.

location.name: The corner of the underground storage room
location.description: specifically around a custom-made safe with a square shape and stacked components.

descriptions.intent: She intends to gather the safes and move them to the white residential zone in the space to eventually open the one containing the red diamond.
descriptions.conflict: The current environment (water-filled room) prevents her from opening the safe immediately, forcing her to hold back her immediate desire to see the treasure.
descriptions.state: Tense with anticipation, balancing her excitement with the need for patience and safety protocols.
descriptions.relation: Huabao displays a greedy expression and licks the safe door, while Dзян Янь smiles silently at his behavior, showing a comfortable familiarity.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь gathers a pile of safes near herself and swims towards the white residential zone, deciding to wait until the environment is suitable before opening the rare red diamond safe.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь gathers a pile of safes near herself and quickly swims them to the white residential zone in the space.

location.name: White residential zone in the space
location.description: a distinct area separated from the main shopping district

descriptions.intent: She wants to open a rare pigeon egg with a red diamond but suppresses the urge because the current environment does not allow it
descriptions.conflict: The environmental restrictions prevent her from opening the egg immediately, forcing her to hold back her desire
descriptions.state: Determined and restrained, she clenches her teeth to maintain self-control
props: rare pigeon egg with red diamond
descriptions.relation: Internal conflict between desire and environmental rules
descriptions.outcome: She successfully moves the safes and decides to wait for a better time to open the egg

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Хуабао
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь calls out to Хуабао to move to the next stop while Дзян Янь feels relaxed after successfully collecting treasures at a high price in the shopping center.

location.name: First floor below the main shopping area
location.description: an elite shopping center in the central business district

descriptions.intent: They aim to continue searching for treasures and visit the next location
descriptions.conflict: The physical limitations of the underwater environment and the need to move quickly
descriptions.state: Relaxed and confident, Дзян Янь feels more at ease after her successful treasure hunt
descriptions.relation: Хуабао leads the way with his propeller wings, showing increased bravery after long underwater exposure
descriptions.outcome: They proceed to the next stop with Хуабао swimming ahead

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: They descend to the first floor below, passing through a supermarket aisle on the first basement level.

location.name: Supermarket aisle on the first basement level

descriptions.intent: She plans to inspect the supermarket for potential treasures or useful items
descriptions.conflict: Items in the supermarket are either too light to float or too heavy to lift, making them difficult to handle
descriptions.state: Frustrated by the impracticality of the items, she considers abandoning her plan to bathe
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides against bathing due to time constraints and focuses on her main goal of finding treasures

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь considers visiting a beekeeping base or hospital clinic for medicine if time permits but decides against it.
descriptions.intent: She wants to maximize her treasure hunting efficiency within the limited time available
descriptions.conflict: Her preference for treasures over food and the need to move quickly
descriptions.state: Pragmatic and focused, she prioritizes her main objective over other activities
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She exits the shopping center and prepares to head to the next location

descriptions.title: Хуабао
descriptions.scene: Хуабао wraps a leaf around his wrist and points out another elite luxury store nearby, excitedly mentioning food.

location.name: Near an elite luxury store
location.description: a three-story flagship store of luxury watches opened by Lion Hennesy in Anning

descriptions.intent: He wants to explore the new store and find food
descriptions.conflict: The store is filled with expensive items that may not be suitable for consumption
descriptions.state: Excited and curious, he shows keen interest in the store's offerings
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь smiles at his keen observation skills
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь follows him to the store, impressed by his sharp senses

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Хуабао
descriptions.scene: They enter the luxury watch store, which sells various high-end brands with prices starting at 100,000 yuan.

location.name: Inside the luxury watch store
location.description: featuring expensive watches and collectible eight-figure timepieces

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь plans to liquidate assets by selling watches to a luxury second-hand site and buying them back at a lower tariff
descriptions.conflict: The high prices and specialized materials of the watches make them less appealing for immediate consumption
descriptions.state: Focused on the value and potential of the watches, she evaluates their worth
descriptions.relation: Хуабао demonstrates his ability to choose valuable items, while Дзян Янь appreciates his keen eye
descriptions.outcome: They proceed to examine the watches, with Дзян Янь considering their material composition and potential for upgrade

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь reflects on the materials used in watchmaking, such as stainless steel, titanium alloy, rhodium, ceramics, and carbon nanofibers, and considers using these materials instead of traditional ones.
descriptions.intent: She wants to understand the properties of the watches and their potential for consumption or upgrade
descriptions.conflict: The attributes of the watches and their materials make them unsuitable for immediate consumption
descriptions.state: Confused but determined, she seeks to clarify the nature of the items
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes that the watches are not meant for consumption and moves on to other items

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь quickly enters through the window and uses a piranha to find a safe place where the watches are stored.

location.name: Inside the luxury watch store
location.description: near the storage area for watches

descriptions.intent: She wants to secure the watches and ensure their safety
descriptions.conflict: The need to move quickly and avoid detection
descriptions.state: Alert and cautious, she acts swiftly to protect the items
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully secures the watches and prepares for the next phase of her treasure hunt

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Six hours later, Дзян Янь has packed all gold, silver, jewelry, and watches from luxury stores within 2 km of the central business district into her space.

location.name: Her space
location.description: a secure area for storing treasures

descriptions.intent: She wants to consolidate her findings and rest after the exhausting journey
descriptions.conflict: Physical exhaustion from continuous swimming and the need to replenish her energy
descriptions.state: Tired but satisfied, she has achieved her goal of collecting treasures
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She consumes a piece of strawberry pudding and a cup of hot milk chocolate to restore her physical strength before leaving the space

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Water surface near the city center
location.description: after finishing cleaning jewelry and watch shops

descriptions.intent: She needs to replenish her physical strength after non-stop swimming and find a safe place to rest before the next workday
descriptions.conflict: Her body can no longer endure the swimming despite spatial transformation, and the exit route back to the bay is blocked by survivors
descriptions.state: Exhausted but determined to rest and prepare for tomorrow
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She swims to the edge of the second ring road, uses the periscope to check for safety, and confirms her location is isolated on the west side of the city.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Water near a ten-story office building with a glass curtain wall

descriptions.intent: She wants to enter the isolated office building to rest safely away from strangers and the chaotic water
descriptions.conflict: The building is isolated like an island, windows are sealed with sun protection film, and the interior is dark
descriptions.state: Cautious and analytical, observing the environment before acting
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She approaches the building, shines a flashlight inside, and determines it is a company office with water reaching only the seat cushions.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Outside the glass curtain wall of the office building

descriptions.intent: She plans to break into the office to rest, avoiding the danger of strong currents if she tries to break the window from the wrong angle
descriptions.conflict: The glass is high-strength and impact-resistant with a sun protection film layer, making it difficult to break
descriptions.state: Focused and calculating the risks of breaking the window
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides not to use a powerful axe but instead uses a small hammer to create a small crack in the glass.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Outside the glass curtain wall of the office building

descriptions.intent: She intends to enter the building through the cracked window before the water pressure seals it completely
descriptions.conflict: The water pressure is strong and will eventually crush the glass, but she needs to act quickly
descriptions.state: Urgent and decisive, moving fast to exploit the opening
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She hits the glass with the hammer, swims away quickly, and watches the crack expand under water pressure for 3-4 seconds.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The crack in the glass window of the office building

descriptions.intent: She wants to enter the office space through the expanding crack before the glass fails completely
descriptions.conflict: The glass is under immense pressure and making cracking sounds, threatening to shatter entirely
descriptions.state: Rushed and focused on timing her entry
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She dives into the space through the crack, and after 7-8 minutes, she emerges inside the room where documents, books, and glass shards float.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Inside the office on the 13th floor

descriptions.intent: She needs to find a safe spot to remove her diving gear and rest her body after the long swim
descriptions.conflict: The corridor is dark, damp, and smells musty, and she must navigate carefully with a flashlight
descriptions.state: Relieved and physically lighter after removing gear, but still cautious
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finds the entrance, opens the door, and moves to the 13th floor where she finds a fire escape and sits down to remove her mask and fins.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She plans to move to the 14th floor to find a better resting spot or explore further
descriptions.conflict: The corridor is dark and filled with cigarette butts, indicating a prohibited smoking area
descriptions.state: Happy and lucky to find a significant landmark (dentist clinic symbols)
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She puts her heavy diving gear aside, feels her body revive, and proceeds to the 14th floor where she sees signs of a famous private dental clinic.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist enters a large private dental clinic after accidentally hitting her head on a pillow due to extreme sleepiness, revealing the location as a significant symbol of her journey.

location.name: A large
location.description: world-famous private dental clinic situated in office buildings, featuring marble reception desks, dead plants, and various medical supplies.

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь seeks to find specific medications, initially hoping to buy them for free, but needing to navigate the clinic's layout to locate the pharmacy or storage areas.
descriptions.conflict: The clinic's layout is complex with dead plants and a luxurious but potentially confusing reception area, and she must avoid detection while searching for the drugs she needs.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is determined but slightly disoriented by the accidental injury and the sheer size of the clinic, maintaining a cautious demeanor.

outfits.Dзян Янь: No specific clothing mentioned in the text, implied to be wearing standard attire suitable for sneaking into a clinic.

descriptions.relation: No interaction with other characters in this scene as she is alone in the clinic.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully locates the medical storage, identifies the medications, notes their potential ineffectiveness due to high temperatures, and decides to take them despite the risks before leaving the clinic.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: After leaving the dental clinic, Dзян Янь ascends two more floors to reach the sixteenth floor, where an e-commerce company occupies half the space, and she breaks through a door to enter an open office area.

location.name: The sixteenth floor of a building
location.description: featuring an open office area with a glass suspended wall, a landing boat with red and black stripes, and a dimly lit environment.

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь aims to observe the activities on the landing boat from a safe distance, using the glass wall and a steel frame as cover to avoid detection.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of a landing boat with armed individuals creates a tense situation, and Dзян Янь must remain hidden while observing them to gather information or plan her next move.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is alert and cautious, using her surroundings to her advantage while maintaining a low profile to avoid being noticed by the armed individuals on the boat.
descriptions.relation: No direct interaction with the characters on the boat, but Dзян Янь observes them from a distance, noting their appearance and equipment.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully positions herself to observe the landing boat and its occupants, noting their attire, equipment, and the presence of a young man with a pistol and a woman who appears impatient.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь continues to observe the landing boat, focusing on the young man with a pistol and the woman who appears impatient, while noting the details of their appearance and equipment.

location.name: The sixteenth floor of a building
location.description: with a glass suspended wall and a landing boat with red and black stripes visible from the office area.

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь aims to gather more information about the individuals on the landing boat, particularly the young man with the pistol and the woman who appears impatient, to understand their intentions and plans.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of armed individuals on the landing boat creates a tense situation, and Dзян Янь must remain hidden while observing them to avoid detection and potential danger.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is alert and cautious, using her surroundings to her advantage while maintaining a low profile to avoid being noticed by the armed individuals on the boat.

outfits.black pistol; Woman on the boat: Full waterproof suit, waterproof backpack, wet hair from being in the water.

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь observes the young man and the woman from a distance, noting their appearance and equipment, while they remain unaware of her presence.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь successfully gathers information about the individuals on the landing boat, noting their attire, equipment, and the presence of a young man with a pistol and a woman who appears impatient, setting the stage for further action or confrontation.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 4 sentences

location.name: A boat deck overlooking a flooded area with four armed men in full gear

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь observes the four men and deduces they are an official government team sent to search for supplies, noting the contrast between their official status and the chaotic weather conditions
descriptions.conflict: He questions whether rescue ships will also be sent given the severity of the rain and the plight of ordinary people trapped in their homes
descriptions.state: Curious and slightly impatient, reflecting on the lack of information about surface events while submerged all day
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He concludes that the team is likely a small commando unit dispatched by the government to find provisions amidst the storm.

descriptions.title: Man with pistol, Child-faced man, Woman with short hair, Man with mole on eyebrow
descriptions.scene: 4 sentences

location.name: The stern of a ship
location.description: near a glass suspended wall leading to an office

descriptions.intent: The child-faced man manages the ship while the man with the pistol inspects the office window, preparing to enter the water-filled building
descriptions.conflict: The man with the mole on the eyebrow questions the necessity of the mission and mocks the idea of swimming in such dangerous conditions
descriptions.state: The man with the pistol is cautious and alert; the child-faced man is focused on navigation; the woman is impatient but silent
descriptions.relation: Tension exists between the cautious leader and the skeptical man with the mole
descriptions.outcome: The group prepares to enter the water, with the man with the pistol confirming they are an advance group seeking supplies.

descriptions.title: Man with pistol, Woman with short hair (Cimena)
descriptions.scene: 4 sentences

location.name: Near the glass suspended wall of the ship

descriptions.intent: The man with the pistol explains their mission to find supplies in a remote building, asserting that no one else could arrive faster
descriptions.conflict: The woman expresses surprise at their claim of being an advance group, while the man insists on their priority status
descriptions.state: The woman is surprised; the man is confident and dismissive
descriptions.relation: The woman is skeptical of the man's claims, while he remains assertive
descriptions.outcome: The man with the pistol declares that the building is remote and they are the fastest to arrive, silencing any doubts.

descriptions.title: Child-faced man, Man with pistol
descriptions.scene: 4 sentences

location.name: The stern of the ship
location.description: looking into the dark, water-filled office

descriptions.intent: The child-faced man turns off the motor and looks into the dark room, while the man with the pistol reports seeing materials floating in the water
descriptions.conflict: The man with the pistol warns of potential gaps in the plastered walls due to recent flooding, suggesting caution
descriptions.state: The child-faced man is suspicious; the man with the pistol is cautious and observant
descriptions.relation: The child-faced man questions the situation, while the man with the pistol provides a detailed warning
descriptions.outcome: The man with the pistol advises caution due to the possibility of broken glass and recent flooding.

descriptions.title: Man with mole on eyebrow, Sun Tian
descriptions.scene: 4 sentences

location.name: On the deck of the ship

descriptions.intent: The man with the mole on the eyebrow asks if Sun Tian is a professional criminal, while Sun Tian ignores the comment and prepares to jump into the water
descriptions.conflict: The man with the mole on the eyebrow questions the group's identity and motives, while Sun Tian dismisses the concern and focuses on the mission
descriptions.state: The man with the mole on the eyebrow is amused and skeptical; Sun Tian is determined and dismissive
descriptions.relation: The man with the mole on the eyebrow is mocking, while Sun Tian is serious and focused
descriptions.outcome: Sun Tian ignores the mockery and prepares to jump into the water to inspect the building.

descriptions.title: Sun Tian, Baby Face, Sister Qi Jiaoddy
descriptions.scene: 4 sentences

location.name: On the deck of the ship

descriptions.intent: Sun Tian orders Sister Qi Jiaoddy and the others to stay behind while he goes first to check for danger, citing the need for caution
descriptions.conflict: The man with the mole on the eyebrow mocks Sun Tian's caution, questioning the need for such measures in what he considers enemy territory
descriptions.state: Sun Tian is authoritative and cautious; the man with the mole on the eyebrow is mocking and dismissive
descriptions.relation: Sun Tian commands the group, while the man with the mole on the eyebrow resists the order with sarcasm
descriptions.outcome: Sun Tian insists on leading the way to ensure safety, despite the mockery of the man with the mole on the eyebrow.

descriptions.title: Sun Tian, Baby Face, Sister Qi Jiaoddy, Man with mole on eyebrow
descriptions.scene: 4 sentences

location.name: On the deck of the ship

descriptions.intent: Sun Tian explains that other teams have already been robbed, and supplies are scarce, justifying the need for caution and silence
descriptions.conflict: The man with the mole on the eyebrow questions the necessity of following orders, while Sun Tian asserts his authority as the commander
descriptions.state: Sun Tian is serious and authoritative; the man with the mole on the eyebrow is defiant and skeptical
descriptions.relation: Sun Tian commands the group, while the man with the mole on the eyebrow resists the order with sarcasm
descriptions.outcome: Sun Tian asserts his authority and orders the group to follow his lead, emphasizing the need for silence and caution.

descriptions.title: Cimena, Sun Tian

descriptions.outcome: Djaodzy and Lyudjunshin secure the boat together after an argument, Djaodzy jumps into the water with a rope, and Lyudjunshin reluctantly follows with a lifebuoy, leaving the surface quiet.

descriptions.title: Djaodzy, Lyudjunshin
descriptions.scene: Djaodzy questions Lyudjunshin about his wet waterproof pants and accuses him of sweating excessively, leading to a heated exchange where Lyudjunshin defends his intelligence and university education.

location.name: On the boat or near the water's edge before jumping in.

descriptions.intent: Djaodzy wants Lyudjunshin to help secure the boat and stop complaining, while Lyudjunshin wants to defend his self-worth and intelligence against Djaodzy's mockery.
descriptions.conflict: Djaodzy mocks Lyudjunshin's wet pants and claims his education is wasted, while Lyudjunshin feels insulted and angry about being treated like a fool or a waste of talent.
descriptions.state: Djaodzy is sarcastic and critical, Lyudjunshin is furious and defensive, both feeling the strain of their roles and the harsh reality of their situation.

outfits.Djaodzy: wet waterproof pants and a nylon rope; Lyudjunshin=standard uniform with a lifebuoy

descriptions.relation: Their relationship is strained by mutual frustration, with Djaodzy trying to push Lyudjunshin into action and Lyudjunshin resisting with verbal attacks.
descriptions.outcome: Djaodzy finishes his rant, grabs a large coil of rescue rope, puts it on his arm, and jumps into the water, forcing Lyudjunshin to follow.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan

descriptions.title: Jiaodizi, Sunxian, Cimen, Ciy, Ludjunshin
descriptions.scene: A wooden wardrobe appears in the field of view of several people. Jiaodizi praises Sunxian for seeing through the trap and quickly moves toward the wardrobe. Cimen looks into the shower but finds no one inside. They decide to hide the target in the wardrobe. Jiaodizi grips a crowbar tightly and cautiously approaches the door of the shed. Sunxian and Ciy have already pointed their lamps and gun barrels at him. Jiaodizi quickly opens the shed door, and a strong smell of odicolone greets them. All three peers inside and stop. A row of neatly tailored suits of the same style and color stands inside. Several black silk costumes for girl rabbits hang near the corner. Various indescribable small toys and a box of unsealed capes lie on the shelf further to the right. Underneath is a small box. When opened, several stacks of unopened one-hundred-dollar bills are removed from the bank. For example, a stack of 10,000 yuan. Jiaodizi raises his hand, grabs a round and fluffy shark tail, grins, and says the general manager is having fun. This means the girl disappeared into thin air. Cimen was a bit unbelievable but quickly discarded her thoughts. Forget whether she is a human or a ghost. Let's first collect the materials we can gather. Jiaodizi. This clothing and condoms can be packed and collected. As for the money, although useless now, we will collect them. This too. While she spoke, she took out a large waterproof bag from her backpack. Yes. But the main goal of our visit to this building is to go to the clinic and find these anti-inflammatory drugs. In that case, Sister Ci, you can leave this place for now. While Sunxian finished speaking, he quickly left but then quickly turned around and returned. Sister Ci, did you notice that Ludjunshin disappeared? Correct. I also said that my ears finally became quieter. Where are Jiaodizi and Ludjunshin? Cimen stopped and looked at Jiaodizi next to him. They entered last. Jiaodizi looked out the door, shrugged, and helplessly said he didn't know. When we first entered the 13th floor, he said his stomach hurt and he wanted to rest. He asked me to approach you first, so I approached first. Then I stumbled upon these strange tracks and forgot about them. He didn't encounter these mutated leeches, right, but these leeches usually exist only near residential areas. Here are sparsely populated areas, so logically there shouldn't be any. Although Cimen analyzed it this way, his heart still felt uneasy.

descriptions.title: Sunxian
descriptions.scene: Sunxian feels unwell and exits the secret room with a gun in his hand. He quickly stops in front of a floor-to-ceiling window above the outbuilding. Outside the window, where a landing craft was previously parked, there are obvious waves. Sunxian says nothing. He focuses on raising the submachine gun, turning the barrel toward the exit of the landing craft, while his eyes look through the scope. A piranha lying on top of the glass window doesn't know what he is going to do. His little eyes rolled up, and he almost turned to look out the window. Cimen and Jiaodizi, who were busy collecting supplies in the secret room, were momentarily stunned, then exited with waterproof bags in their hands. Ludjunshin's reflexive reaction. It's no wonder he continued to ask me how to operate the assault craft. Damn, you know how restless and well-intentioned he is. Jiaodizi reached out and patted his head, suddenly realizing this. We cannot lose our assault craft. Cimen was shocked and was about to run away but was caught by Jiaodizi. Sister Ci, while Brother Sunxian is here, he cannot run far. If you chase him now, it won't help. While she hesitated, the roar of the landing craft's engine was heard from the window. Literally in a second or two, a red landing craft with black stripes burst out of the hole. Sunxian, shoot faster, Cimen said impatiently. Sunxian did not act immediately but silently evaluated the enemy's action route. The submachine gun gave him the feeling of a sniper rifle. Ludjunshin, who was on the water, could not see several people in the glass window. But, holding the motor with one hand, he raised his hand and made a middle finger down toward the suspended wall with a haughty and contemptuous look. A smile on his face. I, Jiaodizi, almost jumped from anger. Ludjunshin had already turned around. At the same time, Sunxian also pulled the trigger. The floor-to-ceiling window shattered. Immediately after this, another bullet flew out of the barrel of the gun and flew with a whistling sound toward Ludjunshin. Ludjunshin's body tensed, and after shaking twice, he slid into the cabin with a splash.
