descriptions.outcome: She leaves the pile of treasures and watches outside and goes directly to the bathroom to rest

descriptions.title: Хуабао
descriptions.scene: Хуабао moves the pile of jewelry boxes to the second bedroom

location.name: The second bedroom next to Dзян Янь's bedroom

descriptions.intent: He wants to organize the jewelry boxes and make space for himself
descriptions.conflict: He has to move the heavy pile of jewelry boxes to the second bedroom
descriptions.state: Tired from eating and temporarily giving up on cooking
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He successfully moves the jewelry boxes to the second bedroom and neatly arranges them together

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь wakes up early the next day and prepares to leave
descriptions.intent: She wants to leave the room and go on an excursion
descriptions.conflict: She needs to get ready quickly and leave the room
descriptions.state: Energetic and ready for the day
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She washes up, eats breakfast, changes into a warm hydro suit, and leaves the room

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь sees a large tourist boat parked below with seats removed and filled with items
descriptions.intent: She wants to inspect the boat and see how the items are packed
descriptions.conflict: She needs to use a telescope to get a better view of the boat
descriptions.state: Curious and observant
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She uses a telescope to inspect the boat and sees that the seats are removed and filled with items packed in waterproof bags

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь observes the crew and guards on the boat
descriptions.intent: She wants to see who is responsible for loading and transporting the goods
descriptions.conflict: She needs to identify the crew and guards
descriptions.state: Observant and curious
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She sees several people responsible for loading and transporting goods, as well as two armed soldiers guarding the boat

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 5 sentences

location.name: Upper deck of a supply ship
location.description: near the bow where cargo handling personnel are stationed

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь uses a telescope to scan the surroundings and identifies the bow crew responsible for cargo transport, noting two armed guards with live ammunition maintaining security as usual
descriptions.conflict: The characters Цимнань and Сунцянь are not immediately spotted, creating a moment of uncertainty about their status or location
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь remains alert and observant, quickly processing visual data from the telescope
descriptions.relation: No interaction between characters yet, only observation
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь confirms the presence of the bow crew and the security guards while failing to spot Цимнань and Сунцянь initially

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь analyzes the volume of goods and deduces that Сунцянь and others must have worked all night to clean and pack the buildings
descriptions.conflict: The dark night limits visibility, forcing reliance on flashlights which makes monitoring the work difficult
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels the weight of the immense workload and understands the necessity of equipping soldiers for protection
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь observes the crew's fatigue and the scale of their efforts
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь realizes the strategic importance of the armed soldiers and the isolation of the building with no front village or back store

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь spots Сунцянь and three others approaching through the telescope, noting their exhausted appearance compared to their energetic state yesterday
descriptions.conflict: The approach is dangerous, requiring careful navigation of the boat to avoid hazards
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels a mix of relief and caution as the figures get closer
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь observes Сунцянь leaning against the boat edge while asleep, holding a ring
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь watches the boat approach slowly and safely due to calm water conditions

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь relaxes after the boat arrives and sits on a dusty sofa, then notices the general manager's door is open
descriptions.conflict: Suspicion arises when Dзян Янь sees the tissue box previously on the tea table has disappeared, suggesting someone returned
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь becomes cautious and decides to wait until the intruders leave further before descending herself
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь suspects the missing tissue box indicates a breach in security
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь plans to wait for the intruders to move away to increase her safety coefficient

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 5 sentences

location.name: Near the tea table
location.description: examining the lower side of the table

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь investigates a hidden compartment under the tea table and discovers valuable supplies including expensive bandjians, Icelandic tea, jasmine tea, green mandarins, and a large box of thirty-year-old mandarin peel
descriptions.conflict: Dзян Янь questions the authenticity of some items like bandjians and Iceland but values the mandarin peel highly
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels a sense of discovery and practicality upon finding the hidden stash
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь interacts with the hidden compartment and its contents
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь stores all the supplies in the available space and waits about 10 minutes before standing up

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь realizes the window period God left for life is not necessarily four days and decides to act immediately without delay
descriptions.conflict: The temperature outside drops, and thick gray clouds suggest impending rain, adding urgency to the situation
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels determined and hurried, stepping like the wind to descend to the thirteenth floor
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь prepares to leave the ship and head towards the city
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь exits the ship and begins navigating towards the city center to visit jewelry stores

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 5 sentences

location.name: Outside the building
location.description: near the breach at the edge

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь plans to close jewelry stores outside the city center and within the fourth transport ring, starting by pulling the rubber boat from space
descriptions.conflict: The distance in the outer ring is larger with fewer stores, and there are no known watch shops outside, requiring more travel time
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels focused and strategic, adjusting her route based on the new geography
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь prepares to swim or paddle to the next destination after visiting a store
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь understands the complexity of the new route involving transfers to assault catamarans or similar vessels

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь continues her journey, planning to visit one location, return to the boat for collection, and proceed to the next destination
descriptions.conflict: She encounters several waves of people also searching for supplies on rubber boats, creating a crowded and tense environment
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь remains vigilant and aware of the surrounding people who are also in a state of alertness
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь observes other people who are wary and do not interfere with each other even when smiling people ask for supplies
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь navigates the crowded waters, maintaining her mission while others remain cautious and silent about their true intentions

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: A makeshift treasure map route connecting jewelry shops
location.description: garden stores, and a construction site on the city outskirts

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь searches for supplies and resources, having visited over 90% of jewelry shops and finding garden stores with intact children's fences
descriptions.conflict: Heavy rain begins at 5-6 PM, limiting her ability to leave the city, and she lacks strength to search the remaining 10% of shops in suburban areas
descriptions.state: Determined but cautious due to the weather and the presence of mutated creatures
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She secures supplies from garden stores and retreats to a construction site for shelter due to worsening weather conditions

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: A partially constructed 15-story office building belonging to an energy company

descriptions.intent: She seeks a safe resting place and decides to use the unfinished office building as a base, entering through the 13th-floor window
descriptions.conflict: She encounters dark shadows moving underwater near the submerged power station, causing her fear of mutated leeches
descriptions.state: Alert and slightly frightened by the mysterious underwater movements
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the shadows are not leeches but a school of large fish, providing a potential new resource

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The edge of the 13th-floor window overlooking the submerged power station

descriptions.intent: She plans to catch the large fish she observed, recognizing them as a potential food source since they are normal-looking
descriptions.conflict: The fish are too far away to catch with a net, and her fishing skills are poor, making direct capture difficult
descriptions.state: Excited yet hesitant about the feasibility of catching the fish
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to use a large fishing cage and corn flour bait instead of a net to attract the fish

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She prepares a trap by mixing corn flour with water to create bait balls and positioning the fishing cage near the fish
descriptions.conflict: She lacks experience in fishing and must improvise techniques based on online videos and observations of other fishermen
descriptions.state: Focused and methodical despite her lack of expertise
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully sets up the trap, securing a bench and using a rope to anchor the cage

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She waits for the fish to be attracted by the scent of the corn flour bait
descriptions.conflict: The fish are cautious and need time to approach the bait, requiring patience from Dзян Янь
descriptions.state: Patient and observant as she watches the water
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The fish smell the bait and begin to approach slowly, with one brave fish eventually entering the cage and eating the corn flour

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь анализирует качество воды и размер рыбы в удалённой местности, предполагая мутации

location.name: Удалённая местность с водой
location.description: отличной от городской, рядом с электростанцией

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь пытается понять научные причины мутаций комаров, пиявок и рыб, а также сосредотачивается на изучении воды
descriptions.conflict: Научные факты противоречат наблюдаемым мутациям и появлению космоса с цветами пиран
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь сосредоточена на анализе, несмотря на невозможность объяснить мутации
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь решает сосредоточиться на воде и ловле рыбы, игнорируя научные противоречия

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь ловит рыбу и поднимает полную клетку
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет поймать рыбу и наполнить клетку
descriptions.conflict: Рыба слишком активна и прыгает из клетки
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь чувствует удовлетворение от успешной ловли
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь успешно поднимает клетку с рыбой на землю

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь изучает пойманную рыбу и определяет её вид
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет изучить пойманную рыбу и определить её вид
descriptions.conflict: Рыба активна и прыгает
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь удивлена размером и видом рыбы
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь определяет рыбу как телапию и замечает её тонкость

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь вспоминает информацию о телапиях и их адаптации
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет понять, как телапии выживают в таких условиях
descriptions.conflict: Температура воды слишком низкая для обычных телапий
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь удивлена выживаемостью рыб
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь предполагает, что рыбы мутировали благодаря естественному отбору

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь помещает рыбу в пространство и наблюдает за реакцией
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет поместить рыбу в пространство для дальнейшего использования
descriptions.conflict: Пространство автоматически классифицирует и помещает материалы в серую область инвентаря
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь ошеломлена умением пространства
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь помещает рыбу в бассейн, который автоматически превращается в пруд

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь решает перенести рыбу позже и уходит
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет перенести рыбу в ручей, когда он появится
descriptions.conflict: Дзян Янь не может контролировать автоматизацию пространства
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь разочарована автоматизацией пространства
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь уходит и ловит больше рыбы, включая карпов, карасей, вьюнов, креветок и черепах

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь ловит больше рыбы и замечает её размер
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет поймать больше рыбы и изучить её
descriptions.conflict: Рыбы и гольцы выплыли наружу из-за повышения уровня воды
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь счастлива от количества пойманной рыбы
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь продолжает ловить рыбу и замечает её нормальный размер

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь решает перестать ловить рыбу и уходит на следующий этаж
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет перестать ловить рыбу из-за темноты
descriptions.conflict: Дзян Янь хочет переночевать на улице, но Сунця нарушает её план
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь устала и хочет отдохнуть
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь уходит на следующий этаж и находит защищённое помещение

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь готовится к возвращению на пчелиную базу
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет вернуться на пчелиную базу до полудня
descriptions.conflict: Дзян Янь чувствует плохое предчувствие из-за сильного дождя
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь тревожится из-за погоды
descriptions.relation: Ничего
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь решает вернуться на пчелиную базу и достать лапшу

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь feels a bad premonition about the weather and decides to return to the Anmin Bee Base before noon to avoid attention, so she quickly prepares instant noodles with a portable stove to eat while packing her gear.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain outside and her need to stay low-profile hinder her plans, as she has not gone out in days and fears attracting attention by over-grooming herself.
descriptions.state: Anxious and cautious due to the storm and her desire to remain hidden.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finishes the hot noodles quickly, warms her body, and packs her equipment to prepare for the journey to the bee base.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Hua Baobao
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь changes into a diving suit and descends to the thirteenth floor to retrieve Hua Baobao, intending to take him to the Anmin Bee Base to check on the seed bank, while Hua Baobao is eager to know their destination.
descriptions.conflict: Hua Baobao is reluctant to reveal that he found new happiness by playing with two turtles near the pool window, creating a minor distraction before they leave.
descriptions.state: Hua Baobao is curious and playful; Dзян Янь is determined and focused on the mission.

outfits.Dзян Янь: diving suit; Hua Baobao=small leaf-like appearance

descriptions.relation: Hua Baobao looks expectantly at Dзян Янь, asking where they are going, showing a close bond.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь shows Hua Baobao the map marking the Anmin Bee Base, and he memorizes the positioning parameters, ready to travel.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Hua Baobao
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь explains that the Seed Bank is a professional facility for storing agricultural seeds, which offers hope for restoration and survival, and decides to add the bee base to their morning route to inspect it.
descriptions.conflict: The previous landslides and mudflows have destroyed most of the buildings at the base, leaving only one half-story house standing amidst the ruins, raising doubts about finding anything useful.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels hopeful about the seeds but cautious about the damaged state of the base.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь praises Hua Baobao's intelligence for noticing the seed bank, strengthening their partnership.
descriptions.outcome: They approach the bee base, which is now mostly destroyed with windows smashed and doors blocked by strange branches, making entry difficult.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь

location.name: Inside the ruined house of the Anmin Bee Base

descriptions.intent: Despite the destruction, Dзян Янь decides to enter the house to check its condition, believing that even if they find nothing today, they must try before it becomes impossible to return later.
descriptions.conflict: The house is heavily damaged by floods, with broken windows and doors blocked by debris, forcing her to find an alternative way in through a single window.
descriptions.state: Determined and slightly disappointed by the extent of the destruction.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь removes her space shuttle, puts on a helmet, and climbs through the only available window to enter the ruined structure.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The protagonist enters a flooded room through a window after blocking a door with branches, wearing a space helmet and holding a flashlight and walking stick.

location.name: A waterlogged room inside a damaged facility
location.description: filled with water up to waist height, floating branches, dead mice, and dead bees.

descriptions.intent: She needs to navigate the flooded interior to find a way out or assess the damage, using her equipment to survive the hazardous environment.
descriptions.conflict: The room is blocked by branches, filled with debris, and the water is contaminated with dead animals, making movement difficult and dangerous.
descriptions.state: Cautious and determined, she moves slowly through the water while inspecting her surroundings with a flashlight.
descriptions.relation: None, she is alone in the room.
descriptions.outcome: She finds a wet, slippery staircase without railings and climbs it slowly, emerging into a brightly lit room with large iron cabinets.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, she inspects a room containing incubators and realizes the bees inside are dead due to power loss and high temperatures.

location.name: A small room with seven or eight large iron cabinets with glass doors
location.description: illuminated by a powerful spotlight replacing her flashlight.

descriptions.intent: She wants to salvage the incubators and potentially use them to hatch other eggs, turning a disaster into an opportunity for agricultural research.
descriptions.conflict: The power is out, the bees are dead, and the backup generator room may be flooded or damaged, limiting her options for maintaining the incubators.
descriptions.state: Focused and analytical, she shifts from despair to problem-solving, considering alternative pollination methods like butterflies or manual pollination.
descriptions.relation: None, she is alone in the room.
descriptions.outcome: She tests the incubators, finds three working, removes dead bees, and decides to hatch various eggs including chicken, duck, goose, and others to create a self-sustaining ecosystem.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: After finishing her inspection, she returns to her shuttle and prepares to leave as the rain intensifies, deciding to head toward the Seed Resource Bank.

location.name: Inside her shuttle
location.description: then approaching the Seed Resource Bank, where a small official-looking ship is docked nearby.

descriptions.intent: She needs to reach the Seed Resource Bank to secure supplies and resources, navigating through worsening weather conditions.
descriptions.conflict: The rain is heavy, visibility is low, and the area around the bank is blocked by debris and people cleaning up, making travel difficult and time-sensitive.
descriptions.state: Urgent and resolute, she refuses to delay despite the worsening conditions, using Hua Bao's navigation to guide her.
descriptions.relation: None, she is alone in the shuttle.
descriptions.outcome: She departs the area, heading toward the bay of Repals, where she transforms her shuttle into a rubber boat and loads it with supplies like instant noodles and sausages.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Approaching the Repals Bay settlement, she observes a chaotic scene of people struggling in floodwaters, some wearing life rings and others with bare torsos and missing limbs.

location.name: The bay of Repals
location.description: near the settlement, where water surrounds buildings and people are floating or wading through debris.

descriptions.intent: She wants to assess the situation and potentially offer help, though her primary goal remains reaching the settlement safely.
descriptions.conflict: The floodwaters are severe, with people trapped or struggling, and the environment is hazardous, making it difficult to navigate without getting caught in the chaos.
descriptions.state: Concerned but cautious, she uses her telescope to observe the scene, noting the desperation of the people and the severity of the flood.
descriptions.relation: Observational, she notes the presence of two young boys with red spots on their faces and groups of people trying to catch something in the water.
descriptions.outcome: She stops her boat a kilometer from the bay, observing the flooded buildings and the desperate efforts of the people, preparing to proceed with caution.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The group forms a 'U' shape underwater to catch fish while ignoring the cold and debris.

location.name: Water near one of the U-shaped nets
location.description: full detailed description of the submerged environment with debris and cold water

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь observes the fishing method and considers returning home due to the worsening rain, but decides to stay and fish.
descriptions.conflict: The strong rain makes returning home less desirable, and the cold water challenges the physical limits of the people.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is observant and slightly reluctant to stay, while the team is determined and fearless of the cold.
descriptions.relation: The team works together in a coordinated formation, and Dзян Янь is an observer who joins their activity.
descriptions.outcome: The team tightens the nets under water, and Dзян Янь realizes the high density of fish despite the poor water quality.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь prepares to leave the fishing spot as the rain intensifies.

location.name: On the water near the fishing nets

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь decides to use her space arm sleeve arrow and paddle to move forward and potentially leave the area.
descriptions.conflict: The rain becomes stronger, making the environment more hostile, but the group refuses to go home.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels the urge to turn back but is compelled to continue by the situation.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь is separate from the main group as she prepares to move independently.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь attaches the arrow to her arm and continues to glide forward on the paddle.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь examines the fish she encounters and compares them to previous catches.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to understand the type of fish and their size to assess their value.
descriptions.conflict: The fish are larger and thicker than those from the space station, but they are not Tilapia.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is curious and analytical about the fish species.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь is alone in her observation of the fish.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь identifies the fish as resembling carp and white amur with two whiskers on their mouths.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь is noticed by a group of people fishing from a distance.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь is unaware she is being watched, but the fishermen are interested in her rubber boat.
descriptions.conflict: The fishermen want to rent her boat, but Dзян Янь is focused on her own journey.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is indifferent to the attention, while the fishermen are eager to engage with her.
descriptions.relation: The fishermen are curious about Dзян Янь's boat and her presence.
descriptions.outcome: The fishermen approach Dзян Янь and offer to rent her boat for a fee.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь considers the offer to rent her boat and the value of the fish.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to evaluate the offer and decide whether to rent her boat or continue her journey.
descriptions.conflict: The fishermen insist on renting the boat, but Dзян Янь is not interested in the transaction.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is firm in her decision not to rent the boat, while the fishermen are persistent.
descriptions.relation: The fishermen are trying to persuade Dзян Янь to rent her boat, but she remains uninterested.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь declines the offer and continues to glide forward without changing her expression.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь is approached by a man with curly hair who makes a joke about her appearance.
descriptions.intent: The man with curly hair wants to engage Dзян Янь in conversation and make a joke about her beauty.
descriptions.conflict: Dзян Янь is not amused by the joke and remains focused on her journey.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is indifferent to the joke, while the man with curly hair is playful and flirtatious.
descriptions.relation: The man with curly hair is trying to flirt with Dзян Янь, but she is not receptive to his advances.
descriptions.outcome: The man with curly hair continues to joke, but Dзян Янь remains focused on her journey.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь is approached by another man who questions her decision to rent her boat.
descriptions.intent: The man questioning her decision wants to know why she is renting her boat and suggests she should wait for the official boat.
descriptions.conflict: Dзян Янь is not interested in renting her boat, and the man is trying to persuade her to change her mind.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is firm in her decision not to rent her boat, while the man is trying to convince her otherwise.
descriptions.relation: The man is trying to persuade Dзян Янь to change her mind, but she remains uninterested.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь continues to glide forward without changing her expression, ignoring the man's attempts to persuade her.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь is approached by a man who mentions the official boat will arrive tomorrow.
descriptions.intent: The man mentioning the official boat wants to inform Dзян Янь that the official boat will arrive tomorrow and she does not need to rent her boat.
descriptions.conflict: Dзян Янь is not interested in the official boat and continues to glide forward.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is indifferent to the news about the official boat, while the man is trying to inform her.
descriptions.relation: The man is trying to inform Dзян Янь about the official boat, but she remains uninterested.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь continues to glide forward without changing her expression, ignoring the man's attempts to inform her.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь argues with a man on a boat about fishing regulations and the official announcement

location.name: A boat on a river during rain
location.description: surrounded by other boats and people

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to fish legally and avoid conflict with the official announcement
descriptions.conflict: The man questions her motives and suggests she is fishing because home is not warm enough
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is annoyed and defensive about the accusations
descriptions.relation: Tense argument between Dзяньянь and the man
descriptions.outcome: The man continues to question her motives while she remains firm

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: An official boat arrives but does not take anyone away
descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь expects to be taken away or fined by the officials
descriptions.conflict: The officials do not take anyone away due to limited transport capacity
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is confused and frustrated by the lack of action
descriptions.relation: Disappointment between Dзяньянь and the officials
descriptions.outcome: No one is taken away despite the arrival of the official boat

descriptions.title: Old Cow
descriptions.scene: The old cow expresses her frustration about sitting at home

location.name: Near the riverbank or on a boat

descriptions.intent: The old cow wants to go out and fish instead of sitting at home
descriptions.conflict: She feels trapped at home like being in prison
descriptions.state: The old cow is restless and unhappy
descriptions.relation: Shared sentiment with Dзяньянь about the restrictions
descriptions.outcome: The old cow expresses her desire to leave home

descriptions.title: Man near Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: A man suggests preparing for a rainy day regardless of the official boat's arrival
descriptions.intent: The man wants to be prepared for any weather conditions
descriptions.conflict: The weather is unpredictable and might rain again
descriptions.state: The man is cautious and pragmatic
descriptions.relation: Advice given to Dзяньянь about the weather
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь considers the advice but remains focused on her current situation

descriptions.title: Lao Jian
descriptions.scene: Lao Jian offers to rent a boat to Dзяньянь for a short time

location.name: On the river near Dзяньянь's boat

descriptions.intent: Lao Jian wants to help Dзяньянь by renting her a boat
descriptions.conflict: Dзяньянь refuses his offer politely
descriptions.state: Lao Jian is persistent and friendly
descriptions.relation: Lao Jian tries to assist Dзяньянь
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь declines his offer firmly

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь refuses Lao Jian's offer to rent a boat

location.name: On the river near Lao Jian's boat

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to keep her independence and not rely on others
descriptions.conflict: Lao Jian insists she is not a child and should not be so stingy
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is firm and unyielding
descriptions.relation: Dзяньянь stands her ground against Lao Jian
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь maintains her refusal to rent a boat

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь confronts a man who accuses her of being heartless

location.name: On the river near the group of fishermen

descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to defend her reputation and actions
descriptions.conflict: The man accuses her of being heartless and refusing to share fish
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is angry and defensive
descriptions.relation: Conflict escalates between Dзяньянь and the accuser
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь retorts with a counter-accusation about his own behavior

descriptions.title: Group of Fishermen
descriptions.scene: A group of fishermen surrounds Dзяньянь's boat with hostile intentions

location.name: On the river near Dзяньянь's boat

descriptions.intent: The fishermen want to take advantage of Dзяньянь's situation
descriptions.conflict: Dзяньянь tries to maintain her distance and dignity
descriptions.state: The fishermen are aggressive and opportunistic
descriptions.relation: Hostile confrontation between Dзяньянь and the fishermen
descriptions.outcome: The fishermen approach Dзяньянь's boat with threatening gestures

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь faces a physical threat from two swimmers on her boat
descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь wants to protect herself and her boat
descriptions.conflict: The swimmers try to grab her boat and threaten her
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is fearful but determined
descriptions.relation: Physical confrontation between Dзяньянь and the swimmers
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь draws a knife and a cry is heard as blood mixes with raindrops

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhan Yan turns around, sighs, and coldly tells someone to let go while they stare at each other with sparkling eyes and smile with twisted lips while their bodies remain motionless
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to end the confrontation and move forward without further conflict
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the two characters and the sudden appearance of a sword
descriptions.state: Calm but tense, ready for action
descriptions.relation: Antagonistic but playful
descriptions.outcome: A sword is drawn and a cry is heard as red blood mixed with raindrops falls into the water

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: A bow is aimed at another person, and a man quickly withdraws his hand while people behind him tremble and stop moving
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to avoid being killed and escape the situation
descriptions.conflict: The threat of being shot and the presence of people wanting to surround her
descriptions.state: Fearful but quick-thinking
descriptions.relation: Defensive against the threat
descriptions.outcome: Zhan Yan uses the water channel to swim towards the window of the sixteenth floor of the building

descriptions.title: Old Jiao
descriptions.scene: Old Jiao suddenly speaks to a man from Building A who is looking at Zhan Yan, causing another man to look at him like a fool and then at Zhan Yan
descriptions.intent: Old Jiao wants to warn or communicate with the man from Building A
descriptions.conflict: The confusion and misunderstanding among the people from Building A
descriptions.state: Confused and wary
descriptions.relation: Suspicious and cautious
descriptions.outcome: The man from Building A realizes what is happening and instinctively retreats

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhan Yan wears windproof and waterproof goggles on her face and a cloak on her body, making her unrecognizable to those who know her
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to maintain her anonymity and protect herself
descriptions.conflict: The suspicion and curiosity of the people around her
descriptions.state: Determined and cautious
descriptions.relation: Unfamiliar to many
descriptions.outcome: Even those who know her may not recognize her at first glance

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: People admire and value Zhan Yan for revealing the truth about blood-sucking mosquitoes and leading her people to kill Ludaohun and his band, while some still have doubts about her abilities
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to maintain her reputation and avoid unnecessary conflict
descriptions.conflict: The mix of admiration and suspicion among the people
descriptions.state: Confident but aware of the risks
descriptions.relation: Respected but doubted
descriptions.outcome: Rumors circulate about her being a sniper with a gun

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: People discuss the strange appearance of Zhan Yan in the bay of rejection, comparing her to a chicken or dog rising to heaven or falling on an altar
descriptions.intent: People want to understand the situation and discuss it after dinner
descriptions.conflict: The confusion and lack of understanding among the people
descriptions.state: Curious and speculative
descriptions.relation: Speculative and curious
descriptions.outcome: The remaining people do not understand the meaning of the conversation between the two people

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: A group of people lying by the window of the sixteenth floor of Building A watches the rubber boat of Zhan Yan approaching the corridor window, while some people initially standing at the entrance of the corridor blocking the road consciously move aside and stand opposite the wall
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to reach the window and escape
descriptions.conflict: The presence of people blocking the way and the need to navigate around them
descriptions.state: Focused and determined
descriptions.relation: Cooperative and cautious
descriptions.outcome: The rubber boat quickly approaches the window, and people watch it as if it were a show

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhan Yan presses the rubber boat tightly against the wall, places her hands on the windowsill, and quickly and easily climbs up, then pulls a fixed rope upwards to pull the rubber boat up
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to reach the upper floors and escape
descriptions.conflict: The physical effort required to climb and pull the boat up
descriptions.state: Strong and determined
descriptions.relation: Independent and resourceful
descriptions.outcome: Zhan Yan successfully pulls the rubber boat up under the shocked and indifferent gazes of everyone

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhan Yan removes her cloak and puts it in a white plastic bag, then carries the rubber boat on her shoulders and slowly walks towards the fire door
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to reach the fire door and continue her escape
descriptions.conflict: The physical burden of carrying the rubber boat and the need to navigate the corridor
descriptions.state: Tired but determined
descriptions.relation: Independent and resourceful
descriptions.outcome: Zhan Yan successfully carries the rubber boat towards the fire door

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: People behind Zhan Yan comment on her arrogance and speculate about the official ship that arrived today, while Zhan Yan does not hear or care about their words
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to ignore the comments and continue her escape
descriptions.conflict: The distractions and comments from the people behind her
descriptions.state: Indifferent and focused
descriptions.relation: Unaffected by the comments
descriptions.outcome: Zhan Yan continues her escape without paying attention to the comments

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhan Yan reaches the corner of the seventeenth floor, wipes the water from her face, takes out a mask from the room, and puts it on her face, then takes out a flashlight
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to protect herself and navigate the dark environment
descriptions.conflict: The need to protect herself from the elements and navigate the dark environment
descriptions.state: Cautious and prepared
descriptions.relation: Self-protective and prepared
descriptions.outcome: Zhan Yan successfully puts on the mask and takes out the flashlight

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhan Yan carries the rubber boat up and soon reaches the thirtieth floor, where she hears a fierce argument from above
descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan wants to reach the thirtieth floor and continue her escape
descriptions.conflict: The noise and argument from above
descriptions.state: Alert and cautious
descriptions.relation: Unaffected by the noise
descriptions.outcome: Zhan Yan successfully reaches the thirtieth floor and hears the argument

descriptions.title: Ecing Sunzinta
descriptions.scene: Ecing Sunzinta warns someone to open the door or face the official people coming tomorrow, while emphasizing that neighbors should help each other
descriptions.intent: Ecing Sunzinta wants to resolve the situation and avoid conflict
descriptions.conflict: The refusal to open the door and the threat of official people
descriptions.state: Urgent and serious
descriptions.relation: Urgent and serious
descriptions.outcome: The situation remains tense with the threat of official people coming tomorrow

descriptions.title: Zhan Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhan Yan ascends the stairs and reaches the 30th floor where she overhears a fierce argument above her involving Jiejin Sunzintaoy and others.

location.name: Stairwell leading to the 30th floor
location.description: a vertical corridor connecting lower levels to the upper residential blocks

descriptions.intent: Zhan Yan intends to investigate the commotion and follow the footsteps of the people arguing above to understand the situation unfolding on the upper floors.
descriptions.conflict: The intense shouting match above involves accusations of illegal weapon possession, hoarding supplies, and threats of robbery if the door is not opened, creating a volatile atmosphere that Zhan Yan must navigate.
descriptions.state: Zhan Yan is alert and cautious, observing the chaotic scene above while trying to maintain her composure amidst the noise and tension.
descriptions.relation: Zhan Yan is an observer separated from the conflict above by the physical barrier of the stairs
descriptions.outcome: Zhan Yan stops ascending, turns sideways, and looks up to see a dense crowd of people armed with rifles and sticks surrounding the staircase leading down from the fire door on the 32nd floor.

descriptions.title: Crowd on 32nd Floor
descriptions.scene: A dense crowd of people armed with rifles, sticks, lifebuoys, and other items from remaining buildings surrounds the staircase on the 32nd floor, blocking the path and creating a hostile environment.

location.name: Staircase leading down from the fire door on the 32nd floor
location.description: a narrow vertical passage filled with armed individuals

descriptions.intent: The crowd demands supplies, accuses Jiejin Sunzintaoy of illegal weapon possession, and threatens to rob them if they do not share their hoarded resources or move to the 32nd floor.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's aggressive demands and threats of violence clash with Jiejin Sunzintaoy's attempt to defend their position and supplies, leading to escalating tension and verbal abuse.
descriptions.state: The crowd is hostile, aggressive, and united in their demand for supplies, while Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai are defensive and trying to maintain control over their limited group.
descriptions.relation: The crowd is hostile towards Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai, viewing them as hoarders and criminals, while Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai are defensive and trying to protect their interests.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd's aggression escalates, with Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai standing guard at the door, creating a standoff that threatens to turn violent.

descriptions.title: Jiejin Sunzintaoy
descriptions.scene: Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai stand guard at the fire door on the 32nd floor, holding weapons and maintaining a defensive position against the hostile crowd below.

location.name: Fire door on the 32nd floor
location.description: a fortified position overlooking the staircase below

descriptions.intent: Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai intend to defend their supplies and weapons from the hostile crowd, using their strategic position and weapons to deter any attempts to rob them.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's demands for supplies and threats of violence clash with Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai's desire to protect their resources, leading to a tense standoff that could easily escalate into physical conflict.
descriptions.state: Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai are calm, controlled, and confident in their ability to defend themselves, despite being outnumbered by the hostile crowd.
descriptions.relation: Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai are allies working together to defend their position against the hostile crowd
descriptions.outcome: The standoff continues, with Jiejin Sunzintaoy and Sui Dai maintaining their defensive position and the crowd pressing their demands, creating a tense and volatile situation.

descriptions.title: Sui Dai
descriptions.scene: Sui Dai argues with the crowd, defending Jiejin Sunzintaoy and accusing the crowd of being unreasonable and lacking conscience, while trying to de-escalate the situation through verbal confrontation.

location.name: Fire door on the 32nd floor
location.description: a fortified position overlooking the staircase below

descriptions.intent: Sui Dai intends to defend Jiejin Sunzintaoy and the group's reputation, arguing that the crowd's accusations are baseless and that they should not be treated as criminals.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's accusations of illegal weapon possession and hoarding clash with Sui Dai's defense of their actions, leading to a verbal confrontation that could easily escalate into physical conflict.
descriptions.state: Sui Dai is angry, defensive, and trying to maintain control over the situation through verbal confrontation, despite the crowd's hostility and aggression.
descriptions.relation: Sui Dai is defending Jiejin Sunzintaoy against the crowd's accusations, while the crowd is hostile and accusatory towards both of them
descriptions.outcome: Sui Dai's defense is met with further accusations and threats from the crowd, leading to an escalation of tension and the potential for violence.

descriptions.title: Jiejin Sunzintaoy
descriptions.scene: Jiejin Sunzintaoy responds to the crowd's accusations with a calm but threatening tone, asserting their right to keep their supplies and warning the crowd of the consequences of their aggression.

location.name: Fire door on the 32nd floor
location.description: a fortified position overlooking the staircase below

descriptions.intent: Jiejin Sunzintaoy intends to assert their right to keep their supplies and warn the crowd of the consequences of their aggression, using their weapons and strategic position to deter any attempts to rob them.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's demands for supplies and threats of violence clash with Jiejin Sunzintaoy's desire to protect their resources, leading to a tense standoff that could easily escalate into physical conflict.
descriptions.state: Jiejin Sunzintaoy is calm, controlled, and confident in their ability to defend themselves, despite being outnumbered by the hostile crowd.
descriptions.relation: Jiejin Sunzintaoy is defending their position against the crowd's accusations and demands, while the crowd is hostile and accusatory towards both of them
descriptions.outcome: Jiejin Sunzintaoy's warning is met with further accusations and threats from the crowd, leading to an escalation of tension and the potential for violence.

descriptions.title: Jiejin Sunzintaoy
descriptions.scene: Jiejin Sunzintaoy delivers a final warning to the crowd, asserting their right to keep their supplies and warning of the consequences of their aggression, while maintaining a calm but threatening demeanor.

location.name: Fire door on the 32nd floor
location.description: a fortified position overlooking the staircase below

descriptions.intent: Jiejin Sunzintaoy intends to assert their right to keep their supplies and warn the crowd of the consequences of their aggression, using their weapons and strategic position to deter any attempts to rob them.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's demands for supplies and threats of violence clash with Jiejin Sunzintaoy's desire to protect their resources, leading to a tense standoff that could easily escalate into physical conflict.
descriptions.state: Jiejin Sunzintaoy is calm, controlled, and confident in their ability to defend themselves, despite being outnumbered by the hostile crowd.
descriptions.relation: Jiejin Sunzintaoy is defending their position against the crowd's accusations and demands, while the crowd is hostile and accusatory towards both of them
descriptions.outcome: Jiejin Sunzintaoy's warning is met with further accusations and threats from the crowd, leading to an escalation of tension and the potential for violence.

descriptions.title: Jiejin Sunzintaoy
descriptions.scene: Jiejin Sunzintaoy delivers a final warning to the crowd, asserting their right to keep their supplies and warning of the consequences of their aggression, while maintaining a calm but threatening demeanor.

descriptions.title: Djan Danya
descriptions.scene: Djan Danya loses balance on the stairs and falls, sustaining fatal head injuries
descriptions.intent: Djan Danya attempts to navigate the stairs but fails due to instability
descriptions.conflict: Gravity and physical instability cause an immediate fall
descriptions.state: Physically compromised, head shattered, eyes bulging, mouth tilted
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Djan Danya dies instantly after hitting the stairs, leaving a corpse behind.

descriptions.title: Joe Cao
descriptions.scene: Joe Cao confronts the group about killing people in broad daylight and warns of official inspectors
descriptions.intent: Joe Cao demands justice and warns of impending official inspection
descriptions.conflict: The group hesitates to engage verbally but refuses to leave the area
descriptions.state: Angry, suspicious, yet restrained by fear of official scrutiny
descriptions.relation: Joe Cao stands out as a moral authority against the group's actions
descriptions.outcome: The group retreats slightly but refuses to leave, citing fear of losing the body.

descriptions.title: Sunt Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Sunt Dzentao stands up and declares willingness to fight anyone who comes
descriptions.intent: Sunt Dzentao vows to kill anyone who approaches the 32nd floor
descriptions.conflict: Ecin questions their presence and asks them to leave
descriptions.state: Aggressive, defiant, ready for combat
descriptions.relation: Sunt Dzentao leads the defensive stance against outsiders
descriptions.outcome: The group remains silent under Ecin's cold gaze, unable to argue.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Group Member
descriptions.scene: A group member expresses despair and refuses to leave despite others wanting to flee
descriptions.intent: The member wants to stay to guard the body of Djan Danya
descriptions.conflict: Fear of being killed by the enemy if they leave vs. desire to escape
descriptions.state: Depressed, resigned, fearful
descriptions.relation: The group agrees to stay together to protect the corpse
descriptions.outcome: Everyone sits down on the stairs, forming a defensive perimeter.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan observes from the 30th floor, feels neck pain, and decides to descend with a rubber boat
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to investigate the situation below and retrieve supplies
descriptions.conflict: Darkness and uncertainty about what lies below
descriptions.state: Painful, cautious, determined
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan descends slowly while others watch from above.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Group Members
descriptions.scene: Group members notice Dzian Yan approaching with a rubber boat and react with surprise
descriptions.intent: Group members want to identify Dzian Yan and assess her intentions
descriptions.conflict: Uncertainty about Dzian Yan's identity and capabilities
descriptions.state: Curious, wary, excited
descriptions.relation: Group members form a narrow path for Dzian Yan to pass
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan stops at the corner of the staircase, refusing to proceed further.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan halts her descent and addresses the group, offering to return first
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to return to the water to catch fish and avoid conflict
descriptions.conflict: Group members are confused by her sudden change in demeanor
descriptions.state: Calm, composed, slightly amused
descriptions.relation: Group members respect her authority and stop pressing her
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan places the rubber boat on the ground and removes her backpack.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Group Member
descriptions.scene: A group member notices Dzian Yan unzipping her backpack and panics thinking she has a gun
descriptions.intent: Group member wants to avoid confrontation and stay calm
descriptions.conflict: Fear of hidden weapons and potential violence
descriptions.state: Panicked, anxious, confused
descriptions.relation: Group members shift positions to avoid triggering Dzian Yan
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan remains calm and continues her descent without revealing any weapon.

descriptions.title: Ecin
descriptions.scene: Ecin follows several people down the stairs and offers help with the rubber boat
descriptions.intent: Ecin wants to assist Dzian Yan and maintain order
descriptions.conflict: Need to coordinate movement in a dark, confined space
descriptions.state: Helpful, cooperative, cautious
descriptions.relation: Ecin and Dzian Yan share a moment of mutual respect
descriptions.outcome: Ecin helps Dzian Yan with the rubber boat as they move down together.

descriptions.title: Sunt Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Sunt Dzentao approaches Dzian Yan and expresses joy at her return
descriptions.intent: Sunt Dzentao wants to celebrate Dzian Yan's return and discuss recent events
descriptions.conflict: Emotional tension from separation and uncertainty
descriptions.state: Joyful, relieved, affectionate
descriptions.relation: Sunt Dzentao and Dzian Yan share a warm reunion
descriptions.outcome: Sunt Dzentao suggests they go home to talk and mentions gifts brought for them.

descriptions.title: Sunt Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Sunt Dzentao explains the gifts received from the official ship and offers to resolve issues

location.name: Near the bottom of the stairs

descriptions.intent: Sunt Dzentao wants to share news and provide comfort
descriptions.conflict: Dzian Yan's curiosity about official ships and supplies
descriptions.state: Enthusiastic, generous, reassuring
descriptions.relation: Sunt Dzentao and Dzian Yan bond over shared experiences
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan accepts the invitation to go home and listens to Sunt Dzentao's explanation.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Suidai explains she bought a stove for Dzian Yan to drink something hot and promises to fix other unpleasant things later, while noting Dzian Yan only had a backpack so she likely found few supplies.
descriptions.intent: Suidai wants to comfort Dzian Yan and ensure she has hot drinks and supplies, while Dzian Yan intends to manage her own situation and supplies.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of supplies and the need to manage limited resources like the inflatable boat and food packs.
descriptions.state: Suidai is enthusiastic and caring, while Dzian Yan is slightly confused but appreciative of the help.
descriptions.relation: Suidai and Dzian Yan are close friends or allies, showing mutual care and support
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan accepts the stove and the explanation, feeling reassured about her situation.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Suidai places the inflatable boat at Dzian Yan's door, and Dzian Yan decides to return it to the house while waiting outside with Suidai and Sun Dzentao.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to keep the house tidy and not intrude on others' space, while Suidai insists on waiting outside to respect everyone's sense of propriety.
descriptions.conflict: The decision of where to place the inflatable boat and whether to enter the house.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is thoughtful and considerate, while Suidai is assertive about maintaining propriety.
descriptions.relation: Suidai and Dzian Yan share a sense of propriety and respect for each other's space
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan returns the inflatable boat and backpack to the house, and they wait outside together.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan exits the house with a red plastic bag, which she hands to Suidai, revealing it contains seeds of cabbage, pumpkin, and melon.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to share the seeds she found with Suidai, while Suidai is surprised and delighted by the discovery.
descriptions.conflict: The surprise of finding seeds and the need to decide how to use them.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is calm and resourceful, while Suidai is excited and grateful.
descriptions.relation: Dzian Yan and Suidai share a bond of trust and mutual support
descriptions.outcome: Suidai is thrilled about the seeds and plans to share them with Dzian Yan.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan explains she found the seeds at an electronics company building, where there were two packets of cabbage and pumpkin seeds, and suggests dividing them equally.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to ensure fair distribution of the seeds, while Suidai is eager to use them for growing vegetables.
descriptions.conflict: The limited supply of seeds and the need to decide how to use them effectively.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is practical and generous, while Suidai is optimistic and ready to act.
descriptions.relation: Dzian Yan and Suidai share a sense of fairness and cooperation
descriptions.outcome: They agree to divide the seeds equally and plan to use them for growing vegetables.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Suidai notices a flower pot being carried by someone and discusses the potential impact of high temperatures on seed germination, noting that with water, vegetables can still be grown despite slow growth due to lack of sunlight and low temperatures.
descriptions.intent: Suidai wants to ensure the seeds are used effectively, while Dzian Yan is interested in the gardening process.
descriptions.conflict: The challenges of growing vegetables in adverse conditions like low sunlight and temperature.
descriptions.state: Suidai is knowledgeable and optimistic, while Dzian Yan is curious and willing to learn.
descriptions.relation: Suidai and Dzian Yan share a bond of shared knowledge and optimism
descriptions.outcome: They decide to proceed with growing the vegetables despite the challenges.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Dzentao comments on the good understanding between Dzian Yan and Suidai, and Dzian Yan feels embarrassed as Suidai playfully pulls her towards the house, explaining that the house was a bit messy recently.
descriptions.intent: Sun Dzentao wants to acknowledge the good relationship between Dzian Yan and Suidai, while Dzian Yan feels a bit embarrassed but appreciates the compliment.
descriptions.conflict: The need to maintain a good relationship while dealing with the mess in the house.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is slightly embarrassed but happy, while Suidai is playful and confident.
descriptions.relation: Dzian Yan and Suidai share a playful and friendly dynamic
descriptions.outcome: They enter the house together, and Dzian Yan feels a bit embarrassed but happy about the compliment.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Inside the house, Dzian Yan is surprised by the large windows and the well-stocked living room, which contains food, clothes, and various items, some of which are wet and damaged from being rescued from water.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to understand the extent of the supplies and how they were managed, while Suidai explains the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The need to manage the wet and damaged supplies and ensure they are properly stored and used.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is curious and slightly overwhelmed, while Suidai is calm and organized.
props: hydroponic containers made from mineral water bottles
descriptions.relation: Dzian Yan and Suidai share a bond of trust and mutual support
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan is impressed by the well-stocked living room and the efforts made to prepare for future challenges.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan notices green sprouts in the flower pots and green garlic and chives in the mineral water bottles, and Suidai explains that her mother-in-law brought seeds when she visited during Dzian Yan's pregnancy, and they plan to grow vegetables in the city to be self-sufficient in case of future crises.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to learn about the gardening process and how to use the seeds effectively, while Suidai shares her knowledge and plans.
descriptions.conflict: The need to manage the limited seeds and ensure they are used effectively for growing vegetables.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is curious and eager to learn, while Suidai is knowledgeable and optimistic.
descriptions.relation: Dzian Yan and Suidai share a bond of shared knowledge and optimism
descriptions.outcome: They decide to use the seeds to grow vegetables and be self-sufficient in case of future crises.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Dzentao offers Dzian Yan a bottle of mineral water, which Dzian Yan accepts with gratitude, but she decides not to drink it due to the bitter taste, and instead places it down while mentioning that there are people fishing below.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to stay hydrated but is hesitant to drink the bitter water, while Suidai explains the situation with the fishing.
descriptions.conflict: The need to manage the limited water supply and ensure it is used effectively.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is cautious and appreciative, while Suidai is calm and informative.
descriptions.relation: Dzian Yan and Suidai share a bond of trust and mutual support
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan accepts the water but decides not to drink it, and they discuss the fishing situation.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Suidai explains that they caught several fish using a gun given to them the previous day, but the water was too deep and crowded with people, making it difficult to catch more, and that the fishing families work together and share the catch equally.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to understand the fishing situation and how the catch is managed, while Suidai provides details about the process.
descriptions.conflict: The need to manage the limited fishing resources and ensure fair distribution of the catch.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is curious and interested, while Suidai is informative and calm.
descriptions.relation: Dzian Yan and Suidai share a bond of trust and mutual support
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan gains a better understanding of the fishing situation and the efforts made to ensure fair distribution of the catch.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Suidai, Sun Dzentao
descriptions.scene: Dzian Yan asks if an official ship will come tomorrow to pick up people, and Suidai confirms this, but Dzian Yan notes that the people seem tense and asks if they are used to such situations.
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan wants to understand the upcoming event and the mood of the people, while Suidai provides context about the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The need to manage the tension and ensure everyone is prepared for the official ship's arrival.
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is concerned and curious, while Suidai is calm and reassuring.
descriptions.relation: Dzian Yan and Suidai share a bond of trust and mutual support
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan gains a better understanding of the situation and the mood of the people, and they prepare for the official ship's arrival.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь asks if an official ship will come tomorrow to take people, noting the lack of relaxation among the crowd despite the news.

location.name: Outside the settlement
location.description: amidst people fishing and buying supplies

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь seeks to understand the urgency and the specific conditions for leaving the settlement to ensure safety for his family.
descriptions.conflict: The atmosphere is tense and chaotic, with everyone busy, contradicting the expectation of relief that an official ship's arrival should bring.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is hesitant and confused by the tension; Судай is quiet and sighs, hiding her true knowledge.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь questions Судай's observation; Судай explains the situation calmly.
descriptions.outcome: Судай confirms the ship comes but reveals the harsh reality of the selection process, leaving Dзян Янь puzzled by the lack of relaxation.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Судай explains that the official ship takes people in batches, specifically young men aged 16-35 and women aged 18-30, unless they have specific skills like carpentry or welding.
descriptions.intent: Судай aims to clarify the official criteria for evacuation to manage Dзян Янь's expectations and fears.
descriptions.conflict: The criteria seem arbitrary and harsh, focusing on youth and reproductive potential rather than immediate survival needs for the elderly or sick.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is frowning and troubled by the specific age limits; Судай is serious and informative.
descriptions.relation: Судай provides detailed information that contradicts Dзян Янь's hope for a simple rescue.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь learns that the selection is systematic and that those without skills or in the wrong age range are left behind.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Судай reveals that the current base is in the Twin Towers of Anming, which have over 60 floors and can accommodate more people, but the space is limited.

location.name: Near the Twin Towers of Anming

descriptions.intent: Судай wants to explain the logistical constraints of the new base and why some people are crowded in specific buildings.
descriptions.conflict: The limited space in the towers forces a selection process, leaving many without a place to stay or a way to leave.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is processing the scale of the operation; Судай is resigned to the harsh realities of the new base.
descriptions.relation: Судай explains the physical limitations of the new location; Dзян Янь accepts the information without surprise.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь understands that the official ship is just the first wave and that the situation is far more complex than a simple evacuation.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Судай points out that the selection process clearly filters for young labor and women for childbirth, ignoring the needs of families with children and the elderly.
descriptions.intent: Судай wants to highlight the cruelty of the selection process and the fact that it prioritizes demographic dividends over immediate humanitarian aid.
descriptions.conflict: The official policy contradicts the usual disaster relief protocols that prioritize the weak, sick, and pregnant, creating a moral dilemma.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is shocked by the shift in priorities; Судай is cynical and aware of the underlying power struggles.
descriptions.relation: Судай shares her critical view of the officials' motives; Dзян Янь listens thoughtfully, realizing the depth of the corruption.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь realizes that the officials are more concerned with their own power and profit than the survival of the population.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Судай explains that most families cannot leave because of the bad weather and the need to protect their children and elderly, but the sheer number of people still makes the departing group significant.
descriptions.intent: Судай wants to reassure Dзян Янь that despite the low number of volunteers, the total number of people leaving is still substantial.
descriptions.conflict: The weather and family obligations prevent many from leaving, yet the demographic pressure forces the selection of the available young people.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is concerned about his own family's safety; Судай is pragmatic and focused on the big picture.
descriptions.relation: Судай balances the emotional weight of leaving families with the cold reality of the numbers; Dзян Янь is conflicted.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь understands that the number of people leaving is still large enough to impact the population dynamics significantly.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь notes that the high-rise settlements near the Twin Towers are excluded from the selection, and he is not surprised by this official approach.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to confirm that the exclusion of high-rise residents is a deliberate policy choice by the officials.
descriptions.conflict: The exclusion of high-rise residents suggests a hierarchy where some areas are deemed more valuable or secure than others.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is resigned to the official logic; Судай agrees that the system is flawed but functional for the officials.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь and Судай share a mutual understanding of the official priorities; both are critical of the system.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь accepts that the officials are playing a long game, prioritizing their own interests over the immediate needs of the population.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь asks if Судай plans to go with the official ship tomorrow, given that she and her friends meet the age and skill requirements.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to know Судай's intentions and hopes she will leave to ensure her safety and that of her friends.
descriptions.conflict: Судай refuses to go, surprising Dзян Янь and challenging his assumption that leaving is the only safe option.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is surprised and confused by Судай's refusal; Судай is firm and determined to stay.
descriptions.relation: Судай's refusal creates a conflict between Dзян Янь's desire for her safety and her own resolve to stay and fight.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь is left wondering why Судай would choose to stay in a chaotic and dangerous environment when she could leave.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Судай explains that the base is still in its early stages, chaotic, and that the people on top are fighting for power while the people below work hard.
descriptions.intent: Судай wants to convey that the base is not a safe haven and that the people in charge are self-serving.
descriptions.conflict: The chaos and power struggles at the top make the base an unreliable refuge, contradicting the idea of it being a temporary shelter.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is realizing the extent of the corruption and the lack of trust in the official system; Судай is cynical and aware of the internal conflicts.
descriptions.relation: Судай shares her private investigation findings with Dзян Янь, who listens intently; both are critical of the officials.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь understands that the base is a battleground for power and that staying there requires a different kind of strength.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Судай emphasizes the importance of self-sufficiency and freedom from control, hinting that she has private information she cannot fully share.
descriptions.intent: Судай wants to convince Dзян Янь that independence is better than relying on the chaotic official system.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of information and the chaotic environment make it difficult to plan for the future, but Судай believes in the power of self-reliance.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is thoughtful and considering Судай's words; Судай is determined and secretive about her true knowledge.
descriptions.relation: Судай trusts Dзян Янь enough to share her private insights; Dзян Янь respects her decision to stay.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь agrees that isolation is not an option and that they must stay informed about the changing world.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь reflects on the long history of human evolution and the ability to survive disasters, concluding that as long as people survive, there is hope.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to find a sense of hope and resilience in the face of the overwhelming challenges and official corruption.
descriptions.conflict: The internal power struggles and the harsh selection process threaten to break the human spirit, but Dзян Янь refuses to give up.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is hopeful and determined; Судай is calm and accepting of the situation.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь and Судай share a common goal of survival and resilience; both are critical of the officials but focused on the future.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь and Судай agree to stay and face the challenges together, relying on their own strength and the lessons of human history.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь, Судай
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Квартира Дзян Янь
location.description: застеклённый балкон с обычным стеклом, вид на дождливую улицу с ветром

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь решает остаться дома и не идти завтра, обсуждая безопасность оружия и планы на будущее
descriptions.conflict: Официальные люди могут конфисковать оружие, а погода ухудшается, создавая угрозу для выхода на улицу
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь спокойна и бесстрашна, Судай беспокоится о безопасности и оружии
descriptions.relation: Судай успокаивается, увидев спокойствие Дзян Янь
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь отказывается идти завтра, Судай перестает волноваться по поводу оружия

descriptions.title: Ецин
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Ецин входит в квартиру, чтобы сообщить о ситуации с телом Джандая и предложить меры безопасности
descriptions.conflict: Ецин имеет пятна крови на руках, что указывает на недавнюю борьбу или убийство
descriptions.state: Ецин серьезен и сосредоточен на безопасности, Судай и Дзян Янь внимательны
