descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь attempts to rise for food but experiences severe stomach cramping and a tingling sensation along her meridians due to her period returning after years of amenorrhea.
descriptions.intent: Dзяньянь intends to eat something to alleviate her discomfort but is hindered by the sudden return of her menstrual cycle and associated pain, recalling her past use of traditional Chinese medicine and consultations with famous doctors which failed to resolve the issue.
descriptions.conflict: The physical pain of her period and the memory of her previous medical struggles hinder her ability to eat or move comfortably, though she notes the pain typically subsides after the first day.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is in pain and slightly worried about her condition, yet she remains calm enough to manage her symptoms and plan her day.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь accepts the pain as temporary, applies a warm plaster to her stomach, and plans to eat a specific egg recipe that helps her feel better before going to sleep early.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь decides to wait for her biological rhythms to synchronize with Wang Linquan's and proceeds to the kitchen to prepare remedies and food.
descriptions.intent: She aims to soothe her pain and prepare a nutritious meal, specifically an egg stuffed with brown sugar and wine, which she believes improves her condition significantly.
descriptions.conflict: Her physical state limits her energy, but she manages to perform necessary self-care tasks without hesitation.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь feels a mix of discomfort from her period and determination to manage her health through diet and rest.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: After preparing her tea and applying the plaster, she eats her special egg recipe and goes to sleep in the safe house without setting an alarm, planning to wake naturally the next day.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь plans her activities for the next day, focusing on incubating eggs and preparing for outdoor gardening despite her current physical limitations.
descriptions.intent: She intends to incubate selected eggs in a thermostat machine and prepare to grow vegetables on the balcony, inspired by Soudai's success, while deferring heavy labor tasks like planting fruit trees.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of specialized seedling pots forces her to improvise using large styrofoam boxes previously used for seafood and fruit, requiring her to drill holes for ventilation and water drainage.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is proactive and resourceful, planning ahead for future tasks while acknowledging the harsh outdoor conditions and her current need for rest.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully repurposes the styrofoam boxes into makeshift planters, only to be abruptly woken up by a loud noise outside, indicating significant activity on the 32nd floor.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь investigates the loud noise from outside, realizing the fire door on the 32nd floor has been opened and a large man has entered the hallway.
descriptions.intent: She wants to identify the source of the noise and assess the situation without exposing herself to potential danger, choosing to observe from her room rather than opening the door.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden intrusion of a large man with a police mallet and the presence of unknown accomplices outside create tension, as she fears the other side has many followers and the situation might be hostile.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is alert and cautious, feeling a mix of shock at the visual of the intruder and anxiety about the potential threat posed by the group outside.
descriptions.relation: Suspicion and distance between Dзяньянь and the intruder/outsiders
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь decides not to open the door immediately but instead turns to her observation screen to watch the man and the activity outside, noting that the fire door is now open.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь observes the large man entering the 32nd floor, noting his physical appearance and his cautious behavior as he stops others from entering.
descriptions.intent: She continues to monitor the situation to understand the man's purpose and the nature of the group he represents, hoping to determine if they are friends or enemies.
descriptions.conflict: The man's appearance, described as having a "Chinese character face" with heavy wrinkles resembling a Shar-Pei, and his authoritative gesture to stop others from entering, heightens the uncertainty of the situation.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь remains calm and analytical, choosing to observe rather than react impulsively despite the intimidating presence of the man and the storm outside.
descriptions.relation: Dзяньянь observes the man from a distance, maintaining a safe separation while gathering information about his identity and intentions.
descriptions.outcome: The man cautiously inspects the area and stops others from entering, suggesting a coordinated group effort, while Dзяньянь continues to watch from her room, noting the darkness in the corridor and the lack of infrared cameras for the intruders.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь analyzes the situation further, deducing that the man is likely approaching room 3203 and that the previous occupants of room 323 have disappeared, leaving the door open and the place feared as a haunted house.
descriptions.intent: She seeks to understand the history of the empty rooms and the reasons why people are afraid to move back to the 32nd floor, connecting the current events to past disappearances.
descriptions.conflict: The fear of the previous family (Hechunmei) and the current stormy weather complicate the investigation, as the intruders might be there to reclaim items or investigate the disappearances.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is thoughtful and curious, piecing together the backstory of the building and the current events to form a coherent picture of what is happening.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь learns that the items in the rooms were moved by people downstairs during the night, and the fear of the previous family's disappearance has left the 32nd floor largely uninhabited, adding a layer of mystery to the intruder's actions.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: The narrator observes that items in the haunted house were moved by people below during the night, initially bringing only food and water, then furniture and burnable items, leaving the room empty.

location.name: Corridor of the 32nd floor
location.description: a dark, abandoned hallway with a fire door and room numbers visible

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь monitors the situation, noting that the influx of people does not threaten her personally since the house is not hers and she expects this movement.
descriptions.conflict: The atmosphere is tense as people move in and out, and Dзян Янь remains detached, observing that their actions do not concern her.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь feels detached and observant, noting the exhaustion of others while maintaining her own composure.

outfits.Dзян Янь: No specific clothing mentioned, implied to be wearing standard attire for the setting

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь observes the group of people entering and exiting without direct interaction
descriptions.outcome: A man exits quickly, waving towards the fire door, signaling the transition of activity in the corridor.

descriptions.title: Three middle-aged people (Man, Two Women, Little Girl)
descriptions.scene: Three middle-aged individuals enter the corridor: one man, two women, and a six-to-seven-year-old girl holding duck and swan lifebuoys and a schoolbag full of items.
descriptions.intent: The group moves with supplies, the girl appearing tired and confused after waking up, carrying essential items for survival.
descriptions.conflict: The girl looks lost and exhausted, while the adults carry heavy loads wrapped in sheets, indicating a desperate need for resources.
descriptions.state: The little girl is tired and confused; the adults look weary with uneven short hair and slightly drooping heads; the pregnant woman is in poor condition.

outfits.Man: Bald with fewer wrinkles and a thinner
outfits.carrying a large package wrapped in shee: Schoolbag full of items, holding lifebuoys

descriptions.relation: The group moves together as a unit, with the girl following the adults' lead
descriptions.outcome: Several people quickly head to room 323, but shortly after, four adults emerge from it.

descriptions.title: Four Adults
descriptions.scene: Four adults emerge from room 323, tiptoeing down the corridor with a pile of items in their hands, their faces turning red and they panting heavily.
descriptions.intent: They are transporting remaining supplies and attempting to move quietly to avoid detection or disturbance.
descriptions.conflict: The physical exertion of carrying items and the weak lighting make their task difficult, and they must navigate the corridor carefully.
descriptions.state: The four adults are exhausted, panting, and struggling with the weight of their belongings in the dim light.
descriptions.relation: The four adults move together as a group, coordinating their movement down the corridor
descriptions.outcome: They reach the area near room 3.203, where they are interrupted by the opening of door 3.204.

descriptions.title: Сунь Дзинтао, Ецин, Судай

location.description: with wind blowing through the hallway

descriptions.intent: They emerge to confront the group of four people who are trying to enter room 3.203, asserting their presence and control over the area.
descriptions.conflict: The wind from the corridor threatens to extinguish the alcohol lamp, and the group of four people hesitates, unsure of how to proceed.
descriptions.state: Сунь Дзинтао is alert and observant, Ецин and Судай are cautious, and the group of four people is uncertain and hesitant.
descriptions.relation: Сунь Дзинтао takes the lead, with Ецин and Судай supporting him, while the group of four people stands behind them
descriptions.outcome: The group of four people stops and stares at each other, unable to decide whether to enter room 3.203.

descriptions.title: Man with Chinese Face

location.name: Corridor near room 3.203
location.description: with the group of four people standing behind the man with the Chinese face

descriptions.conflict: The three people behind him are visibly uneasy and suspicious, while Сунь Дзинтао remains calm but observant, analyzing the situation.
descriptions.state: The man with the Chinese face is apologetic and explanatory, while the three people behind him are uneasy and suspicious, and Сунь Дзинтао is calm and analytical.
descriptions.relation: The man with the Chinese face tries to build rapport with Сунь Дзинтао, while the three people behind him remain hesitant and suspicious
descriptions.outcome: The three people behind the man with the Chinese face do not enter room 3.203 but instead place their supplies on the ground.

descriptions.title: Three People Behind Man with Chinese Face
descriptions.scene: The three people behind the man with the Chinese face stand uneasily, watching Сунь Дзинтао and the three people opposite him, their eyes narrowed in suspicion.
characters: Three People Behind Man with Chinese Face

location.name: Corridor near room 3.203
location.description: with the three people standing behind the man with the Chinese face

descriptions.intent: The three people behind the man with the Chinese face are trying to assess the situation and determine whether to trust the man with the Chinese face or Сунь Дзинтао.
descriptions.conflict: The three people behind the man with the Chinese face are suspicious and uneasy, while Сунь Дзинтао remains calm and observant, analyzing the situation.
descriptions.state: The three people behind the man with the Chinese face are uneasy and suspicious, while Сунь Дзинтао is calm and analytical, and the little girl is tired and confused.

descriptions.title: Сунь Дзинтао

location.name: Corridor near room 3.203

descriptions.conflict: The group of four people is hesitant and unsure, while Сунь Дзинтаo remains firm and observant, analyzing the situation.

descriptions.relation: Сунь Дзинтао asserts his authority over the area, while the group of four people remains hesitant and unsure
descriptions.outcome: Сунь Дзинтао continues to observe the group of four people, analyzing their appearance and behavior to determine their identity and intentions.

descriptions.title: Сунь Дзинтао, Ецин, Судай

location.name: Corridor near room 3.203
location.description: with the group of four people standing behind the man with the Chinese face

descriptions.conflict: The weak lighting makes it difficult to see the faces of the group of four people, but Сунь Дзинтао uses his sharp eyes to analyze their appearance and behavior.
descriptions.state: Сунь Дзинтао is alert and observant, while the group of four people is hesitant and unsure, and the little girl is tired and confused.

descriptions.outcome: Сунь Дзинтао concludes that the group of four people are likely tenants, not temporary renters or those who have moved in from other buildings, and continues to monitor the situation.

descriptions.title: Jou Wei

descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь is listening intently to the woman's speech
descriptions.outcome: The woman begins to address the crowd with an important message

descriptions.title: Djan Xium
descriptions.scene: A woman speaks immediately despite knowing time is precious, choosing to let internal emotions run free for a moment.

location.name: A stage in front of a crowd

descriptions.intent: She wants to command the crowd's attention and deliver a critical announcement regarding evacuation protocols and safety measures.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is initially shouting, singing, and excited, making it difficult for her message to be heard clearly.
descriptions.state: She is determined and authoritative, prioritizing the delivery of vital information over the immediate noise.
descriptions.relation: The crowd transitions from chaotic noise to silence upon hearing her voice
descriptions.outcome: The crowd's volume gradually decreases until the scene is plunged into silence, allowing her speech to be heard.

descriptions.title: Djan Xium
descriptions.scene: She introduces herself as a representative of the Anmin temporary base and explains the current emergency response mechanism activated by authorities due to high temperatures.
descriptions.intent: She aims to inform the villagers about the base's readiness and the specific criteria for evacuation selection.
descriptions.conflict: There is a severe shortage of ships and transportation capabilities, limiting the number of people who can be evacuated at once.
descriptions.state: She is serious and factual, explaining the logistical constraints while maintaining a reassuring tone.
descriptions.relation: She establishes a connection of trust and shared responsibility with the villagers
descriptions.outcome: She clarifies that the base is preparing intensively and that only young, healthy workers with specific skills will be selected for the first batch.

descriptions.title: Djan Xium
descriptions.scene: She announces the schedule for three batches of evacuees, specifying departure times at 12:00 and 18:00, and instructs people to queue at the 18th-floor windows.
descriptions.intent: She wants to ensure everyone understands the timeline and the specific location for queuing to avoid confusion and panic.
descriptions.conflict: The limited number of ships means not everyone can leave immediately, causing anxiety among those who might miss the current departure.
descriptions.state: She is empathetic yet firm, urging patience and trust in the government's plan to save everyone eventually.
descriptions.relation: She reassures those who cannot leave now that they will be picked up later based on the situation
descriptions.outcome: She emphasizes that the government will never abandon ordinary people and encourages unity to overcome the disaster together.

descriptions.title: Djan Xium
descriptions.scene: She delivers a powerful speech about humanity's ability to overcome any obstacle, which resonates deeply with the desperate crowd.
descriptions.intent: She seeks to restore hope and faith in the people who have fallen into despair due to the disaster.
descriptions.conflict: The situation is dire with high temperatures and heavy rain, yet she insists on a positive outlook to boost morale.
descriptions.state: She is passionate and inspiring, her words acting like a lighthouse in the dark night
descriptions.relation: The crowd's emotional state shifts from anxiety to renewed hope and belief
descriptions.outcome: The people are moved to tears and applause, feeling a surge of light in their eyes and a renewed sense of hope.

descriptions.title: Djan Xium
descriptions.scene: Soldiers and staff begin the boarding process, with armed soldiers guarding the ramp and conducting preliminary checks on documents and skills.

location.name: The ramp leading to the cruise liner
location.description: near the central garden of the community

descriptions.intent: The goal is to safely transport qualified evacuees to the base while maintaining order and security during the boarding.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain slows down the process, and the presence of armed soldiers creates a slightly intimidating atmosphere for some.
descriptions.state: The atmosphere is tense but orderly, with a mix of excitement for those boarding and disappointment for those left behind.
descriptions.relation: The soldiers enforce strict rules, while the staff assist with the boarding process
descriptions.outcome: The ramp is closed by soldiers after thirty minutes, leaving some people disappointed who were almost ready to board.

descriptions.title: Djan Xium
descriptions.scene: The cruise liner, filled with hope, prepares to depart as waves rise on the water, signaling the start of the evacuation.

location.name: The water near the central garden

descriptions.intent: The ship is set to leave to transport the selected personnel to safety, marking a turning point in the disaster response.
descriptions.conflict: The departure leaves a group of people behind who are anxious about the delay and the uncertainty of the next batch.
descriptions.state: The mood on the ship is joyful and relieved, while those left behind feel worried and anxious about the future.
descriptions.relation: A physical and emotional separation occurs between those saved and those waiting
descriptions.outcome: The ship slowly retreats from the central garden, carrying the hopes and ideals of the people on board.

descriptions.title: Djan Xium
descriptions.scene: Djan Xium shifts her focus from the departing ship to her own preparations, putting on old clothes and a mask before heading out.

location.name: Likely a preparation area or her quarters

descriptions.intent: She intends to join the evacuation effort herself or perform another duty, adopting a humble appearance with old clothes.
descriptions.conflict: She must transition from the role of a speaker to an active participant, possibly facing the same dangers as the evacuees.
descriptions.state: She is resolute and selfless, choosing to wear her oldest clothes and carry a simple bag to show solidarity.
descriptions.relation: She aligns herself with the people she just spoke to, sharing their fate
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to exit, ready to face the storm and the challenges ahead alongside the others.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: центральный сад общины
location.description: затем коридор 32 этажа, затем лестница вниз

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь медленно отступает от сада, отвлекает мысли, откладывает телескоп, обедает, надевает старую одежду и маску, берет сумку, чтобы спуститься на соседний этаж и проверить информацию о второй лодке
descriptions.conflict: Дзян Янь плохо слышит на 32 этаже, коридор темнее обычного, комната 323 занята и дверь закрыта, пожарная дверь не заперта, но спуск вниз затруднен
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь сосредоточена, затем насторожена, затем шокирована
descriptions.relation: одиночество
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь спускается вниз с фонариком, чтобы рассмотреть обстановку и услышать информацию.

descriptions.title: Вень Ванли
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Вень Ванли поднимается по лестнице с полиэтиленовым пакетом, полным вещей, чтобы переехать в дом 3.203
descriptions.conflict: Вень Ванли тяжело дышит, не может видеть пальцы в темноте, держит пакет, что затрудняет движение и повышает риск падения
descriptions.state: Вень Ванли смущена, напугана, её зрение адаптируется к темноте, но она опасается упасть
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь узнаёт в Вень Ванли беременную женщину, которая вчера переехала
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь видит Вень Ванли, узнаёт её историю и состояние.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь анализирует состояние Вень Ванли, замечает шрамы на её руках, пытается понять, через что прошла женщина
descriptions.conflict: Дзян Янь испытывает шок от вида шрамов, вспоминает трагический опыт из прошлой жизни, чувствует боль в носу от ужаса
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь шокирована, напугана, её память разрывается воспоминаниями
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь сопоставляет шрамы Вень Ванли с травмами из своей прошлой жизни
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь осознаёт, что шрамы на руках Вень Ванли напоминают травмы, полученные в подвале в прошлой жизни.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь пытается вспомнить детали трагедии из прошлой жизни, чтобы понять контекст шрамов
descriptions.conflict: Воспоминания о Сун Демине, Джан Цици, раскалённом угле и боли вызывают у Дзян Янь холодный пот и душевную боль
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь подавлена, её память о прошлом возвращается с новой силой
descriptions.relation: внутренняя борьба с прошлым
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь вспоминает, как Сун Демин и Джан Цици причинили ей боль, и как она хранила это в тайне.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь продолжает наблюдать за Вень Ванли, анализируя её состояние и запах
descriptions.conflict: От Вень Ванли исходит неописуемый запах телесных жидкостей, что усиливает напряжение
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь напугана, её воспоминания и текущая ситуация сливаются воедино
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь чувствует отвращение и страх к Вень Ванли
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь замечает запах от Вень Ванли, что усиливает её тревогу.

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь испытывает физическую реакцию от воспоминаний и замечает запах от Веньли
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь пытается скрыть свои истинные эмоции и не хочет вести непринуждённую беседу
descriptions.conflict: Подозрительный запах телесных жидкостей от Веньли и её смущение от шрамов на руке
descriptions.state: Смущённая, ошеломлённая, с подсознательным холодным потом на спине
descriptions.relation: Веньли чувствует себя виноватой и пытается скрыть свои шрамы
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь кивает и продолжает спускаться вниз, игнорируя разговор

descriptions.title: Веньли
descriptions.scene: Веньли просит не убивать её и её семью
descriptions.intent: Веньли пытается убедить Дзян Янь не причинять вреда её семье
descriptions.conflict: Дзян Янь считает Веньли страшной и не хочет вести беседу
descriptions.state: Смущённая, испуганная, с красными глазами и окровавленными губами
descriptions.relation: Веньли чувствует себя уязвимой и просит о пощаде
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь соглашается и продолжает спускаться

descriptions.title: Веньли
descriptions.scene: Веньли слышит шаги и бежит к пожарной двери
descriptions.intent: Веньли хочет скрыться от опасности
descriptions.conflict: Тяжёлые шаги и паника от приближающейся угрозы
descriptions.state: Паническая, испуганная
descriptions.relation: Веньли и Дзян Янь расходятся разными путями
descriptions.outcome: Веньли бежит к пожарной двери, где её встречает Ванзиня

descriptions.title: Ванзиня
descriptions.scene: Ванзиня появляется у пожарной двери и предлагает помощь
descriptions.intent: Ванзиня хочет помочь жене
descriptions.conflict: Веньли не отвечает и уходит
descriptions.state: Нежно, внимательно
descriptions.relation: Ванзиня и Веньли — муж и жена
descriptions.outcome: Веньли уходит, дверь захлопывается, Ванзиня остаётся внутри

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь продолжает спускаться и наблюдает за людьми
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет добраться до лифта и корабля
descriptions.conflict: Люди выстраиваются в очередь, некоторые не могут подняться на борт
descriptions.state: Наблюдательная, спокойная
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь и другие пассажиры
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь продолжает спускаться и наблюдает за людьми

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь достигает двадцать второго этажа и видит людей, готовящих еду
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет найти место в очереди на корабль
descriptions.conflict: Люди не могут подняться на борт, условия не выполнены
descriptions.state: Уставшая, голодная
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь и другие пассажиры
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь продолжает ждать и наблюдать за людьми

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь входит в коридор и видит людей, готовящих еду
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет найти место в очереди на корабль
descriptions.conflict: Люди не могут подняться на борт, условия не выполнены
descriptions.state: Наблюдательная, спокойная
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь и другие пассажиры
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь продолжает ждать и наблюдать за людьми

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Дзян Янь выходит в окно и видит океан
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь хочет увидеть океан
descriptions.conflict: Дождевая вода попадает внутрь, окна треснуты градом
descriptions.state: Удивлённая, спокойная
descriptions.relation: Дзян Янь и другие пассажиры
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь видит океан и людей, ловящих рыбу

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences

location.name: Apartment window overlooking a flooded street

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь looks out the window to assess the situation, seeing cracked glass covered by plastic bags and a vast ocean of floodwater where people risk their lives to catch fish
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and rising water levels threaten the harvest and the safety of the residents, while the promised boat for evacuation has not arrived
descriptions.state: Anxious and observant, she feels the weight of the situation as time passes without the expected rescue
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She observes that the harvest is poor and fish appear one after another, but the water level continues to rise

descriptions.title: Unknown Person
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: The person shouts in the corridor about the lack of time perception due to the disaster, noting that work and school are unnecessary now
descriptions.conflict: The absence of clocks and charged devices has caused people to lose their sense of time, leading to confusion about the current hour
descriptions.state: Frustrated and disoriented, they express disbelief that the boat hasn't arrived by noon
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The person laments that everyone rests at sunset and sleeps at dawn, comparing their state to animal hibernation to save food

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She reflects on the official statement that the boat won't come due to heavy rain, dismissing it as a lie after overhearing the rumor this morning
descriptions.conflict: Her blood boils with anger at the perceived deception, questioning who could be so punctual or if something delayed the boat
descriptions.state: Angry and skeptical, she feels betrayed by the official narrative and the silence from the rescue team
descriptions.relation: Internal conflict with the authorities' promises
descriptions.outcome: She remains hopeful but increasingly doubtful as the boat fails to appear

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She recalls seeing Xiao Jian and his wife waiting downstairs all morning, who mentioned their legs were about to break from standing
descriptions.conflict: She hesitates to leave her spot in the corridor because she fears someone else will take her place if she moves, forcing her to hold back her urgent need to urinate
descriptions.state: Tense and desperate, she balances physical discomfort with the fear of losing her spot in the queue
descriptions.relation: Connection to Xiao Jian and his wife
descriptions.outcome: She stays put, hoping the boat will arrive soon to save them all

descriptions.title: Group of People
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: The group discusses the possibility of the boat arriving to transfer them to the year 2204, debating whether to ask others to join them on the ship
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the boat's arrival causes panic, with some people arguing that the official's promise is unreliable and others insisting on waiting
descriptions.state: Divided between hope and despair, some are panicking while others try to maintain order
descriptions.relation: Collective anxiety and conflicting opinions
descriptions.outcome: The group remains in a state of limbo, unsure if the official will keep his word or abandon them

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She stands by the window with folded arms, feeling a bad premonition that the boat will not come
descriptions.conflict: The passage of another hour without the boat's arrival destroys the early morning confidence and hope, replacing it with dread
descriptions.state: Despairing and resigned, she senses that the situation is worsening beyond repair
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Her hope is extinguished as the silence from the rescue team grows louder

descriptions.title: Group of People
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Voices from below suggest moving to the base themselves, but the heavy rain makes the road invisible and dangerous
descriptions.conflict: The idea of traveling in a rubber boat in such conditions is met with fear, as anyone caught in the middle could be destroyed
descriptions.state: Panicked and fearful, the crowd begins to argue and push each other as hope turns to desperation
descriptions.relation: Growing tension and conflict within the group
descriptions.outcome: Panic spreads through the crowd, with some people expressing zloradstvo (schadenfreude) over others' misfortune

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: She decides to go home after listening to the commotion, only to find the queue for the ferry on the pedestrian staircase has grown longer
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is so dense that it takes her a long time to push her way out, with the queue snaking up to the 23rd floor
descriptions.state: Overwhelmed and frustrated, she struggles against the pressure of the crowd
descriptions.relation: Interaction with the crowd
descriptions.outcome: She reaches the 24th-floor staircase, where she sees Sun Dzentao and Sudai opening the fire door and stepping outside

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь, Sun Dzentao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: 1-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Sun Dzentao and Sudai emerge from the fire door, followed by a middle-aged man with a gentle appearance and black-rimmed glasses
descriptions.conflict: Sudai sees Dзян Янь fully armed and waves excitedly, creating a moment of surprise and potential confrontation
descriptions.state: Surprised and alert, Dзян Янь is ready for conflict while Sudai is enthusiastic
descriptions.relation: Sudai recognizes Dзян Янь and reacts with excitement
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends with Dзян Янь standing armed and Sudai waving, setting up a potential interaction or conflict

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Судай, Сунь Дзентао, Тянь Дзлян
descriptions.scene: Dзяньянь observes Sun Dzentao and Sudai exiting the fire door on the 24th floor, followed by a middle-aged man with delicate features and black-rimmed glasses identified as Dзяньянь. Sudai waves excitedly at the fully armed Dзяньянь, while Sun Dzentao and the middle-aged man carry heavy bags made of snake skin cement wrapped in their shoulders. Sun Dzentao and Tian Dzlyan greet Dзяньянь politely, and she responds with a greeting while suggesting they take turns ascending first.

location.name: Corridor and staircase connecting the 24th to the 32nd floor
location.description: dimly lit with closed fire doors and a pungent smell in the hallway

descriptions.intent: The group aims to transport materials upward while managing the heavy loads and navigating the dark, smelly environment without causing conflict or delay.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy cement bags and bricks are difficult to carry, the hallway smells unbearable, and the middle-aged man forgot to wear a mask upon descending, complicating the ascent.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is alert and observant, Sudai is excited and slightly out of breath, while the others are focused on the physical burden and the strange situation.

outfits.mask worn on face; Судай: casual clothing suitable for movement; Сунь Дзентао=standard work attire; Тянь Дзлян=standard work attire; Middle-aged man=ordinary clothes with black-rimmed glasses

descriptions.relation: Dзяньянь and Sudai share a close, familiar dynamic, while the others maintain polite but distant interactions until the middle-aged man's identity is revealed.
descriptions.outcome: The group agrees to take initiative in carrying the bags upward, and Dзяньянь questions Sudai's reason for descending, leading to an explanation about finding useful materials.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Sudai explains that they found two bags of cement residue and a pile of bricks in the property distribution room, and she covers her nose due to the strong smell in the corridor. Dзяньянь nods in agreement, and they stop talking to quietly ascend the stairs together.
descriptions.intent: They intend to reach the 32nd floor to utilize the found materials for a practical purpose, specifically building an earth stove for heating and cooking.
descriptions.conflict: The physical exhaustion from carrying heavy loads and the unpleasant smell hinder their progress, causing Sudai to stop and gasp for air near the 31st-floor platform.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is calm and accepting, while Sudai is tired and struggling to keep up, showing signs of fatigue and discomfort.
descriptions.relation: Their relationship is cooperative and friendly, with Dзяньянь guiding Sudai through the situation.
descriptions.outcome: They reach the 32nd-floor platform, where Sudai can no longer hold back and stops to rest, placing her hands on Dзяньянь's shoulders and catching her breath.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Sudai whispers about using the cement and bricks to build an earth stove, recalling a memory of a half-destroyed firewood restaurant with a turkey dish seen earlier on the way to a bee base. She describes the large clay stove with a big iron pot on top and coal fire underneath, capable of cooking vegetables, roasted meats, and corn tortillas.
descriptions.intent: They plan to construct an earth stove in the living room to cook food, keep warm, and survive the upcoming cold weather and possible snowfall.
descriptions.conflict: Dзяньянь hesitates because building a stove in someone else's home involves privacy concerns, and she worries about proper ventilation and chimney setup.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is thoughtful and cautious, while Sudai is enthusiastic and eager to proceed with the plan.
descriptions.relation: Dзяньянь expresses concern for etiquette and privacy, while Sudai reassures her that her own home has a Western-style fireplace and that they can keep the stove for themselves.
descriptions.outcome: Dзяньянь agrees to the plan, and Sudai suggests they go up to the next floor, noting that her breathing has become quieter.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Судай
descriptions.scene: They push open the fire door to room 323, which is slightly ajar, and hear the cries of a woman and a child coming from inside.

location.name: Room 323
location.description: 32nd floor, behind a slightly open fire door

descriptions.intent: They intend to enter the room to assess the situation and possibly use the space for their earth stove project.
descriptions.conflict: The cries of a woman and a child inside the room create an immediate conflict, suggesting an emergency or distressing situation that requires attention.
descriptions.state: Dзяньянь is cautious and ready to act, while Sudai is curious and eager to investigate the source of the noise.
descriptions.relation: Their relationship remains cooperative, but the situation inside the room introduces a new tension that requires joint decision-making.
descriptions.outcome: They stand at the threshold of room 323, hearing the distressing cries, and prepare to enter the room to address the emergency.

descriptions.title: Dзяньянь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Дзяньянь предлагает Судай подняться наверх после того, как дыхание Судая стало тише, и они вместе толкают противопожарную дверь

location.name: коридор и палата 323
location.description: где слышны крики женщины и ребёнка

descriptions.intent: Дзяньянь хочет проверить ситуацию в палате 323, а Судай пытается скрыть информацию о переезде двух семей
descriptions.conflict: Судай боится, что Дзяньянь узнает о переезде, но Дзяньянь уже слышит крики изнутри
descriptions.state: Дзяньянь нахмурилась из-за воспоминаний о шрамах Веньли, Судай удивлена и сменила тему
descriptions.relation: Судай пытается скрыть правду, Дзяньянь спокойна
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь кивает и спокойно реагирует на новость о переезде, Судай меняет тему разговора

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь, Судай
descriptions.scene: Судай спрашивает, слышали ли они о взломе дверного замка полицейским, и Дзяньянь отвечает, что встретила Вень Ваньли
descriptions.intent: Судай хочет проверить, знает ли Дзяньянь о взломе замка, Дзяньянь хочет сообщить о встрече с Вень Ваньли
descriptions.conflict: Судай беспокоится, что Дзяньянь узнает слишком много, Дзяньянь спокойно отвечает
descriptions.state: Судай удивлена спокойствием Дзяньянь, Дзяньянь чувствует себя комфортно
descriptions.relation: Дзяньянь и Судай обсуждают события, Дзяньянь не знает о взломе
descriptions.outcome: Дзяньянь говорит, что не слышала о взломе, но встретила Вень Ваньли

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь

descriptions.title: Дзяньянь

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь

location.name: Space habitat pool area with sun loungers and umbrellas

descriptions.intent: She observes the thriving aquatic life and decides to feed the turtles and fish to relax and heal from her daily routine of study and recharging
descriptions.conflict: She realizes she lacks prior experience in raising animals or preparing specific food like fish and dog feed, leading to a sense of randomness in her actions
descriptions.state: She feels a mix of relaxation from feeding the fish and sudden sadness triggered by memories of her busy parents who neglected her childhood visits to the park
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She feeds the turtles and fish, finds the activity healing, but her mood shifts to melancholy as she reflects on her parents' absence and the impossibility of returning to her past normal life

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: Seeking comfort after her emotional breakdown, she decides to brew a cup of passionflower (пустырник) tea to calm her nerves
descriptions.conflict: The memory of her parents' busy schedules and their claim that raising fish brings good feng shui contrasts with her feeling of loneliness and the lack of hope in her current world
descriptions.state: Her eyes are wet with tears as she processes the realization that her parents' love was precious but too late to change, and she feels the weight of living in an apocalyptic world without hope
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She drinks the tea, rests briefly, and then remembers she has not yet used her thermostat, prompting her to get up again

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: She retrieves three thermostats found previously and places them into a container, intending to use them for hatching eggs
descriptions.conflict: She questions the appropriateness of placing a thermostat inside the home versus outside, noting the sun is shining outside, and worries about missing power adapters or power banks
descriptions.state: She is focused and practical, shifting from emotional reflection to problem-solving regarding her new technological tools
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully packs the thermostats, battery, and hygrometers into the container, preparing for the egg hatching process

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: She consults a downloaded encyclopedia to learn how to identify fertile eggs and the specific conditions needed for hatching different types of eggs
descriptions.conflict: She struggles to understand the visual signs of fertility in the egg fluid under a flashlight, causing her eyes to strain and her vision to blur
descriptions.state: She is curious and determined, pushing through physical discomfort to gain knowledge about controlling objects with her mind and selecting eggs telepathically
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes she can control objects with her mind and telepathically select eggs, deciding to start with one duck egg and one goose egg to manage the varying temperature and humidity requirements

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: She places the selected duck and goose eggs into three thermostatic machines and sets the appropriate humidity and temperature according to the manual
descriptions.conflict: She must balance the different environmental needs of multiple egg types while managing her limited resources and time
descriptions.state: She is methodical and careful, taking notes in a notebook while simultaneously checking information and working on the incubation process
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The incubation process takes about an hour, and she completes the setup for hatching the eggs

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.intent: She plans to go home to Sudao for dinner but feels it is improper to go with empty hands, so she decides to bring something suitable
descriptions.conflict: She faces the challenge of selecting materials from the vast space inventory that are appropriate and will not raise suspicions
descriptions.state: She is thoughtful and cautious, aware that her choices must be socially acceptable and not draw unwanted attention
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She resolves to carefully choose an item that fits the occasion and avoids suspicion before heading to Sudao's place

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь решает не идти с пустыми руками к Судаю на ужин и выбирает подходящие материалы, которые не вызовут подозрений
descriptions.conflict: Выбор материалов среди десятков тысяч вариантов требует умения и осторожности
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь немного задумывается, затем действует решительно

descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь выбирает овощи и возвращается в убежище

descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь наполняет ящики землёй и переносит их в гостиную

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь

descriptions.conflict: Усталость от управления материалами силой мысли
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь чувствует выполненное чувство долга
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: Овощи посажены, рыба и креветки накормлены, Дзян Янь чувствует усталость

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь ставит будильник и готовится поспать до 5 часов

descriptions.state: Дзян Янь быстро засыпает после размышлений
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь засыпает и проводит спокойный сон

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

descriptions.state: Дзян Янь наблюдает за ситуацией снаружи
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь видит очереди в зданиях напротив и драки между жителями

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь

descriptions.intent: Дзян Янь собирает вещи для переезда в дом Судая
descriptions.conflict: Нужно взять только необходимое, так как нельзя вынести слишком много
descriptions.state: Дзян Янь действует быстро и решительно
descriptions.relation: нет
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь готовит рюкзак и надевает ветровку

descriptions.title: Дзян Янь
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

descriptions.outcome: Джоу Вей и Ван Дзямей знакомятся с Дзян Янь и Судай, создавая новую динамику в группе

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Новый дом в районе 3.203
location.description: интерьер с засохшими пятнами крови в зазорах плитки

descriptions.intent: Джоувей и Ван Дзям пытаются оправдаться за внезапный переезд и приглашают соседей на традиционный банкет, чтобы завоевать популярность дома, несмотря на трагическую историю предыдущих жильцов
descriptions.conflict: Джоувей осознает нелепость своего предложения, так как дом был полностью вымерт, а пол испачкан кровью, что делает банкет крайне неуместным
descriptions.state: Джоувей чувствует смущение и растерянность, Ван Дзям пытается сгладить ситуацию, Дзян Янь сохраняет спокойствие, но наблюдает за обстановкой с осторожностью
descriptions.relation: Джоувей и Ван Дзям проявляют уважение и желание наладить отношения, Дзян Янь и Судай отвечают вежливостью и готовностью принять гостей
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь и Судай вежливо отказываются от приглашения на банкет, объясняя, что они не пойдут сегодня, но оставляют дверь открытой для будущего общения

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Маленькая девочка хочет выразить восхищение Дзян Янь, называя её красивой, и делится информацией о своей семье
descriptions.conflict: Джоувей и Ван Дзям испытывают шок и неловкость от прямого обращения ребенка к Дзян Янь, так как не ожидали такого внимания
descriptions.state: Маленькая девочка чувствует себя уверенно и радостно, Дзян Янь улыбается и чувствует облегчение, Джоувей и Ван Дзям смущены

outfits.Маленькая девочка: детская одежда, подходящая для её возраста

descriptions.relation: Маленькая девочка создает теплую атмосферу, отвлекая внимание от неловкости взрослых, Дзян Янь чувствует себя ближе к ребенку
descriptions.outcome: Дзян Янь дарит ребенку конфету и спрашивает её имя и возраст, создавая момент искреннего общения

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Маленькая девочка рассказывает о своем имени и возрасте, а также упоминает своего брата, но внезапно замолкает под давлением
descriptions.conflict: Ван Дзям резко вмешивается, требуя от ребенка поблагодарить Дзян Янь, что вызывает испуг и замолкание девочки
descriptions.state: Маленькая девочка чувствует страх и неловкость, Джоувей и Ван Дзям выглядят уродливо от смущения, Дзян Янь и Судай нахмурились

outfits.Маленькая девочка: детская одежда, подходящая для её возраста

descriptions.relation: Ван Дзям пытается контролировать ситуацию, но её жесткость вызывает негативную реакцию, Джоувей и Дзян Янь чувствуют напряжение
descriptions.outcome: Маленькая девочка робко благодарит Дзян Янь, а Ван Дзям пытается смягчить ситуацию, объясняя, что они не хотят быть грубыми

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Судай пытается понять, что происходит между двумя парами, и спрашивает Джоувей о его младшем сыне
descriptions.conflict: Напряжение между взрослыми нарастает, так как Джоувей и Ван Дзям не могут скрыть своего смущения, а Ван Дзям продолжает контролировать ребенка
descriptions.state: Судай чувствует беспокойство и пытается разобраться в ситуации, Джоувей и Ван Дзям чувствуют себя неловко, Дзян Янь наблюдает за всем происходящим
descriptions.relation: Судай выступает в роли посредника, пытаясь снизить напряжение, Джоувей и Ван Дзям чувствуют себя под давлением
descriptions.outcome: Судай продолжает наблюдать за ситуацией, пытаясь понять, что происходит между Джоувей и Ван Дзям, а также между Дзян Янь и маленькой девочкой

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzia Yan and Jiao Jianyan are greeted by Sun Zinta and Tian Zelian, who are old neighbors and friends, and are invited to sit and rest while they prepare for a meal.
descriptions.intent: Dzia Yan and Jiao Jianyan want to settle in and prepare for a meal, while Sun Zinta and Tian Zelian work on setting up the living room and preparing for the apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: The social norms and etiquette of the times create a conflict between the desire to maintain social harmony and the need to respect the privacy of the departing family, leading to a reflection on the underlying emotions and motivations of Jiao Jianyan.
descriptions.state: Dzia Yan and Jiao Jianyan feel welcomed and ready to settle in, while Sun Zinta and Tian Zelian work on setting up the living room and preparing for the apocalypse.

outfits.no specific clothing details mentioned;: implied casual attire, no specific clothing details mentioned

descriptions.relation: Dzia Yan and Jiao Jianyan share a close relationship with Sun Zinta and Tian Zelian, who are old neighbors and friends.
descriptions.outcome: Dzia Yan and Jiao Jianyan are greeted by Sun Zinta and Tian Zelian, who are old neighbors and friends, and are invited to sit and rest while they prepare for a meal, leading to a sense of welcome and preparation for the apocalypse.

descriptions.title: Dzia Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzia Yan offers her supplies to Sun Zinta, who politely declines, emphasizing the value of rice and salt in the apocalypse and the need to share resources.
descriptions.intent: Dzia Yan wants to share her supplies and ensure that everyone has enough resources to survive the apocalypse, while Sun Zinta emphasizes the value of rice and salt and the need to share resources.
descriptions.conflict: The social norms and etiquette of the times create a conflict between the desire to maintain social harmony and the need to respect the privacy of the departing family, leading to a reflection on the underlying emotions and motivations of Jiao Jianyan.
descriptions.state: Dzia Yan feels generous and concerned about the need to share resources, while Sun Zinta emphasizes the value of rice and salt and the need to share resources.

outfits.no specific clothing details mentioned;: implied casual attire, no specific clothing details mentioned

descriptions.relation: Dzia Yan and Sun Zinta share a close relationship, with Dzia Yan wanting to share her supplies and ensure that everyone has enough resources to survive the apocalypse.
descriptions.outcome: Dzia Yan offers her supplies to Sun Zinta, who politely declines, emphasizing the value of rice and salt in the apocalypse and the need to share resources, leading to a sense of generosity and concern for the well-being of everyone.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь insists on taking food supplies from Судай to ensure she can eat next time, forcing her to accept them silently.

location.name: Kitchen
location.description: a room where food is stored and prepared, with a balcony leading to an outdoor vegetable garden

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to secure enough food for himself and the family, refusing to leave without the supplies, while Судай feels overwhelmed by his persistence and the current crisis.
descriptions.conflict: Судай is unable to refuse the food despite her own needs, and Dзян Янь's determination clashes with her hesitation to accept help.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is firm and slightly aggressive in his demands, while Судай is silent and resigned to his actions.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь takes charge of the situation, while Судай submits to his will.
descriptions.outcome: Судай accepts the food and places it on the kitchen counter, ending the argument temporarily.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь exits the kitchen to inspect the vegetable garden on the balcony, showing interest in Судай's gardening efforts.

location.name: Balcony
location.description: an outdoor space with vegetable containers and plants

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to learn about the gardening process and assess the potential for growing vegetables in the current conditions.
descriptions.conflict: Судай explains the lack of soil and the challenges of growing vegetables without proper nutrients, which frustrates Dзян Янь's enthusiasm.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is curious and eager to find a solution, while Судай is concerned about the limitations of their resources.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь shows interest in Судай's work, while Судай provides practical advice on the difficulties of gardening.
descriptions.outcome: Судай explains the lack of soil and the challenges of growing vegetables without proper nutrients, which frustrates Dзян Янь's enthusiasm.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь recalls a previous landing on a building roof during a heatwave, remembering that soil remains there despite the current rain.

location.name: Memory of a building roof
location.description: a place with flower beds and soil

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to retrieve the soil from the roof to use for gardening, seeing it as a potential solution to their problem.
descriptions.conflict: The current heavy rain and flooding make the retrieval of soil difficult, and the time required to grow vegetables is a concern.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is determined and optimistic about finding a solution, while Судай is skeptical about the feasibility of the plan.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь shares a memory with Судай, who is surprised by his knowledge of the location.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь convinces Судай to consider retrieving the soil from the roof, despite the challenges.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь points to the upper floor of the building, indicating the location of the soil, and encourages Судай to inspect it.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants Судай to see the soil and assess its condition, hoping to proceed with the plan.
descriptions.conflict: Судай is confused by Dзян Янь's sudden shift in location and the idea of going to the roof, which is unfamiliar to her.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is confident and persuasive, while Судай is hesitant and unsure about the plan.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь takes a leadership role, while Судай follows his lead reluctantly.
descriptions.outcome: Судай agrees to inspect the soil, though she remains uncertain about the plan.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь explains the conditions on the roof, noting that the soil is still intact despite the rain, and suggests waiting for the rain to stop before retrieving it.
descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to ensure that the soil is retrieved at the right time, balancing the need for soil with the risk of flooding.
descriptions.conflict: The current heavy rain and flooding make the retrieval of soil difficult, and the time required to grow vegetables is a concern.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is cautious and strategic, while Судай is still skeptical about the feasibility of the plan.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь provides detailed information about the roof, while Судай listens and processes the information.
descriptions.outcome: Dзян Янь and Судай agree to wait until the rain stops before retrieving the soil.

descriptions.title: Sунь Дзентао
descriptions.scene: Sунь Дзентао and Ецин clear the dining table and prepare to cook a meal, setting the stage for a communal gathering.

location.name: Dining room
location.description: with a table and cooking equipment

descriptions.intent: Sунь Дзентао wants to prepare a meal for everyone, fostering a sense of community and shared effort.
descriptions.conflict: The current crisis and lack of resources make the preparation of a meal challenging, but the group remains determined to eat together.
descriptions.state: Sунь Дзентао is calm and organized, while Ецин assists him in the task.
descriptions.relation: Sунь Дзентао and Ецин work together to prepare the meal, showing their cooperation and support for each other.
descriptions.outcome: The meal is prepared, and the group gathers around the table to eat.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь joins the group at the dining table, sitting next to Ецин and enjoying the aroma of the cooking fish.

location.name: Dining room
location.description: with a table and cooking equipment

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to participate in the meal and share in the communal experience, despite his earlier insistence on taking food supplies.
descriptions.conflict: The current crisis and lack of resources make the preparation of a meal challenging, but the group remains determined to eat together.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is relaxed and content, while the others are focused on the meal and the conversation.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь integrates into the group, showing his acceptance of their hospitality and the importance of community.
descriptions.outcome: The group enjoys the meal together, strengthening their bonds and morale.

descriptions.title: Dзян Янь
descriptions.scene: Dзян Янь observes the cooking process, noting the traditional preparation of the fish and the addition of various ingredients.

location.name: Dining room
location.description: with a table and cooking equipment

descriptions.intent: Dзян Янь wants to learn about the cooking process and appreciate the effort put into preparing the meal.
descriptions.conflict: The current crisis and lack of resources make the preparation of a meal challenging, but the group remains determined to eat together.
descriptions.state: Dзян Янь is curious and appreciative, while the others are focused on the meal and the conversation.
descriptions.relation: Dзян Янь shows interest in the cooking process, while the others explain the steps involved.
descriptions.outcome: The meal is prepared, and the group enjoys the communal experience, strengthening their bonds and morale.

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences
descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan observes the grilled fish dish, noting its minimalist version and the specific garnishes like coriander, red pepper, and roasted peanuts, while analyzing the cooking process of removing the head and tail and slicing the meat thinly
descriptions.conflict: The text mentions the fish has mutated, raising a question about what it might have eaten, though this does not hinder the immediate action of eating
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is curious and appreciative of the food's aroma and appearance, feeling a sense of relief that she can eat well in this environment
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan praises the smell and taste of the food, acknowledging that surviving in the future requires stepping out of her comfort zone regarding her diet

descriptions.title: Dzian Yan, Eciyin
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The same room with dim lighting

descriptions.intent: Dzian Yan expresses her admiration for the food, and Eciyin, standing nearby, reacts by looking at her and smiling awkwardly like a big child
descriptions.conflict: Eciyin's awkward smile suggests he might be shy or embarrassed by Dzian Yan's enthusiastic praise
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is happy and satisfied, while Eciyin appears slightly embarrassed but pleased
descriptions.relation: Eciyin shows a friendly, slightly bashful reaction to Dzian Yan's praise
descriptions.outcome: The interaction highlights a warm, casual dynamic between the two characters as they share the meal

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The same room with dim lighting

descriptions.intent: Sudai proudly presents a piece of the grilled fish to Dzian Yan, emphasizing the fame of their product and the quality of the ingredients
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Sudai is proud and confident in the quality of their food, smiling as she offers the fish
descriptions.relation: Sudai takes pride in her product and shares it with Dzian Yan
descriptions.outcome: Dzian Yan accepts the fish, and the scene emphasizes the communal enjoyment of the meal despite the harsh conditions

descriptions.title: Tian Zelian
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The same room with dim lighting

descriptions.intent: Tian Zelian places a large piece of the grilled fish into his bowl, eager to taste the dish
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Tian Zelian is enthusiastic and appreciative of the food, describing it as the most delicious and hearty meal he has ever eaten
descriptions.relation: Tian Zelian joins the group in enjoying the meal, showing his appreciation for the food
descriptions.outcome: The group continues to eat and praise the dish, highlighting its exceptional taste and the contrast with their usual diet

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The same room with dim lighting

descriptions.intent: Sudai explains that she has not eaten well in the last few months and wanted to gather together to enjoy a luxurious meal
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Sudai is smiling and content, enjoying the rare opportunity to eat well and socialize with her companions
descriptions.relation: Sudai shares her feelings about the rarity of such a gathering and the joy of eating well
descriptions.outcome: The group acknowledges the special nature of the meal and the importance of coming together to enjoy it

descriptions.title: Sundzentao
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The same room with dim lighting

descriptions.intent: Sundzentao suggests they drink some alcohol to celebrate the rare gathering and to warm themselves up as the weather gets colder
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Sundzentao is cheerful and generous, eager to share the good fortune of finding supplies and enjoying a meal together
descriptions.relation: Sundzentao takes the lead in organizing the drinking session, showing his leadership and hospitality
descriptions.outcome: The group prepares to drink, with Sundzentao pouring the sake into cups for everyone

descriptions.title: Sundzentao, Dzian Yan
descriptions.scene: 3-5 sentences

location.name: The same room with dim lighting

descriptions.intent: Sundzentao raises his glass first, and Dzian Yan, though not used to drinking alcohol, decides to participate in the celebration
descriptions.conflict: Dzian Yan is not accustomed to drinking alcohol, but she does not refuse the offer
descriptions.state: Dzian Yan is slightly hesitant but willing to join in the festivities, while Sundzentao is enthusiastic and encouraging
descriptions.relation: Sundzentao leads the drinking session, and Dzian Yan follows his lead, showing a sense of camaraderie
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to drink, with Sundzentao taking the first sip and Dzian Yan following suit, marking the start of their celebration
